namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class ApertureResetMode
{
	public const uint Reset = 0u;

	public const uint NoReset = 1u;
}
using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private bool _optionAutoSubFolder;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionIsLinkDCU5 = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsDispLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionDispLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionDispLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int TypeOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionTypeOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionTypeOfLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int SpaceOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public int ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsShowPostViewWindow
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowPostViewWindow;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowPostViewWindow = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsReleaseWithAf
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionReleaseWithAfSw;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionReleaseWithAfSw = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsUseBulbTimer
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionUseBulbTimer;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionUseBulbTimer = value;
		}
	}

	public int LVGridColorIndex
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionLVGridColorIndex;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionLVGridColorIndex = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RawFileFormat
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionRawFileFormat;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionRawFileFormat = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsAutoCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionAutoSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionAutoSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RuleOfCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderRule;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderRule = value;
		}
	}

	public string SubFolderBaseName
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderBaseName;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderBaseName = value;
		}
	}

	public byte NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public bool ShowApertureFixBtn
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowApertureFixBtn;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowApertureFixBtn = value;
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}
}

	public const int SupportedCameraNew = 4;

}

	public const byte SEEK_END = 6;

internal static class CaptureModeInfo

	public const uint ImageProcessing = 2u;

	public const uint MovieMode = 256u;

	public const uint MovieRecording = 512u;

	public const uint MirroUpMode = 1024u;

	public const uint MirrorUpping = 2048u;

	public const uint IntervalMode = 4096u;

	public const uint MultiCaptureMode = 16384u;

	public const uint MultiCapturing = 32768u;

	public const uint SelfTimerCountdown = 1048576u;
}
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class CIModeLUT
{
	public static byte[] NominalToInternal = new byte[14]
	{
		255, 1, 0, 2, 3, 4, 12, 9, 6, 11,
		8, 7, 5, 10
	};

	public static Dictionary<uint, byte> InternalToNominal = new Dictionary<uint, byte>
	{
		{ 12u, 0 },

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class ColorTempDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public ColorTempDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void ColorTempDlg_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = _camObject.CurrentColorTemperature;
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.WBColorTemp = (ushort)ColorTempSlider.Value;
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void ColorTempUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void ColorTempDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void TbxColorTempValue_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
	}

	private void TbxColorTempValue_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
	}

	private void ColorTempSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = Math.Floor((ColorTempSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10.0;
	}
}

using System;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Interop;
using System.Windows.Media.Imaging;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}

using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private bool _optionAutoSubFolder;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionIsLinkDCU5 = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsDispLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionDispLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionDispLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int TypeOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionTypeOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionTypeOfLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int SpaceOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public int ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsShowPostViewWindow
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowPostViewWindow;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowPostViewWindow = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsReleaseWithAf
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionReleaseWithAfSw;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionReleaseWithAfSw = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsUseBulbTimer
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionUseBulbTimer;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionUseBulbTimer = value;
		}
	}

	public int LVGridColorIndex
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionLVGridColorIndex;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionLVGridColorIndex = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RawFileFormat
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionRawFileFormat;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionRawFileFormat = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsAutoCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionAutoSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionAutoSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RuleOfCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderRule;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderRule = value;
		}
	}

	public string SubFolderBaseName
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderBaseName;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderBaseName = value;
		}
	}

	public byte NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public bool ShowApertureFixBtn
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowApertureFixBtn;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowApertureFixBtn = value;
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}
}

public class CamFileOperation
{
	public byte FileOperation;

	public int OperationInfo;
}
namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class CaptureModeInfo
{
	public const uint Shooting = 1u;

	public const uint ImageProcessing = 2u;

	public const uint MovieMode = 256u;

	public const uint MovieRecording = 512u;

	public const uint MirroUpMode = 1024u;

	public const uint MirrorUpping = 2048u;

	public const uint IntervalMode = 4096u;

	public const uint MultiCaptureMode = 16384u;

	public const uint MultiCapturing = 32768u;

	public const uint SelfTimerCountdown = 1048576u;
}
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class CIModeLUT
{
	public static byte[] NominalToInternal = new byte[14]
	{
		255, 1, 0, 2, 3, 4, 12, 9, 6, 11,
		8, 7, 5, 10
	};

	public static Dictionary<uint, byte> InternalToNominal = new Dictionary<uint, byte>
	{
		{ 12u, 0 },
		{ 1u, 1 },
		{ 0u, 2 },
		{ 2u, 3 },
		{ 3u, 4 },
		{ 4u, 5 },
		{ 13u, 6 },
		{ 9u, 7 },
		{ 6u, 8 },
		{ 11u, 9 },
		{ 8u, 10 },
		{ 7u, 11 },
		{ 5u, 12 },
		{ 10u, 13 }
	};
}

{
	public const byte right = 0;

	public const byte left = 1;

	public const byte up = 2;

	public const byte down = 3;

	public const byte clockwise = 4;

	public const byte counterclockwise = 5;

	public const byte reset = 6;
}

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class ColorTempDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public ColorTempDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void ColorTempDlg_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = _camObject.CurrentColorTemperature;
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.WBColorTemp = (ushort)ColorTempSlider.Value;
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void ColorTempUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void ColorTempDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void TbxColorTempValue_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
	}

	private void TbxColorTempValue_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
	}

	private void ColorTempSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = Math.Floor((ColorTempSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10.0;
	}
}

namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class Defines
{

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}

	public event PropertyChangedEventHandler DisplayChanged;

	public MainWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
		win32handle = new WindowWrapper(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle);
		App.ArgsReceived += delegate(string[] args)
		{
			Activate();
			DecodeCommandLineOption(args);
		};
		if (App.CmdLineArgs.Length != 0)
		{
			DecodeCommandLineOption(App.CmdLineArgs);
		}
		_ocFocalLength = new ObservableCollection<string>();
		_ocFocalLength.Add("0mm");
		_ocFocalLength.Add("10mm");
		FocalLengthCbx.Items.Clear();
		FocalLengthCbx.DataContext = _ocFocalLength;
	}

	private void DecodeCommandLineOption(string[] args)
	{
		if (!args[0].StartsWith("/") && !args[0].StartsWith("-"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (args[0].Substring(1, 2).ToLower() == "lr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = true;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = true;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "nolr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = false;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = false;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "exit")
			{
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					DisconnectDevice();
				}
				Close();
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}

	private void ConnectDevice(bool msgSw)
	{
		if (_mtpDevice == null)
		{
			int errno = 0;
			int num = 0;
			_mtpDevices.Clear();
			_camModelNames.Clear();
			PortableDeviceManagerClass portableDeviceManagerClass = new PortableDeviceManagerClass();
			uint pcPnPDeviceIDs = 1u;
			portableDeviceManagerClass.GetDevices(null, ref pcPnPDeviceIDs);
			if (pcPnPDeviceIDs != 0)
			{
				string[] array = new string[pcPnPDeviceIDs];
				portableDeviceManagerClass.GetDevices(array, ref pcPnPDeviceIDs);
				string[] array2 = array;
				foreach (string deviceId in array2)
				{
					string deviceModelName = string.Empty;
					try
					{
						if (MtpDevice.IsSupported(deviceId, ref deviceModelName, out errno))
						{
							_mtpDevices.Add(new MtpDevice(deviceId));
							_camModelNames.Add(deviceModelName);
						}
						if (num < errno)
						{
							num = errno;
						}
					}
					catch (Exception)
					{
					}
				}
			}
			switch (num)
			{
			case 0:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				if (msgSw)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCameraNotFound);
				}
				return;
			case 1:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotSupported);
				return;
			case 2:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotSupportedFwVer);
				return;
			}
			if (_mtpDevices.Count == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			for (int j = 0; j < _mtpDevices.Count; j++)
			{
				_mtpDevices[j].Model = _camModelNames[j];
			}
			_mtpDevice = _mtpDevices[0];
		}
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_mtpDevice.Connect();
			if (_mtpDevices.Count > 1)
			{
				_mtpDevices[1].Connect();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
			ushort connectResult = _mtpDevice.ConnectResult;
			if (connectResult == 40965)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMovieMode);
				MsgTbSv.ScrollToEnd();
			}
			else
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotConnected);
				MsgTbSv.ScrollToEnd();
			}
			return;
		}
		if (_saveFolder == null)
		{
			ShowSaveFolderSelectDlg();
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.saveFolder = SelectSubFolder(_saveFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber);
			try
			{
				_driveToSave = new DriveInfo(_saveFolder);
			}
			catch
			{
				_driveToSave = null;
				GetDiskFreeSpaceEx(_saveFolder, out freeBytesAvailable, out totalNumberOfBytes, out totalNumberOfFreeBytes);
			}
		}
		_mtpCamLVChanged = LiveViewFrameRefreshed;
		_mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified = TransferringFileNameNotified;
		_mtpCamPostViewChanged = PostViewRefreshed;
		_mtpCamLargePostViewChanged = LargePostViewRefreshed;
		_mtpCamFileTransferred = FileTransferred;
		_mtpCamConditionChanged = CamConditionChanged;
		_mtpCamParameterListChanged = CamParamListChanged;
		_mtpDestinationFolderChanged = DestinationFolderChanged;
		_mtpCameraSettingFailed = CameraSettingFailed;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamLVChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamPostViewChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamLargePostViewChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamFileTransferred;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamConditionChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamParameterListChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpDestinationFolderChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCameraSettingFailed;
		_mtpDevice.TimerInitialize();
		IsConnected = true;
		ConnectStateImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		ConnectBtn.IsChecked = true;
		System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
		toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnDisconnect;
		ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
		ModelNameLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.Model;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			LiveViewBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GreenBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			DriveModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LSWBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			WBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			CIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LSCIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsProgModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ChangeMainWindowState(0);
			ResizeBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		else
		{
			LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
			{
				ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.ExpBracketStepCbxItems;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketStepCurrentIndex;
			}
			else
			{
				ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
			{
				IndependentMirrorUp = true;
				Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				Lvz12xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUp.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItem_Flat.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				FmtCbi_TIFF.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			else
			{
				IndependentMirrorUp = false;
				if (_mtpDevice.IsCISatobiSupported)
				{
					CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsPcLvHighResolutionSupported)
				{
					WinCntxItemExpand.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					WinCntxItemExpand.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					ChangeMainWindowState(0);
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
				{
					Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else
				{
					Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				Lvz12xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_MUp.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP"))
				{
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else
				{
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsSelfTimerContinuousNewSupported)
				{
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				CICbxItem_Flat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (_mtpDevice.Model == "PENTAX K-3")
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1"))
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				FmtCbi_TIFF.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			}
			CIModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			WBModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (!_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z") && _mtpDevice.Model != "PENTAX K-3")
			{
				WBCbxItemFlash.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			}
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			_expStepFlg = _mtpDevice.IsExposureStepHalf;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		SerialNoLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.SerialNumber;
		ShutterSpeedCbx.Items.Clear();
		ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.TvCbxItems;
		ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex;
		ApertureCbx.Items.Clear();
		ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.AvCbxItems;
		ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex;
		SensitivityCbx.Items.Clear();
		SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.SvCbxItems;
		SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex;
		ExpCmpCbx.Items.Clear();
		ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.XvCbxItems;
		ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			ZoomSlider.Maximum = _mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems.Count - 1;
			_ocFocalLength.Clear();
			_ocFocalLength = new ObservableCollection<string>(_mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems);
			FocalLengthCbx.ItemsSource = _ocFocalLength;
			FocalLengthCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FLCurrentIdx;
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = true;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked = true;
			LsProgModeImg.Source = LsProgModeImages[_mtpDevice.ProgMode];
			ImageSizeCbiSetting(1);
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.SD1State == 0)
		{
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				SD1WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = false;
			}
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.SD2State == 0)
		{
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = false;
		}
		_mtpDevice.IsRawSaving = RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.IsJpgSaving = JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.IsTifSaving = TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.SDWritingMode = (SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value ? 1 : 0) + (SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value ? 2 : 0);
		_mtpDevice.TouchAFSwitch = TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex > 0;
		_mtpDevice.IsReleaseWithAF = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf;
		_mtpDevice.LvZoomMag = byte.Parse(((ComboBoxItem)LvZoomMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem).Content.ToString().TrimEnd('x'));
		_mtpDevice.Dcu5Path = _pathOfDcu5;
		_mtpDevice.Dcu5LinkSw = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
		_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = _cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin;
		_mtpDevice.IsShowLargePostView = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		if (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D")
		{
			SD1Img.Source = SD1Images[_mtpDevice.SD1State];
			SD2Img.Source = SD2Images[_mtpDevice.SD2State];
			SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		else
		{
			SD1Img.Source = SD1ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd1CardState];
			if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
			{
				InMemoryLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			else
			{
				SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot)
			{
				SD2Img.Source = SD2ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd2CardState];
				SD2WritingModeChk.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			else
			{
				SD2Img.Source = null;
				SD2WritingModeChk.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsApertureKeepSupported && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn)
			{
				ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsColorTempSettingSupported)
			{
				WBColorTempBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsCIDetailParameterSupported)
			{
				CIDetailsBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GreenBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			AFBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = true;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			LvZoomMagnificationCbx.IsEnabled = true;
			FocusFineTunePanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCamConnected);
		CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
		_mtpDevice.IsDotNet451Later = _isDotNet451Later;
		_mtpDevice.IsOuterViewer = _existOuterViewer;
		_mtpDevice.OuterViewerPath = _outerViewerPath;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			PcLiveViewStart();
		}
	}

	private void ConnectBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			ConnectDevice(msgSw: true);
			if (!IsConnected)
			{
				ConnectBtn.IsChecked = false;
				System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
				toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnConnect;
				try
				{
					ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
				}
				catch (Exception)
				{
				}
			}
		}
		else
		{
			DisconnectDevice();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCamDisconnected);
		}
	}

	private void DisconnectDevice()
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			IsConnected = false;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCameraSettingFailed;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpDestinationFolderChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamParameterListChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamConditionChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamFileTransferred;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamPostViewChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamLVChanged;
			_mtpCamParameterListChanged = null;
			_mtpCamConditionChanged = null;
			_mtpCamFileTransferred = null;
			_mtpCamPostViewChanged = null;
			_mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified = null;
			_mtpCamLVChanged = null;
			_mtpDevice.Disconnect();
			_mtpDevice = null;
			LastExposureMode = -1;
			LastProgramMode = -1;
			LastDriveMode = -1;
			LastDriveModeNew = -1;
			LastMirrorUpMode = false;
			LastAFMode = -1;
			LastWBMode = -1;
			LastCIMode = -1;
			LastBatteryLevel = -1;
			LastLvAfMode = -1;
			IndependentMirrorUp = false;
			IsOperationInhibited = false;
			LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag = false;
			ConnectStateImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ConnectBtn.IsChecked = false;
			System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
			toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnConnect;
			ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
			ModelNameLbl.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.Model_NoConnect;
			SerialNoLbl.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.Serial_NoConnect;
			BatteryLevelImg.Source = null;
			GPSStatusImg.Source = null;
			GPSStatusImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			TempWarningImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpModeImg.Source = null;
			LsProgModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsUserMovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UserModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			HyperModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShiftModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			AdvHypLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			AFModeImg.Source = null;
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBCbxItemFlash.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CIModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ISOAutoLbl.Content = "";
			SD1Img.Source = SD1Images[0];
			SD2Img.Source = SD2Images[0];
			SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1FmtImg.Source = null;
			SD2FmtImg.Source = null;
			SD1SizeImg.Source = null;
			SD2SizeImg.Source = null;
			SD1StarImg.Source = null;
			SD2StarImg.Source = null;
			SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1RemainLbl.Content = "";
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2RemainLbl.Content = "";
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = true;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = true;
			ImageSizeCbiSetting(0);
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			PostViewImg.Source = null;
			PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			ApertureKeepBtnImg.Source = ApertureKeepImages[0];
			WBColorTempBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CIDetailsBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableXv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsUnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ResizeBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GreenBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			AFBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = false;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			LvZoomMagnificationCbx.IsEnabled = false;
			FocusFineTunePanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			LiveViewBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GbxMovieTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GreenBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			DriveModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LSWBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LSCIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileNameInTransfer.Content = "";
			FileTransferringImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LblMovieFileFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LastMovieModeFlag = false;
			MoviePixSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MovieFrameRateCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			LblRAWPlusFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			StillShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
	}

	private void ImageSaveSettingCheck()
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
			{
				flag5 = true;
			}
			else
			{
				flag6 = true;
			}
		}
		if (SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value)
		{
			if ((_mtpDevice.Model != "645D" && _mtpDevice.Sd1CardState == 4) || (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D" && _mtpDevice.SD1State > 0))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
				{
					flag = true;
				}
				else
				{
					flag2 = true;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				flag2 = true;
			}
		}
		else if (!_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
		{
			flag2 = true;
		}
		else if (RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD1Format > 0 && _mtpDevice.SD1Format < 5)
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		else if (JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && (_mtpDevice.SD1Format == 0 || _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 3 || _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 4))
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		else if (TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 5)
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		if (SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value)
		{
			if ((_mtpDevice.Model != "645D" && _mtpDevice.Sd2CardState == 4) || (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D" && _mtpDevice.SD2State > 0))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
				{
					flag3 = true;
				}
				else
				{
					flag4 = true;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				flag4 = true;
			}
		}
		else if (!_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot || !_mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
		{
			flag4 = true;
		}
		else if (RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD2Format > 0 && _mtpDevice.SD2Format < 5)
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		else if (JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && (_mtpDevice.SD2Format == 0 || _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 3 || _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 4))
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		else if (TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 5)
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		if (!(flag || flag3 || flag5))
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamMessageFlag = true;
			if (!_imageSaveWarningShowed)
			{
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = true;
				System.Windows.MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxNoImageSaving, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation);
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = false;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamMessageFlag = false;
			if (_imageSaveWarningShowed)
			{
				MessageBoxEx.Close("IMAGE Transmitter 2");
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = false;
			}
		}
	}

	private void MainWindow01_Closing(object sender, CancelEventArgs e)
	{
		DisplayChanged -= _bulbTimerTicked;
		_bulbTimerTicked = null;
		UnregisterUsbDeviceNotification();
		foreach (MtpDevice mtpDevice in _mtpDevices)
		{
			mtpDevice.Disconnect();
		}
		Settings.Default.IsRAWSaving = RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsJPEGSaving = JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsTIFFSaving = TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsReleaseWithAF = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf;
		Settings.Default.IsSD1Writing = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsSD2Writing = SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.TouchAFMode = (byte)TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex;
		Settings.Default.SaveFolder = _saveFolder;
		Settings.Default.FolderSaved = true;
		Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left = base.Left;
		Settings.Default.MainWindow_Top = base.Top;
		Settings.Default.ViewImgByDCU5 = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
		Settings.Default.IsDispLVGrid = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.LVGridSpace = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.TypeOfLVGrid = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.LVGridScaleInterval = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.IsShowPostViewWindow = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		Settings.Default.LVGridColorIndex = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex;
		Settings.Default.IsUseBulbTimer = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsUseBulbTimer;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Left = PVWindow.Left;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Top = PVWindow.Top;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Width = PVWindow.Width;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Height = PVWindow.Height;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_WindowState = PVWindow.WindowState;
		Settings.Default.MainWindowState = _mainWindowState;
		Settings.Default.IsAutoSubFolder = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder;
		Settings.Default.RuleOfSubFolder = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder;
		Settings.Default.SubFolderBaseName = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName;
		Settings.Default.SubFolderDigits = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber;
		Settings.Default.ShowApertureFixBtn = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn;
		Settings.Default.Save();
		PVWindow.isShutdownRequest = true;
		PVWindow.Close();
	}

	private void PcLiveViewStart()
	{
		LiveViewImg.Source = null;
		PostViewImg.Source = null;
		try
		{
			_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = true;
		}
		catch
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			throw new Exception();
		}
		if (!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
		{
			return;
		}
		PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("RICOH G900SE"))
		{
			LS_Setting.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LVSpecialFunctionTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvSettingTi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LvControlTab.SelectedIndex = 3;
		}
		else
		{
			LS_Setting.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LVSpecialFunctionTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvSettingTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvControlTab.SelectedIndex = 0;
		}
		LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		RotateLvPanel(sw: false);
		AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
		Point liveViewAFPosition = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition;
		if (LVCanvas.Width < (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth)
		{
			_lvSizeRatio = LVCanvas.Width / (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth;
			liveViewAFPosition.X = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.X * _lvSizeRatio;
			liveViewAFPosition.Y = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.Y * _lvSizeRatio;
		}
		else
		{
			_lvSizeRatio = 1.0;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
		{
			liveViewAFPosition.Offset(41.0, 1.0);
		}
		else if (_mtpDevice.IsCompositionAdjSupported)
		{
			CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CompositionCtrlChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjState > 0;
			if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjState == 1)
			{
				_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustmentSw = true;
			}
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjX))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustX.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjX).ToString();
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjY))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustY.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjY).ToString();
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjR))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustR.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjR).ToString();
		}
		Canvas.SetLeft(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.X - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		Canvas.SetTop(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.Y - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		AFAreaBdr.Width = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio;
		AFAreaBdr.Height = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio;
		AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
		{
			createLVGrid();
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.IsEnabled = false;
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FocusPeakingMode;
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.IsEnabled = true;
	}

	private void LiveViewBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			if (!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
			{
				try
				{
					PcLiveViewStart();
				}
				catch
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxLvNotStarted);
					return;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				try
				{
					_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				catch
				{
					LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = true;
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxLvNotStopped);
					return;
				}
				LiveViewImg.Source = null;
				PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				RotateLvPanel(sw: true);
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
				_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = false;
			}
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode;
		}
		else
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewFrameRefreshed(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new LiveViewFrameRefreshDelegate(LiveViewRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void LiveViewRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LiveViewBtn.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
		{
			if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == false)
			{
				return;
			}
		}
		else if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "LiveViewRefreshed")
		{
			try
			{
				jpgLv = new JpegBitmapDecoder(_mtpDevice.MemStreamLVFrame, BitmapCreateOptions.PreservePixelFormat, BitmapCacheOption.OnLoad);
				LiveViewImg.Source = jpgLv.Frames[0];
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
			}
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "LiveViewRotated")
		{
			RotateLvPanel(sw: false);
