namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class OptionWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private BindingExpression textGridSpaceBe;

	private BindingExpression textScaleIntBe;

	private BindingExpression textNumOfDigitsBe;

	public OptionWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void OptionOkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting = (AppOptions)base.DataContext;
		if (LVGridNormalRbn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		}
		else if (LVGridGoldenSectionRbn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 1;
		}
		else
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 2;
		}
		if (rbtSession.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder = 1;
		}
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void OptionWindow1_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DataContext = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.Copy();
		textGridSpaceBe = TbxLVGridSpace.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		textScaleIntBe = TbxLVScaleInterval.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		textNumOfDigitsBe = TbxNumOfDigits.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		switch (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid)
		{
		case 0:
			LVGridNormalRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		case 1:
			LVGridGoldenSectionRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		case 2:
			LVGridScaleRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		}
		if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder == 0)
		{
			rbtSession.IsChecked = true;
		}
		else
		{
			rbtDate.IsChecked = true;
		}
	}

	private void OptionCancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void GridSpaceUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).SpaceOfLVGrid++;
		textGridSpaceBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void GridSpaceDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).SpaceOfLVGrid--;
		textGridSpaceBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void ScaleIntervalUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid++;
		textScaleIntBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void ScaleIntervalDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid--;
		textScaleIntBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void TbxNumOfDigits_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key == Key.Return)
		{
			if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
			{
				((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
			}
			if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
			{
				((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
			}
			textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
		}
	}

	private void TbxNumOfDigits_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
		}
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void NumOfDigitsUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber++;
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void NumOfDigitsDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber--;
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}
}
using System;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Controls.Primitives;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Interop;
using System.Windows.Markup;
using System.Windows.Media;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class PostViewWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	public double ZoomMagnification;

	private byte _rotateParam = 1;

	private bool _portraitDir;

	private RotateTransform LargePostViewImageRotation = new RotateTransform(0.0, 0.5, 0.5);

	public bool isShutdownRequest;

	private bool _isFirstPressed;

	private bool _isFirstClicked;

	private bool _isDragging;

	private double _dragStartX;

	private double _dragStartY;

	private bool _centeringOnClickPoint;

	private double _newOffsetX;

	private double _newOffsetY;

	private double _mag;

	private bool _isCbxTextReplacing;

	public byte Rotation
	{
		set
		{
			_rotateParam = value;
			RotateLargePostView(value);
		}
	}

	public PostViewWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void RotateLargePostView(byte rotate)
	{
		switch (rotate)
		{
		case 1:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			_portraitDir = false;
			break;
		case 3:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			_portraitDir = true;
			break;
		case 2:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			_portraitDir = false;
			break;
		case 4:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 270.0;
			_portraitDir = true;
			break;
		}
		if (FitButton.IsChecked == true)
		{
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void PostViewWindow1_Closing(object sender, CancelEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!isShutdownRequest)
		{
			Hide();
			base.Owner.Activate();
			e.Cancel = true;
		}
	}

	private void PostViewWindow1_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		LargePostViewImage.LayoutTransform = LargePostViewImageRotation;
		FitButton.IsChecked = true;
		HwndSource.FromHwnd(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle).AddHook(WndProc);
		ImageMagnificationCbx.AddHandler(TextBoxBase.TextChanged, new TextChangedEventHandler(ImageMagnificationCbx_TextChanged));
	}

	private void FitButton_Checked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source != null)
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Disabled;
			LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Disabled;
			LargePostViewImage.Width = LPVScrollViewer.Width;
			LargePostViewImage.Height = LPVScrollViewer.Height;
			ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
			ActualButton.IsEnabled = true;
			FitButton.IsEnabled = false;
			LargePostViewImage.Cursor = null;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void ActualButton_Checked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source == null)
		{
			ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
		LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
		LargePostViewImage.Width = LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
		LargePostViewImage.Height = LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
		if (_centeringOnClickPoint)
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset(_newOffsetX);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset(_newOffsetY);
			_centeringOnClickPoint = false;
		}
		else
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Source.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Source.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
		}
		FitButton.IsChecked = false;
		FitButton.IsEnabled = true;
		ActualButton.IsEnabled = false;
		LargePostViewImage.Cursor = Cursors.Hand;
		_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
		ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem = ActualSizeCbi;
		_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
		_mag = 1.0;
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!_isFirstPressed)
		{
			_isFirstPressed = true;
		}
		if (FitButton.IsChecked != true)
		{
			Point position = e.GetPosition(LPVScrollViewer);
			_dragStartX = position.X;
			_dragStartY = position.Y;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_isFirstClicked)
		{
			_isFirstClicked = false;
		}
		if (_isFirstPressed)
		{
			_isFirstPressed = false;
			_isDragging = true;
		}
		if (_isDragging)
		{
			Point position = e.GetPosition(LPVScrollViewer);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset(LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalOffset - position.X + _dragStartX);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset(LPVScrollViewer.VerticalOffset - position.Y + _dragStartY);
			_dragStartX = position.X;
			_dragStartY = position.Y;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_isFirstPressed)
		{
			if (_isFirstClicked)
			{
				if (ActualButton.IsChecked == true)
				{
					FitButton.IsChecked = true;
				}
				else
				{
					Point position = e.GetPosition(LargePostViewImage);
					_centeringOnClickPoint = true;
					switch (_rotateParam)
					{
					case 1:
						_newOffsetX = position.X * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = position.Y * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 3:
						_newOffsetX = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - position.Y) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = position.X * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 2:
						_newOffsetX = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - position.X) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - position.Y) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 4:
						_newOffsetX = position.Y * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - position.X) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					}
					ActualButton.IsChecked = true;
				}
				_isFirstClicked = false;
			}
			else
			{
				_isFirstClicked = true;
			}
			_isFirstPressed = false;
		}
		else if (_isDragging)
		{
			_isDragging = false;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
	{
		_isDragging = false;
		_isFirstClicked = false;
		_isFirstPressed = false;
	}

	private void RecalcFittingMagnification()
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source != null && FitButton.IsChecked != false)
		{
			double num;
			double num2;
			if (_portraitDir)
			{
				num = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
				num2 = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
			}
			else
			{
				num = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
				num2 = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
			}
			double mag = ((num < num2) ? num : num2);
			_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = mag.ToString("#.##%");
			_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
			_mag = mag;
		}
	}

	private IntPtr WndProc(IntPtr hwnd, int msg, IntPtr wParam, IntPtr lParam, ref bool handled)
	{
		if (msg == 5 && wParam.ToInt32() == 0)
		{
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
		return IntPtr.Zero;
	}

	private void ImageMagnificationCbx_TextChanged(object sender, TextChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!_isCbxTextReplacing)
		{
			RecalcFreeMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void ImageMagnificationCbx_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key == Key.Return)
		{
			RecalcFreeMagnification();
			_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
		}
		else
		{
			_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
		}
	}

	private void RecalcFreeMagnification()
	{
		double result;
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source == null)
		{
			if (_mag == 0.0)
			{
				ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = "Fit";
			}
			else
			{
				ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
			}
		}
		else if (double.TryParse(ImageMagnificationCbx.Text.TrimEnd('%'), NumberStyles.AllowDecimalPoint, CultureInfo.CreateSpecificCulture("en-US"), out result))
		{
			_mag = result / 100.0;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
			LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
			LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
			LargePostViewImage.Width = LargePostViewImage.Source.Width * _mag;
			LargePostViewImage.Height = LargePostViewImage.Source.Height * _mag;
			if (_rotateParam < 3)
			{
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
			}
			else
			{
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
			}
			if (ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem == ActualSizeCbi)
			{
				ActualButton.IsEnabled = false;
				ActualButton.IsChecked = true;
			}
			else
			{
				ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
				ActualButton.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			FitButton.IsChecked = false;
			FitButton.IsEnabled = true;
			LargePostViewImage.Cursor = Cursors.Hand;
		}
		else
		{
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
		}
	}
}

	{

		VersionLbl.Content = "Version " + version.ToString(3);
		AssemblyCopyrightAttribute assemblyCopyrightAttribute = (AssemblyCopyrightAttribute)Attribute.GetCustomAttribute(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly(), typeof(AssemblyCopyrightAttribute));

		CameraVersionLbl.Content = FirmwareVersion;
	}

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_DEVICE_POWER_SOURCE;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_DEVICE_MANUFACTURER;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_DEVICE_DATETIME;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_DEVICE_FRIENDLY_NAME;

	static WpdPKeys()
	{
		WPD_CATEGORY_MTP_EXT_VENDOR_OPERATIONS = new Guid("4D545058-1A2E-4106-A357-771E0819FC56");
		WPD_PROPERTIES_MTP_VENDOR_EXTENDED_DEVICE_PROPS = new Guid("4D545058-8900-40B3-8F1D-DC246E1E8370");
		WPD_PROPERTIES_MTP_VENDOR_EXTENDED_OBJECT_PROPS = new Guid("4D545058-4FCE-4578-95C8-8698A9BC0F49");
		WPD_EVENT_MTP_VENDOR_EXTENDED_EVENTS = new Guid("00000000-5738-4FF2-8445-BE3126691059");
		WPD_PROPERTY_NULL = new _tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"),
			pid = 0u
		};
		WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY = new _tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("F0422A9C-5DC8-4440-B5BD-5DF28835658A"),
			pid = 1001u
		};
		WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID = new _tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("F0422A9C-5DC8-4440-B5BD-5DF28835658A"),
			pid = 1002u
		};
		WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT = new _tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("F0422A9C-5DC8-4440-B5BD-5DF28835658A"),
			pid = 1003u
		};
		WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_GET_SUPPORTED_VENDOR_OPCODES = new _tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("4D545058-1A2E-4106-A357-771E0819FC56"),
			pid = 11u
		};

using System;
using System.IO;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class WrappedStream : Stream
{
	private Stream _streamBase;

	private string _streamName;

	public override long Position
	{
		get
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			return _streamBase.Position;
		}
		set
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			_streamBase.Position = value;
		}
	}

	public override long Length
	{
		get
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			return _streamBase.Length;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanWrite
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanWrite;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanRead
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanRead;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanSeek
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanSeek;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	protected Stream StreamWrapper => _streamBase;

	public WrappedStream(MemoryStream streamBase, string name)
	{
		if (streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("streamBase");
		}
		_streamBase = streamBase;
		_streamName = name;
	}

	public WrappedStream(FileStream streamBase)
	{
		if (streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("streamBase");
		}
		_streamBase = new MemoryStream();
		streamBase.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
		streamBase.CopyTo(_streamBase);
		_streamBase.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
	}

	public override void Write(byte[] buffer, int offset, int count)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.Write(buffer, offset, count);
	}

	public override int Read(byte[] buffer, int offset, int count)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		return _streamBase.Read(buffer, offset, count);
	}

	public override void SetLength(long value)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.SetLength(value);
	}

	public override long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		return _streamBase.Seek(offset, origin);
	}

	public override void Flush()
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.Flush();
	}

	protected override void Dispose(bool disposing)
	{
		if (disposing)
		{
			_streamBase = null;
		}
		base.Dispose(disposing);
	}

	private void ThrowIfDisposed()
	{
		if (_streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ObjectDisposedException(GetType().Name);
		}
	}
}
namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class ApertureResetMode
{
	public const uint Reset = 0u;

	public const uint NoReset = 1u;
}
using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private bool _optionAutoSubFolder;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionIsLinkDCU5 = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsDispLVGrid
	{
		get

			return _optionDispLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionDispLVGrid = value;
		}

	public int TypeOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionTypeOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionTypeOfLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int SpaceOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public int ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsShowPostViewWindow
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowPostViewWindow;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowPostViewWindow = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsReleaseWithAf
	{
		get
		{

		}

		{

		}

	public bool IsUseBulbTimer
	{

			_optionUseBulbTimer = value;
		}

	public int LVGridColorIndex

	public byte RawFileFormat

		get

		}
		set
		{
			_optionRawFileFormat = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsAutoCreateSubFolder

		get
		{

		set
		{

		}
	}

	{

	{

	public bool ShowApertureFixBtn
	{

		{
			return _optionShowApertureFixBtn;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowApertureFixBtn = value;
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}
}

using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;

	private void UserFilterBGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}

	{

	}

internal static class ExpMode
{
	public const uint P = 0u;

	public const uint AUTOPICT = 1u;

	public const uint HyP = 2u;

	public const uint Green = 3u;

	public const uint Tv = 4u;

	public const uint Av = 5u;

	public const uint HypTv = 6u;

	public const uint HypAv = 7u;

	public const uint M_Lens = 11u;

	public const uint B_Lens = 12u;

	public const uint TAv = 13u;

	public const uint TAv_Lens = 14u;

	public const uint Sv = 15u;

	public const uint X = 16u;

	public const uint X_Lens = 17u;

	public const uint AdvHypTAv_Lens = 29u;

	public const uint AdvHypSv = 30u;

using System;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Interop;
using System.Windows.Media.Imaging;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}
namespace RemoteAssistant;

using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{

	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;

			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}

using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}
using System.Collections.Generic;

using System;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Interop;
using System.Windows.Media.Imaging;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}

using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private bool _optionAutoSubFolder;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionIsLinkDCU5 = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsDispLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionDispLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionDispLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int TypeOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionTypeOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionTypeOfLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int SpaceOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public int ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsShowPostViewWindow
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowPostViewWindow;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowPostViewWindow = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsReleaseWithAf
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionReleaseWithAfSw;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionReleaseWithAfSw = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsUseBulbTimer
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionUseBulbTimer;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionUseBulbTimer = value;
		}
	}

	public int LVGridColorIndex
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionLVGridColorIndex;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionLVGridColorIndex = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RawFileFormat
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionRawFileFormat;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionRawFileFormat = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsAutoCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionAutoSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionAutoSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RuleOfCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderRule;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderRule = value;
		}
	}

	public string SubFolderBaseName
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderBaseName;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderBaseName = value;
		}
	}

	public byte NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public bool ShowApertureFixBtn
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowApertureFixBtn;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowApertureFixBtn = value;
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}
}

using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}

public class CIModeLUT
{
	public static byte[] NominalToInternal = new byte[14]
	{
		255, 1, 0, 2, 3, 4, 12, 9, 6, 11,
		8, 7, 5, 10
	};

	public static Dictionary<uint, byte> InternalToNominal = new Dictionary<uint, byte>
	{
		{ 12u, 0 },
		{ 1u, 1 },
		{ 0u, 2 },
		{ 2u, 3 },
		{ 3u, 4 },
		{ 4u, 5 },
		{ 13u, 6 },
		{ 9u, 7 },
		{ 6u, 8 },
		{ 11u, 9 },
		{ 8u, 10 },
		{ 7u, 11 },
		{ 5u, 12 },
		{ 10u, 13 }
	};
}

namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class Defines
{
	public const uint PENTAX_VENDOR_ID = 13u;

	public const uint PENTAX_VENDOR_OFF = 0u;

	public const uint PENTAX_VENDOR_ON = 1u;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}

	public event PropertyChangedEventHandler DisplayChanged;

	public MainWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
		win32handle = new WindowWrapper(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle);
		App.ArgsReceived += delegate(string[] args)
		{
			Activate();
			DecodeCommandLineOption(args);
		};
		if (App.CmdLineArgs.Length != 0)
		{
			DecodeCommandLineOption(App.CmdLineArgs);
		}
		_ocFocalLength = new ObservableCollection<string>();
		_ocFocalLength.Add("0mm");
		_ocFocalLength.Add("10mm");
		FocalLengthCbx.Items.Clear();
		FocalLengthCbx.DataContext = _ocFocalLength;
	}

	private void DecodeCommandLineOption(string[] args)
	{
		if (!args[0].StartsWith("/") && !args[0].StartsWith("-"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (args[0].Substring(1, 2).ToLower() == "lr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = true;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = true;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "nolr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = false;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = false;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "exit")
			{
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					DisconnectDevice();
				}
				Close();
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}
