			_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = value;
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int CardSlotSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (IsMovieMode)
			{
				MtpGetDevicePropValue(53275, out _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
				return _camPropWritingFileFormat[9] - 1;
			}
			return _camCardSlotSetting - 1;
		}
		set
		{
			_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = (byte)(value + 1);
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int CurrentWritingSlot
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_isSlotChangeSupported)
			{
				return -1;
			}
			return _currentWritingSlot - 1;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_isSlotChangeSupported)
			{
				_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[10] = (byte)(value + 1);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public int MovieCardSlotSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_isDualSlot)
			{
				return _camMovieCardSlotSetting;
			}
			return 0;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_isDualSlot)
			{
				_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[10];
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = (byte)(value + 1);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
				_ = 8193;
			}
		}
	}

	protected bool VendorMode
	{
		get
		{
			return _camVendorMode;
		}
		set
		{
			bool flag = value;
			if (_camModelNo == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			uint funcAvailFlag;
			ushort resCode;
			if (flag)
			{
				if (_camVendorMode)
				{
					return;
				}
				MtpSetPentaxVendorMode(_camModelNo, 1u, _camVdrExtVer, out funcAvailFlag, out resCode);
				_IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea = (((funcAvailFlag & (true ? 1u : 0u)) != 0) ? true : false);
				_IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom = (((funcAvailFlag & 2u) != 0) ? true : false);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					ConnectResult = resCode;
					throw new Exception();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (!_camVendorMode)
				{
					return;
				}
				MtpSetPentaxVendorMode(_camModelNo, 0u, _camVdrExtVer, out funcAvailFlag, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					ConnectResult = resCode;
					_camVendorMode = false;
					throw new Exception();
				}
			}
			_camVendorMode = flag;
		}
	}

	public bool IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea => _IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea;

	public bool IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom => _IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom;

	public bool PcLiveViewMode
	{
		get
		{
			return _camPcLiveViewMode;
		}
		set
		{
			bool flag = value;
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return;
			}
			ushort resCode;
			byte[] devPropValue;
			if (flag)
			{
				devPropValue = new byte[20];
				MtpGetDevicePropValue(53257, out devPropValue, out resCode);
				_lvAreaWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
				_lvAreaHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
				_lvActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 8);
				_lvActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 10);
				_contrastAfActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 12);
				_contrastAfActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 14);
				_contrastAfSpotWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 16);
				_contrastAfSpotHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 18);
				_cafActiveAreaOriginX = (ushort)((_lvAreaWidth - _contrastAfActiveWidth) / 2);
				_cafActiveAreaOriginY = (ushort)((_lvAreaHeight - _contrastAfActiveHeight) / 2);
				_cafActiveAreaLimitX = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginX + _contrastAfActiveWidth);
				_cafActiveAreaLimitY = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginY + _contrastAfActiveHeight);
				devPropValue = new byte[1] { 1 };
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53301, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
					{
						this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("LvStartFailed"));
					}
					_camPcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				else
				{
					_camPcLiveViewMode = true;
					LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: true);
				}
				return;
			}
			devPropValue = new byte[1] { 0 };
			LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: false);
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53301, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 40965 && resCode != 8193)
			{
				LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: true);
				if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
				{
					this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("LvStopFailed"));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				_camPcLiveViewMode = false;
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamLVFrame
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemLVFrame.EnterReadLock();
				return _memLVFrame;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemLVFrame.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamPostView
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemTransPostView.EnterReadLock();
				return _memPostView;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemTransPostView.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamLargePostView
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterReadLock();
				return _memLargePostView;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
		set
		{
			if (value == null)
			{
				_memLargePostView.Dispose();
				_memLargePostView = null;
			}
		}
	}

			_saveFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public short[] CIUserFilterEffect
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return null;
			}
			short[] array = new short[3];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53293, out var devPropValue, out var _);
			array[0] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x10) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[5]) : devPropValue[5]);
			array[1] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x20) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[6]) : devPropValue[6]);
			array[2] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x40) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[7]) : devPropValue[7]);
			return array;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8]
				{
					4,
					0,
					0,
					0,
					(byte)(((value[0] < 0) ? 16u : 0u) | ((value[1] < 0) ? 32u : 0u) | ((value[2] < 0) ? 64u : 0u)),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[0]),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[1]),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[2])
				};
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53293, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public byte CICrossProcessType
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53292, out var devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue[0] > 32)
			{
				return (byte)(devPropValue[0] - 32 + 3);
			}
			return (byte)(devPropValue[0] - 1);
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
				if (value > 3)
				{
					devPropValue[0] = (byte)(value - 3 + 32);
				}
				else
				{
					devPropValue[0] = (byte)(value + 1);
				}
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53292, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}

	public System.Windows.Point LiveViewAFPosition
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53302, out devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue.Length == 4)
			{
				_LVAFPointX = (ushort)(_lvAreaWidth / 2);
				_LVAFPointY = (ushort)(_lvAreaHeight / 2);
			}
			else
			{
				_LVAFPointX = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
				_LVAFPointY = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
			}
			return new System.Windows.Point((int)_LVAFPointX, (int)_LVAFPointY);
		}
		set
		{
			_LVAFPointX = (ushort)value.X;
			_LVAFPointY = (ushort)value.Y;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8]
			{
				2,
				0,
				0,
				0,
				(byte)(_LVAFPointX & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointX & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				(byte)(_LVAFPointY & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointY & 0xFF00) >> 8)
			};
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53302, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			_ = _AFMode;
		}
	}

	public bool SD1WritingMode
	{
		get
		{
			if (_sd1WritingMode <= 0)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		set
		{
			_sd1WritingMode = (value ? 1 : 0);
			SDWritingMode = _sd2WritingMode + _sd1WritingMode;
		}
	}

	public bool SD2WritingMode
	{
		get
		{
			if (_sd2WritingMode <= 0)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		set
		{
			_sd2WritingMode = (value ? 2 : 0);
			SDWritingMode = _sd2WritingMode + _sd1WritingMode;
		}
	}

	public int SDWritingMode
	{
		set
		{
			MtpSetCardWritingMode((uint)value, out var resCode);
			if (resCode == 8193)
			{
				_sd1WritingMode = value & 1;
				_sd2WritingMode = value & 2;
				_lastSd1WritingMode = _sd1WritingMode;
				_lastSd2WritingMode = _sd2WritingMode;
				SdWritingModeChanged = true;
			}
			else
			{
				_sd1WritingMode = _lastSd1WritingMode;
				_sd2WritingMode = _lastSd2WritingMode;
				if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
				{
					this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("CardWriteModeFailed"));
				}
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsLVZoom
	{
		get
		{
			return _isLvZoom;
		}
		set
		{
			_isLvZoom = value;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[12]
			{
				4,
				0,
				0,
				0,
				(byte)(_LVAFPointX & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointX & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				(byte)(_LVAFPointY & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointY & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				0,
				0,
				0,
				0
			};
			if (_isLvZoom)
			{
				devPropValue[8] = _lvZoomMag;
			}
			else
			{
				devPropValue[8] = 1;
			}
			devPropValue[9] = 0;
			devPropValue[10] = 0;
			devPropValue[11] = 0;
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53303, ref devPropValue, out var resCode);
			if (_lvZoomMag == 16 && resCode == 8220)
			{
				devPropValue[8] = 10;
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53303, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
			}
			if (!_isLvZoom)
			{
				Thread.Sleep(100);
			}
		}
	}

	public byte LvZoomMag
	{
		get
		{
			return _lvZoomMag;
		}
		set
		{
			_lvZoomMag = value;
			if (_isLvZoom)
			{
				IsLVZoom = true;
			}
		}
	}

	public byte FocusPeakingMode
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53291, out devPropValue, out var resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			_lvFocusPeaking = devPropValue[0];
			return _lvFocusPeaking;
		}
		set
		{
			_lvFocusPeaking = value;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1] { _lvFocusPeaking };
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53291, ref devPropValue, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int FocusFineTune
	{
		set
		{
			int num = 0;
			ushort resCode;
			int num2;
			if (!_isNewFocusFineControl)
			{
				num2 = value * 5;
				if (value > 0)
				{
					MtpFocusControl((uint)num2, 0u, out resCode);
				}
				else
				{
					MtpFocusControl((uint)Math.Abs(num2), 1u, out resCode);
				}
				return;
			}
			num2 = (int)((0.0 - (double)(float)_openAvNum * 2.5 / 3.0) * (double)value);
			MtpFocusControlNew(num2, out resCode);
			while (resCode == 40972)
			{
				num2 = (int)((double)num2 * Math.Sqrt(2.0));
				MtpFocusControlNew(num2, out resCode);
				num++;
				if (num == 10)
				{
					break;
				}
			}
		}
	}

	public bool CompositionAdjustmentSw
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53290, out devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue[0] == 1)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
		set
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			if (value)
			{
				devPropValue[0] = 1;
			}
			else
			{
				devPropValue[0] = 0;
			}
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53290, ref devPropValue, out var _);
		}
	}

	public bool IsAstroTracer3MainExp => _isAstro3MainExp;

		}

	public bool IsRequestShutdown
	{
		set
		{
			if (value)
			{
				_DisconnectRequested = value;
				MtpPentaxCameraShutdown(out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public bool CamMessageFlag
	{
		set
		{
			if (value)
			{
				_camMessageState = 1u;
			}
			else
			{
				_camMessageState = 0u;
			}
			MtpSetWarningMessageFlag(_camMessageState, out var _);
		}
	}

	public bool LrPlginLinkSw
	{
		get
		{
			return _LrPluginLinkSw;
		}
		set
		{
			if (value)
			{
				Process[] processesByName = Process.GetProcessesByName("tether_pentax");
				if (processesByName.Length == 0)
				{
					_LrPluginLinkSw = false;
					_LrPluginPath = "";
					return;
				}
				if (processesByName[0].MainModule.FileVersionInfo.FileMajorPart != 2)
				{
					_LrPluginLinkSw = false;
					_LrPluginPath = "";
					return;
				}
				_LrPluginPath = processesByName[0].MainModule.FileName;
			}
			_LrPluginLinkSw = value;
		}
	}

	public int LSFocusControl
	{
		set
		{
			ushort resCode;
			if (value > 0)
			{
				MtpFocusControl((uint)value, 0u, out resCode);
			}
			else
			{
				MtpFocusControl((uint)Math.Abs(value), 1u, out resCode);
			}
		}
	}

	public MtpDevice(string deviceId)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceId))
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("deviceId");
		}
		mtpDevice = new PortableDeviceClass();
		DeviceId = deviceId;
	}

	private void _camWritingFileFormatCopy()
	{
		if (!IsMovieMode && _isSlotChangeSupported)
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[11];
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 7;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[10] = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[10];
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 6;
		}
		if (Model == "PENTAX KP")
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = (byte)_camWritingFormatSetting;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = (byte)_camWritingFormatSetting;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = (byte)_imageSize;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = (byte)(2 - _jpegQuality);
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = RawKind;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 1;
		}
		else if (_isLS)
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 0;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 6;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 6;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 0;
		}
	}

	public void RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo()
	{
		if (_camVendorMode)
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[20];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53257, out devPropValue, out var _);
			_lvAreaWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
			_lvAreaHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
			_lvActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 8);
			_lvActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 10);
			_contrastAfActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 12);
			_contrastAfActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 14);
			_contrastAfSpotWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 16);
			_contrastAfSpotHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 18);
			_cafActiveAreaOriginX = (ushort)((_lvAreaWidth - _contrastAfActiveWidth) / 2);
			_cafActiveAreaOriginY = (ushort)((_lvAreaHeight - _contrastAfActiveHeight) / 2);
			_cafActiveAreaLimitX = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginX + _contrastAfActiveWidth);
			_cafActiveAreaLimitY = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginY + _contrastAfActiveHeight);
		}
	}

	protected void RefreshExpBracketStepList()
	{
		_ExpBracketStepList.Clear();
		_ExpBracketStepCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53269, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		byte item = devPropDesc[6];
		int num = 8;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			byte b = devPropDesc[num];
			num++;
			if (b != 0)
			{
				_ExpBracketStepList.Add(b);
				_ExpBracketStepCbxItems.Add(((double)(float)(int)b / 10.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
		}
		_EvBracketStepCurrentIndex = _ExpBracketStepList.IndexOf(item);
		RaiseParameterListChanged("ExpBracketListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshDriveModeList()
	{
		_driveModeList.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53267, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			int num = 8;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
			{
				byte item = devPropDesc[num];
				num++;
				_driveModeList.Add(item);
			}
		}
	}

	public void RefreshCamConditions()
	{
		MtpGetAllConditions(out var _);
	}

	private void RaiseParameterListChanged(string parameterName)
	{
		if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
		{
			this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(parameterName));
		}
	}

	private void ConvertFractionalTvValueToString(uint numerator, uint denominator, out string tvString)
	{
		if (denominator == 1)
		{
			tvString = numerator + "\"";
		}
		else if (numerator == 1)
		{
			tvString = "1/" + denominator;
		}
		else
		{
			tvString = ((float)numerator / (float)denominator).ToString("0.0") + "\"";
		}
	}

	protected void RefreshShutterSpeedList()
	{
		_TvList.Clear();
		_TvCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53263, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		ulong item = BitConverter.ToUInt64(devPropDesc, 13);
		int num = 22;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		uint num3 = 0u;
		uint num4 = 0u;
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			ulong item2 = BitConverter.ToUInt64(devPropDesc, num);
			num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num);
			num4 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num + 4);
			num += 8;
			if (num3 != 0)
			{
				_TvList.Add(item2);
				if (IsCamBulbTimer && IsTvChangeable)
				{
					TimeSpan timeSpan = new TimeSpan(0, 0, (int)num3);
					_TvCbxItems.Add(timeSpan.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan.ToString("ss\\\""));
				}
				else
				{
					ConvertFractionalTvValueToString(num3, num4, out var tvString);
					_TvCbxItems.Add(tvString);
				}
			}
		}
		if (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP") && IsElectronicShutter)
		{
			if (_exposureStep == 0)
			{
				string[] collection = new string[4] { "1/8000", "1/12000", "1/16000", "1/24000" };
				ulong[] collection2 = new ulong[4] { 34359738368001uL, 51539607552001uL, 68719476736001uL, 103079215104001uL };
				List<string> collection3 = new List<string>(collection);
				List<ulong> collection4 = new List<ulong>(collection2);
				_TvCbxItems.AddRange(collection3);
				_TvList.AddRange(collection4);
			}
			else
			{
				_TvList.Remove(6000uL);
				_TvCbxItems.Remove("1/6000");
				string[] collection5 = new string[7] { "1/6400", "1/8000", "1/10000", "1/12800", "1/16000", "1/20000", "1/24000" };
				ulong[] collection6 = new ulong[7] { 27487790694401uL, 34359738368001uL, 42949672960001uL, 54975581388801uL, 68719476736001uL, 85899345920001uL, 103079215104001uL };
				List<string> collection7 = new List<string>(collection5);
				List<ulong> collection8 = new List<ulong>(collection6);
				_TvCbxItems.AddRange(collection7);
				_TvList.AddRange(collection8);
			}
		}
		if (IsCamBulbTimer && IsTvChangeable)
		{
			TimeSpan timeSpan2 = new TimeSpan(0, 0, BitConverter.ToInt32(devPropDesc, 13));
			_TvCurrentIdx = _TvCbxItems.IndexOf(timeSpan2.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan2.ToString("ss\\\""));
		}
		else
		{
			_TvCurrentIdx = _TvList.IndexOf(item);
		}
		RaiseParameterListChanged("TvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshApertuerList()
	{
		_AvList.Clear();
		_AvCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20487, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		ushort item = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, 7);
		int num = 10;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			ushort num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			if (num3 != 0)
			{
				_AvList.Add(num3);
				_AvCbxItems.Add("F" + ((double)(float)(int)num3 / 100.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
		}
		_AvCurrentIdx = _AvList.IndexOf(item);
		RaiseParameterListChanged("AvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshSensitivityList()
	{
		_SvCbxItems.Clear();
		byte[] devPropDesc;
		ushort resCode;
		if (_IsOldSv)
		{
			MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20495, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
		}
		else
		{
			MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53278, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				_IsOldSv = true;
				MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20495, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
			}
		}
		if (_IsOldSv)
		{
			_SvList.Clear();
			ushort item = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, 7);
			int num = 10;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
			{
				ushort num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
				num += 2;
				if (num3 != 0)
				{
					_SvList.Add(num3);
					if (num3 == ushort.MaxValue)
					{
						_SvCbxItems.Add("AUTO");
					}
					else
					{
						_SvCbxItems.Add(num3.ToString());
					}
				}
			}
			_SvCurrentIdx = _SvList.IndexOf(item);
		}
		else
		{
			_SvListEx.Clear();
			uint item2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, 9);
			int num = 14;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int j = 0; j < num2; j++)
			{
				uint num4 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num);
				num += 4;
				_SvListEx.Add(num4);
				if (num4 == 0)
				{
					_SvCbxItems.Add("AUTO");
				}
				else
				{
					_SvCbxItems.Add(num4.ToString());
				}
			}
			if (Model == "PENTAX K-1 Mark II")
			{
				if (_sensitivityStep == 0)
				{
					string[] collection = new string[2] { "409600", "819200" };
					uint[] collection2 = new uint[2] { 409600u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection3 = new List<string>(collection);
					List<uint> collection4 = new List<uint>(collection2);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection3);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection4);
				}
				else if (_exposureStep == 0)
				{
					string[] collection5 = new string[4] { "288000", "409600", "576000", "819200" };
					uint[] collection6 = new uint[4] { 288000u, 409600u, 576000u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection7 = new List<string>(collection5);
					List<uint> collection8 = new List<uint>(collection6);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection7);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection8);
				}
				else
				{
					string[] collection9 = new string[6] { "256000", "320000", "409600", "512000", "640000", "819200" };
					uint[] collection10 = new uint[6] { 256000u, 320000u, 409600u, 512000u, 640000u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection11 = new List<string>(collection9);
					List<uint> collection12 = new List<uint>(collection10);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection11);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection12);
				}
			}
			_SvCurrentIdx = _SvListEx.IndexOf(item2);
		}
		RaiseParameterListChanged("SvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshExpCompansationList()
	{
		_XvList.Clear();
		_XvCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20496, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		short item = BitConverter.ToInt16(devPropDesc, 7);
		int num = 10;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			short num3 = BitConverter.ToInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			_XvList.Add(num3);
			if (num3 > 0)
			{
				_XvCbxItems.Add("+" + ((double)(float)num3 / 1000.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
			else
			{
				_XvCbxItems.Add(((double)(float)num3 / 1000.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
		}
		_XvCurrentIdx = _XvList.IndexOf(item);
		RaiseParameterListChanged("XvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshFocalLengthList()
	{
		_FocalLengthList.Clear();
		_FocalLengthCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20488, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			uint item = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, 9);
			int num = 14;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
			{
				uint num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num);
				num += 4;
				_FocalLengthList.Add(num3);
				_FocalLengthCbxItems.Add(((double)(float)num3 / 100.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
			_flCurrentIdx = _FocalLengthList.IndexOf(item);
			RaiseParameterListChanged("FocalLengthListChanged");
		}
	}

	private void RaiseLVChanged(string LvState)
	{
		if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
		{
			this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(LvState));
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewRefreshTimer(bool sw)
	{
		if (pollingLiveViewTimer != null)
		{
			if (sw)
			{
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(33, 33);
			}
			else
			{
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			}
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewRefreshTask(object o)
	{
		if (_isLVAcquiring)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (!_camPcLiveViewMode)
		{
			pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(-1, -1);
		}
		else if (!_DisconnectRequested)
		{
			_isLVAcquiring = true;
			ushort resCode;
			try
			{
				MtpGetLiveViewFrameData(out resCode);
			}
			catch
			{
				_isLVAcquiring = false;
				return;
			}
			if (resCode == 8193)
			{
				RaiseLVChanged("LiveViewRefreshed");
			}
			_isLVAcquiring = false;
		}
	}

			this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("TransferringFileNameNotified"));
		}
	}

		}

			this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("LargePostViewRefreshed"));

	private void RaiseConditionChanged()
	{
		if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
		{
			this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("ConditionChanged"));
		}
	}

	public void PollingConditionTimer(bool sw)
	{
		if (pollingConditionTimer != null)
		{
			if (sw)
			{
				pollingConditionTimer.Change(100, -1);
			}
			else
			{
				pollingConditionTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			}
		}
	}

	private async void ConditionRefreshTask(object o)
	{
		pollingConditionTimer.Change(-1, -1);
		if (_DisconnectRequested)
		{
			return;
		}
		MtpGetAllConditions(out var resCode);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			RaiseConditionChanged();
			if (!_IsTransferring && _transCandidateObjectFlag && _transCandidateObjectHandle != 0)
			{
				try
				{
					if (!_isNewTransferMode || _isMovieTransferMode)
					{
						await ExecuteGetObject(_transCandidateObjectHandle);
					}
					else
					{
						await ExecuteFileTransfer();
					}
				}
				catch (DirectoryNotFoundException)
				{
					if (MessageBox.Show(Resources.MbxDirectoryNotFound, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation) == MessageBoxResult.OK && this.PropertyChanged != null)
					{
						this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("DestinationFailed"));
					}
					return;
				}
				catch (IOException ex2)
				{
					MessageBoxResult messageBoxResult = ((ex2.Message == "NoSpace") ? MessageBox.Show(Resources.MbxNoAvailableFreeSpace, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation) : ((fa != FileAttributes.Directory) ? MessageBox.Show(ex2.Message, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation) : MessageBox.Show(Resources.MbxDirectoryCannotUse, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation)));
					if (messageBoxResult == MessageBoxResult.OK && this.PropertyChanged != null)
					{
						this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("DestinationFailed"));
					}
					return;
				}
				catch (Exception)
				{
					return;
				}
			}
		}
		try
		{
			pollingConditionTimer.Change(100, -1);
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
		}
	}

	protected async Task ExecuteGetObject(uint objectHandle)
	{
		ushort resCode = 0;
		bool flag = false;
		MtpGetObjectInfo(objectHandle, out resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		string extension = Path.GetExtension(_objectInfo.FileName);
		switch (extension)
		{
		case ".PEF":
		case ".pef":
		case ".DNG":
		case ".dng":
			flag = IsRawSaving;
			_IsPartialTransfer = true;
			break;
		case ".JPG":
		case ".jpg":
			flag = IsJpgSaving;
			_IsPartialTransfer = false;
			break;
		case ".TIF":
		case ".tif":
			flag = IsTifSaving;
			_IsPartialTransfer = true;
			break;
		case ".MOV":
		case ".mov":
		case ".AVI":
		case ".avi":
			flag = _movieTransferSw;
			_IsPartialTransfer = true;
			break;
		}
		if (!flag)
		{
			MtpRecievedPentaxCreatedObject(objectHandle, out resCode);
			_transCandidateObjectFlag = false;
			return;
		}
		if (new DriveInfo(_saveFolder).AvailableFreeSpace < _objectInfo.ObjectCompressedSize)
		{
			throw new IOException("NoSpace");
		}
		_IsTransferring = true;
		string savePath = _saveFolder + "\\" + _objectInfo.FileName;
		SavePath = _saveFolder + "\\" + _objectInfo.FileName;
		if (File.Exists(savePath))
		{
			string text = _saveFolder + "\\" + Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(_objectInfo.FileName) + "(";
			int num = 0;
			string text2;
			do
			{
				num++;
				text2 = text + num + ")" + extension;
			}
			while (File.Exists(text2));
			savePath = text2;
		}
		FileStream saveFileStream;
		try
		{
			saveFileStream = new FileStream(savePath, FileMode.CreateNew);
		}
		catch (DirectoryNotFoundException ex)
		{
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex;
		}
		catch (IOException ex3)
		{
			try
			{
				fa = File.GetAttributes(_saveFolder);
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
				fa = (FileAttributes)0;
			}
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex3;
		}
		catch (Exception ex4)
		{
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex4;
		}
		if (_IsShowPostView && (!_isMovieTransferMode || _isMovieSubImageSupported))
		{
			MtpGetPentaxSubImage(objectHandle, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				MtpGetObject(objectHandle, out resCode);
				_memPostView = new WrappedStream(_memTransferedObject, "TransferedObject");
			}
			SaveFileName = Path.GetFileName(savePath);
			RaisePostViewChanged();
		}
		else
		{
			SaveFileName = Path.GetFileName(savePath);
			RaiseTransferringFileNameNotified();
		}
		bool flag2 = false;
		if (!IsLS && _IsShowLargePostView && !_isMovieTransferMode && !(extension == ".TIF") && !(extension == ".tif"))
		{
			MtpGetPentaxMainImage(objectHandle, out resCode);
			if (extension.ToUpper(new CultureInfo("en-US")) == ".JPG")
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterReadLock();
				_memLargePostView.CopyTo(saveFileStream);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(66L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				byte[] array = new byte[4];
				_memLargePostView.Read(array, 0, 4);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(array[0] + (array[1] << 8) + 12, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(array[0] + (array[1] << 8) + 12 + 8, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitReadLock();
				saveFileStream.Flush();
				saveFileStream.Close();
				saveFileStream = null;
				flag2 = true;
				if (_isDotNet451Later)
				{
					GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
				}
				GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
				GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
				GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
				if (IsOuterViewer)
				{
					if (OuterViewerPath != null)
					{
						string text3 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
						if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
						{
							_tmpFileNo = 0;
						}
						Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text3));
						FileStream fileStream = new FileStream(text3, FileMode.Create);
						_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
						_memLargePostView.CopyTo(fileStream);
						fileStream.Close();
						Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text3 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
						_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
				}
			}
			else if (IsOuterViewer)
			{
				if (OuterViewerPath != null)
				{
					string text4 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
					if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
					{
						_tmpFileNo = 0;
					}
					Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text4));
					FileStream fileStream2 = new FileStream(text4, FileMode.Create);
					_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					_memLargePostView.CopyTo(fileStream2);
					fileStream2.Close();
					Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text4 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
					_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
			}
		}
		if (!flag2)
		{
			if (_IsPartialTransfer)
			{
				uint offset = 0u;
				uint readBytes = 0u;
				int bufferSw = 0;
				byte[][] readBuffer = new byte[2][];
				Task readTask = Task.Run(delegate
				{
					MtpGetPartialObject(objectHandle, offset, 16777216u, out readBuffer[0], out readBytes, out resCode);
				});
				Task writeTask;
				while (true)
				{
					await readTask;
					if (resCode != 8193)
					{
						throw new Exception();
					}
					writeTask = saveFileStream.WriteAsync(readBuffer[bufferSw], 0, (int)readBytes);
					if (readBytes < 16777216)
					{
						break;
					}
					bufferSw = ++bufferSw & 1;
					offset += readBytes;
					readTask = Task.Run(delegate
					{
						MtpGetPartialObject(objectHandle, offset, 16777216u, out readBuffer[bufferSw], out readBytes, out resCode);
					});
					await writeTask;
				}
				await writeTask;
			}
			else
			{
				MtpGetObject(objectHandle, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					throw new Exception();
				}
				await _memTransferedObject.CopyToAsync(saveFileStream);
			}
			saveFileStream.Flush();
			if (_isLS && _IsShowLargePostView && !_isMovieTransferMode)
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterWriteLock();
				_memLargePostView = new WrappedStream(saveFileStream);
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitWriteLock();
				if (IsOuterViewer)
				{
					if (OuterViewerPath != null)
					{
						string text5 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
						if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
						{
							_tmpFileNo = 0;
						}
						Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text5));
						FileStream fileStream3 = new FileStream(text5, FileMode.Create);
						_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
						_memLargePostView.CopyTo(fileStream3);
						fileStream3.Close();
						Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text5 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
						_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
				}
			}
			if (_IsShowLargePostView && (extension == ".TIF" || extension == ".tif"))
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterWriteLock();
				_memLargePostView = new WrappedStream(saveFileStream);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(162L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				byte[] array2 = new byte[4];
				_memLargePostView.Read(array2, 0, 4);
				int num2 = array2[0] + (array2[1] << 8);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(num2, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(num2 + 8, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
				_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitWriteLock();
				if (IsOuterViewer)
				{
					string text6 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
					if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
					{
						_tmpFileNo = 0;
					}
					Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text6));
					FileStream fileStream4 = new FileStream(text6, FileMode.Create);
					Image.FromStream(_memLargePostView, useEmbeddedColorManagement: true).Save(fileStream4, ImageFormat.Jpeg);
					fileStream4.Close();
					Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text6 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
				}
				else
				{
					RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
				}
			}
			saveFileStream.Close();
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
		}
		RaiseFileTransferred();
		if (LrPlginLinkSw && !_isMovieTransferMode)
		{
			Process.Start(arguments: (!(_isRawPlusShooting & _isRawPlusSaving)) ? savePath : ("-sidecar " + savePath), fileName: _LrPluginPath);
		}
		else if (Dcu5LinkSw && Dcu5Path != null)
		{
			Process.Start(Dcu5Path + "Digital Camera Utility 5.exe", savePath);
		}
		MtpRecievedPentaxCreatedObject(objectHandle, out resCode);
		_transCandidateObjectFlag = false;
		_IsTransferring = false;
	}

	protected async Task ExecuteFileTransfer()
	{
		ushort resCode = 0;
		bool flag = false;
		MtpGetTransferCandidateFileInfo(254, out var fileInfo, out resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		string extension = Path.GetExtension(fileInfo.FileName);
		switch (extension)
		{
		case ".PEF":
		case ".pef":
		case ".DNG":
		case ".dng":
			flag = IsRawSaving;
			break;
		case ".JPG":
		case ".jpg":
			flag = IsJpgSaving;
			break;
		case ".TIF":
		case ".tif":
			flag = IsTifSaving;
			break;
		}
		_IsPartialTransfer = true;
		if (!flag)
		{
			MtpDeleteTransferCandidate(out resCode);
			_transCandidateObjectFlag = false;
			return;
		}
		_IsTransferring = true;
		string savePath = _saveFolder + "\\" + fileInfo.FileName;
		if (File.Exists(savePath))
		{
			string text = _saveFolder + "\\" + Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(fileInfo.FileName) + "(";
			int num = 0;
			string text2;
			do
			{
				num++;
				text2 = text + num + ")" + extension;
			}
			while (File.Exists(text2));
			savePath = text2;
		}
		FileStream saveFileStream;
		try
		{
			saveFileStream = new FileStream(savePath, FileMode.CreateNew);
		}
		catch (DirectoryNotFoundException ex)
		{
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex;
		}
		catch (IOException ex3)
		{
			try
			{
				fa = File.GetAttributes(_saveFolder);
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
				fa = (FileAttributes)0;
			}
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex3;
		}
		catch (Exception ex4)
		{
			_IsTransferring = false;
			throw ex4;
		}
		CamFileOperation fileCmd;
		if (_IsShowPostView)
		{
			MemoryStream memoryStream = new MemoryStream();
			MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
			if (fileCmd.FileOperation != 1)
			{
				throw new Exception();
			}
			do
			{
				MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
				switch (fileCmd.FileOperation)
				{
				case 4:
					memoryStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					break;
				case 5:
					memoryStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Current);
					break;
				case 6:
					memoryStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.End);
					break;
				case 3:
				{
					MtpGetTransferFileBlock(fileCmd.OperationInfo, out var readData, out var transferredDataSize, out resCode);
					memoryStream.Write(readData, 0, transferredDataSize);
					break;
				}
				}
			}
			while (fileCmd.FileOperation != 2);
			_rwlMemTransPostView.EnterWriteLock();
			try
			{
				_memPostView = new WrappedStream(new MemoryStream(), "SubImage");
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			memoryStream.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			if (memoryStream.Length > 0)
			{
				memoryStream.CopyTo(_memPostView);
			}
			_memPostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			_rwlMemTransPostView.ExitWriteLock();
			SaveFileName = Path.GetFileName(savePath);
			RaisePostViewChanged();
		}
		else
		{
			SaveFileName = Path.GetFileName(savePath);
			RaiseTransferringFileNameNotified();
		}
		if (_IsShowLargePostView && extension.ToUpper(new CultureInfo("en-US")) != ".JPG")
		{
			MtpGetTransferCandidateFileInfo(253, out fileInfo, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				throw new Exception();
			}
			MemoryStream memoryStream2 = new MemoryStream();
			MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
			if (fileCmd.FileOperation != 1)
			{
				throw new Exception();
			}
			do
			{
				MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
				switch (fileCmd.FileOperation)
				{
				case 4:
					memoryStream2.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					break;
				case 5:
					memoryStream2.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Current);
					break;
				case 6:
					memoryStream2.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.End);
					break;
				case 3:
				{
					MtpGetTransferFileBlock(fileCmd.OperationInfo, out var readData2, out var transferredDataSize2, out resCode);
					memoryStream2.Write(readData2, 0, transferredDataSize2);
					break;
				}
				}
			}
			while (fileCmd.FileOperation != 2);
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterWriteLock();
			try
			{
				_memLargePostView = new WrappedStream(new MemoryStream(), "LargePostView");
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			memoryStream2.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			if (memoryStream2.Length > 0)
			{
				memoryStream2.CopyTo(_memLargePostView);
			}
			_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitWriteLock();
			if (IsOuterViewer)
			{
				string text3 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
				if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
				{
					_tmpFileNo = 0;
				}
				Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text3));
				FileStream fileStream = new FileStream(text3, FileMode.Create);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.CopyTo(fileStream);
				fileStream.Close();
				Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text3 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			}
			else
			{
				RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
			}
		}
		MtpGetTransferCandidateFileInfo(0, out fileInfo, out resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
		if (fileCmd.FileOperation != 1)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		if (_IsPartialTransfer)
		{
			byte[][] readBlockBuffer = new byte[2][];
			int[] readDataSize = new int[2];
			do
			{
				MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out fileCmd, out resCode);
				switch (fileCmd.FileOperation)
				{
				case 4:
					saveFileStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Begin);
					break;
				case 5:
					saveFileStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.Current);
					break;
				case 6:
					saveFileStream.Seek(fileCmd.OperationInfo, SeekOrigin.End);
					break;
				case 3:
				{
					int bufferSw = 0;
					int requestBytes;
					if (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
					{
						requestBytes = 33554432;
					}
					else
					{
						requestBytes = 8388608;
					}
					int remainDataSize = fileCmd.OperationInfo;
					if (requestBytes > remainDataSize)
					{
						requestBytes = remainDataSize;
					}
					Task readBlockTask = Task.Run(delegate
					{
						MtpGetTransferFileBlock(requestBytes, out readBlockBuffer[bufferSw], out readDataSize[bufferSw], out resCode);
					});
					Task writeBlockTask;
					while (true)
					{
						await readBlockTask;
						remainDataSize -= readDataSize[bufferSw];
						if (resCode != 8193)
						{
							throw new Exception();
						}
						writeBlockTask = saveFileStream.WriteAsync(readBlockBuffer[bufferSw], 0, readDataSize[bufferSw]);
						if (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
						{
							if (33554432L > (long)readDataSize[bufferSw])
							{
								break;
							}
						}
						else if (8388608L > (long)readDataSize[bufferSw])
						{
							break;
						}
						bufferSw = ++bufferSw & 1;
						if (requestBytes > remainDataSize)
						{
							requestBytes = remainDataSize;
						}
						readBlockTask = Task.Run(delegate
						{
							MtpGetTransferFileBlock(requestBytes, out readBlockBuffer[bufferSw], out readDataSize[bufferSw], out resCode);
						});
						await writeBlockTask;
					}
					await writeBlockTask;
					break;
				}
				}
			}
			while (fileCmd.FileOperation != 2);
		}
		saveFileStream.Flush();
		if (_IsShowLargePostView && extension.ToUpper(new CultureInfo("en-US")) == ".JPG")
		{
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterWriteLock();
			try
			{
				_memLargePostView = new WrappedStream(saveFileStream);
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			_memLargePostView.Seek(66L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			byte[] array = new byte[4];
			_memLargePostView.Read(array, 0, 4);
			_memLargePostView.Seek(array[0] + (array[1] << 8) + 12, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
			_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
			_memLargePostView.Seek(array[0] + (array[1] << 8) + 12 + 8, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			_memLargePostView.WriteByte(96);
			_memLargePostView.WriteByte(0);
			_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitWriteLock();
			if (IsOuterViewer)
			{
				string text4 = Path.Combine(_localAppDataDir + "\\" + asmcmp.Company.Replace(' ', '_'), "tmpLPVIm" + _tmpFileNo++ + ".jpg");
				if (_tmpFileNo == 10)
				{
					_tmpFileNo = 0;
				}
				Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(text4));
				FileStream fileStream2 = new FileStream(text4, FileMode.Create);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
				_memLargePostView.CopyTo(fileStream2);
				fileStream2.Close();
				Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, text4 + " " + SaveFileName + " " + PostViewRotate);
				_memLargePostView.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
			}
			else
			{
				RaiseLargePostViewChanged();
			}
		}
		saveFileStream.Close();
		RaiseFileTransferred();
		if (LrPlginLinkSw)
		{
			Process.Start(arguments: (!(_isRawPlusShooting & _isRawPlusSaving)) ? savePath : ("-sidecar " + savePath), fileName: _LrPluginPath);
		}
		else if (Dcu5LinkSw && Dcu5Path != null)
		{
			Process.Start(Dcu5Path + "Digital Camera Utility 5.exe", savePath);
		}
		MtpDeleteTransferCandidate(out resCode);
		_transCandidateObjectFlag = false;
		_IsTransferring = false;
	}

	private void OpenDevice()
	{
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues pClientInfo = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		mtpDevice.Open(DeviceId, pClientInfo);
		IsOpened = true;
	}

	private void CloseDevice()
	{
		mtpDevice.Close();
		IsOpened = false;
	}

	public void Connect()
	{
		if (IsOpened)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			OpenDevice();
			VendorMode = true;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			CloseDevice();
			throw ex;
		}
		MtpDeviceInfo devInfo = null;
		MtpGetDeviceInfo(out devInfo);
		_camSerialNo = devInfo.SerialNo;
		_camFirmVer = devInfo.DeviceVersion;
		if ((Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III") && Convert.ToDouble(_camFirmVer) >= 1.3) || (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && Convert.ToDouble(_camFirmVer) >= 1.0))
		{
			_isCISatobiSupported = true;
		}
		MtpGetStorageIDs(out var resCode);
		MtpGetAllConditions(out resCode);
		try
		{
			if (Model.StartsWith("RICOH G900SE"))
			{
				RefreshFocalLengthList();
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}

	public void TimerInitialize()
	{
		pollingLiveViewTimerDelegate = LiveViewRefreshTask;
		pollingLiveViewTimer = new Timer(pollingLiveViewTimerDelegate, null, -1, -1);
		pollingConditionTimerDelegate = ConditionRefreshTask;
		pollingConditionTimer = new Timer(pollingConditionTimerDelegate, null, 100, -1);
	}

	public void Disconnect()
	{
		if (IsOpened)
		{
			try
			{
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(-1, -1);
				pollingConditionTimer.Change(-1, -1);
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Dispose();
				pollingConditionTimer.Dispose();
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			try
			{
				VendorMode = false;
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			CloseDevice();
			Process.Start(OuterViewerPath, "/exit");
		}
	}

	public void Dispose()
	{
		Disconnect();
	}

	public uint CamRelease(bool _isTouchAf)
	{
		if (IsSelfTimerRunning)
		{
			return 5u;
		}
		if (_isTouchAf)
		{
			_focusMode = 3u;
		}
		else
		{
			_focusMode = _isReleaseWithAF;
		}
		ushort resCode;
		if (IsMirroUpMode && !_shutterReleased)
		{
			if (Model == "645D" && !_mirrorupped)
			{
				MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, _focusMode, 0u, 0u, _apertureReset, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					return 0u;
				}
				_mirrorupped = true;
				return 4u;
			}
			if (!IsMirrorUpping)
			{
				MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, _focusMode, 0u, 0u, _apertureReset, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					return 0u;
				}
				_mirrorupped = true;
				return 4u;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_mirrorupped = false;
		}
		if (_shutterReleased || _isMovieRecording)
		{
			MtpTerminatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, out resCode);
			_ = 8193;
			if (_driveModeNew == 15)
			{
				PollingConditionTimer(sw: true);
			}
			_shutterReleased = false;
			_mirrorupped = false;
			return 0u;
		}
		if (!IsMirrorUpping && !_mirrorupped && _AFMode != 0)
		{
			MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, _focusMode, _mwbMode, 0u, _apertureReset, out resCode);
		}
		else
		{
			MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, 2u, _mwbMode, 0u, _apertureReset, out resCode);
		}
		if (_releaseMode != 3)
		{
			if (_releaseMode != 0)
			{
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					_shutterReleased = false;
				}
				else
				{
					_shutterReleased = true;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				_mirrorupped = false;
				_shutterReleased = false;
			}
		}
		return _releaseMode;
	}

	public void CamAutoFocus()
	{
		if (_AFMode != 0 && (!_shutterReleased || _isMovieRecording))
		{
			MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, 1u, _mwbMode, 0u, _apertureReset, out var _);
		}
	}

	public void GreenButton()
	{
		MtpInterruptFunction(out var _);
	}

	public void TouchAF()
	{
		uint focusMode = ((!_IsTouchAFWithRelease) ? 1u : 3u);
		MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(_releaseMode, focusMode, 0u, 3u, _apertureReset, out var _);
	}

	public bool RequestCamShutdown()
	{
		_DisconnectRequested = true;
		MtpPentaxCameraShutdown(out var resCode);
		if (resCode == 8217)
		{
			_DisconnectRequested = false;
			return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	public bool SetMovieMode(bool sw)
	{
		byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
		if (sw)
		{
			devPropValue[0] = 1;
		}
		else
		{
			devPropValue[0] = 0;
		}
		MtpSetDevicePropValue(53305, ref devPropValue, out var resCode);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	public ushort CompositionAdjustment(byte AdjustDirection, byte AdjustSteps, out byte directionResult, out byte stepResult)
	{
		MtpSetCompositionAdjustmentOffset(AdjustDirection, AdjustSteps, out directionResult, out stepResult, out var resCode);
		return resCode;
	}

	public static bool IsSupported(string deviceId, ref string deviceModelName, out int errno)
	{
		PortableDeviceClass portableDeviceClass = new PortableDeviceClass();
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues pClientInfo = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		portableDeviceClass.Open(deviceId, pClientInfo);
		portableDeviceClass.Content(out var ppContent);
		ppContent.Properties(out var ppProperties);
		ppProperties.GetValues("DEVICE", null, out var ppValues);
		PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey key = new PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("26D4979A-E643-4626-9E2B-736DC0C92FDC"),
			pid = 7u
		};
		ppValues.GetStringValue(ref key, out var pValue);
		PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey key2 = new PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("26D4979A-E643-4626-9E2B-736DC0C92FDC"),
			pid = 8u
		};
		ppValues.GetStringValue(ref key2, out var pValue2);
		PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey key3 = new PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("26D4979A-E643-4626-9E2B-736DC0C92FDC"),
			pid = 3u
		};
		ppValues.GetStringValue(ref key3, out var pValue3);
		PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey key4 = new PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey
		{
			fmtid = new Guid("26D4979A-E643-4626-9E2B-736DC0C92FDC"),
			pid = 9u
		};
		ppValues.GetStringValue(ref key4, out var _);
		portableDeviceClass.Close();
		switch (pValue)
		{
		case "PENTAX":
			if (Settings.Default.Is645DEnabled && pValue2 == "645D")
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.2)
				{
					errno = 3;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			errno = 1;
			return false;
		case "RICOH IMAGING COMPANY, LTD.":
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.2)
				{
					errno = 4;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			if (Settings.Default.IsK3Enabled && pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3"))
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.1)
				{
					errno = 4;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.23)
				{
					errno = 4;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1 Mark II"))
			{
				errno = 4;
				deviceModelName = pValue2;
				return true;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1"))
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.41)
				{
					errno = 4;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX KP"))
			{
				if (Convert.ToDouble(pValue3, new CultureInfo("en-US")) >= 1.0)
				{
					errno = 4;
					deviceModelName = pValue2;
					return true;
				}
				errno = 2;
				return false;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("PENTAX K-70") && Settings.Default.IsK70Enabled)
			{
				errno = 4;
				deviceModelName = pValue2;
				return true;
			}
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("RICOH GR III"))
			{
				errno = 4;
				deviceModelName = pValue2;
				return true;
			}
			errno = 1;
			return false;
		case "RICOH COMPANY, LTD.":
		case "RICOH @PBx":
			if (pValue2.StartsWith("RICOH G900SE"))
			{
				errno = 5;
				deviceModelName = pValue2;
				return true;
			}
			errno = 1;
			return false;
		default:
			errno = 0;
			return false;
		}
	}

	private void ConvertPropVariantToString(ref PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT propVariantValue, out string stringValue)
	{
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues obj = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		PortableDeviceApiLib._tagpropertykey key = WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_NULL;
		PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT pValue = propVariantValue;
		obj.SetValue(ref key, ref pValue);
		key = WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_NULL;
		obj.GetStringValue(ref key, out stringValue);
	}

	private void ConvertStringToPropVariant(string stringValue, out PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT propVariantValue)
	{
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues obj = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		obj.SetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_NULL, stringValue);
		obj.GetValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_NULL, out propVariantValue);
	}

	private void ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams)
	{
		lock (_wpdCmdLock)
		{
			try
			{
				WpdExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(opCode, opParams, out resCode, out resParams);
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
				resCode = 0;
				resParams = null;
			}
		}
	}

	private void ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams, out byte[] data)
	{
		lock (_wpdCmdLock)
		{
			try
			{
				WpdExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(opCode, opParams, out resCode, out resParams, out data);
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
				resCode = 0;
				resParams = null;
				data = null;
			}
		}
	}

	private void ExecuteCommandWithDataToWrite(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams, ref byte[] data)
	{
		lock (_wpdCmdLock)
		{
			try
			{
				WpdExecuteCommandWithDataToWrite(opCode, opParams, out resCode, out resParams, ref data);
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
				resCode = 0;
				resParams = null;
			}
		}
	}

	private void WpdExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams)
	{
		resParams = new uint[5];
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues portableDeviceValues = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITHOUT_DATA_PHASE.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITHOUT_DATA_PHASE.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_CODE, opCode);
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection portableDevicePropVariantCollection = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection)new PortableDevicePropVariantCollectionClass();
		if (opParams != null)
		{
			foreach (uint uintValue in opParams)
			{
				PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT propVariantValue = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
				ConvertUInt32ToPropVariant(uintValue, out propVariantValue);
				portableDevicePropVariantCollection.Add(ref propVariantValue);
			}
		}
		portableDeviceValues.SetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_PARAMS, portableDevicePropVariantCollection);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out var ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out var pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		uint pValue2 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_CODE, out pValue2);
		resCode = (ushort)pValue2;
		ppResults.GetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_PARAMS, out var ppValue);
		uint pcElems = 0u;
		ppValue.GetCount(ref pcElems);
		for (uint num = 0u; num < pcElems; num++)
		{
			PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT pValue3 = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
			ppValue.GetAt(num, ref pValue3);
			ConvertPropVariantToUInt32(ref pValue3, out resParams[num]);
		}
	}

	private void WpdExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams, out byte[] data)
	{
		data = null;
		resParams = new uint[5];
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues portableDeviceValues = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITH_DATA_TO_READ.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITH_DATA_TO_READ.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_CODE, opCode);
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection portableDevicePropVariantCollection = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection)new PortableDevicePropVariantCollectionClass();
		if (opParams != null)
		{
			foreach (uint uintValue in opParams)
			{
				PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT propVariantValue = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
				ConvertUInt32ToPropVariant(uintValue, out propVariantValue);
				portableDevicePropVariantCollection.Add(ref propVariantValue);
			}
		}
		portableDeviceValues.SetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_PARAMS, portableDevicePropVariantCollection);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out var ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out var pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new MtpException("Command Phase Err", opCode, pValue);
		}
		string pValue2 = string.Empty;
		ppResults.GetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, out pValue2);
		uint pValue3 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_TOTAL_DATA_SIZE, out pValue3);
		uint pValue4 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPTIMAL_TRANSFER_BUFFER_SIZE, out pValue4);
		ppResults.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.Clear();
		byte[] array = ((pValue3 == 0) ? new byte[1] : new byte[pValue3]);
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_READ_DATA.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_READ_DATA.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetBufferValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_DATA, ref array[0], (uint)array.Length);
		portableDeviceValues.SetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, pValue2);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_TO_READ, pValue3);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new MtpException("Data Phase Err", opCode, pValue);
		}
		uint pValue5 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_READ, out pValue5);
		GCHandle gCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(array, GCHandleType.Pinned);
		IntPtr intPtr = gCHandle.AddrOfPinnedObject();
		uint pcbValue = 0u;
		ppResults.GetBufferValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_DATA, intPtr, out pcbValue);
		IntPtr intPtr2 = new IntPtr(Marshal.ReadInt32(intPtr));
		data = new byte[pcbValue];
		Marshal.Copy(intPtr2, data, 0, (int)pcbValue);
		Marshal.FreeHGlobal(intPtr2);
		gCHandle.Free();
		ppResults.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_END_DATA_TRANSFER.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_END_DATA_TRANSFER.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, pValue2);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new MtpException("Response Phase Err", opCode, pValue);
		}
		uint pValue6 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_CODE, out pValue6);
		resCode = (ushort)pValue6;
		ppResults.GetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_PARAMS, out var ppValue);
		uint pcElems = 0u;
		ppValue.GetCount(ref pcElems);
		for (uint num = 0u; num < pcElems; num++)
		{
			PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT pValue7 = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
			ppValue.GetAt(num, ref pValue7);
			ConvertPropVariantToUInt32(ref pValue7, out resParams[num]);
		}
	}

	private void WpdExecuteCommandWithDataToWrite(ushort opCode, uint[] opParams, out ushort resCode, out uint[] resParams, ref byte[] data)
	{
		resParams = new uint[5];
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues portableDeviceValues = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDeviceValues)new PortableDeviceValuesClass();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITH_DATA_TO_WRITE.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITH_DATA_TO_WRITE.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_CODE, opCode);
		PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection portableDevicePropVariantCollection = (PortableDeviceApiLib.IPortableDevicePropVariantCollection)new PortableDevicePropVariantCollectionClass();
		if (opParams != null)
		{
			foreach (uint uintValue in opParams)
			{
				PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT propVariantValue = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
				ConvertUInt32ToPropVariant(uintValue, out propVariantValue);
				portableDevicePropVariantCollection.Add(ref propVariantValue);
			}
		}
		portableDeviceValues.SetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPERATION_PARAMS, portableDevicePropVariantCollection);
		uint num = (uint)data.Length;
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedLargeIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_TOTAL_DATA_SIZE, num);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out var ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out var pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		string pValue2 = string.Empty;
		ppResults.GetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, out pValue2);
		uint pValue3 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_OPTIMAL_TRANSFER_BUFFER_SIZE, out pValue3);
		ppResults.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_WRITE_DATA.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_WRITE_DATA.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetBufferValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_DATA, ref data[0], (uint)data.Length);
		portableDeviceValues.SetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, pValue2);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_TO_WRITE, num);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		uint pValue4 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_WRITTEN, out pValue4);
		ppResults.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.Clear();
		portableDeviceValues.SetGuidValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_CATEGORY, ref WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_END_DATA_TRANSFER.fmtid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_COMMAND_ID, WpdPKeys.WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_END_DATA_TRANSFER.pid);
		portableDeviceValues.SetStringValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT, pValue2);
		mtpDevice.SendCommand(0u, portableDeviceValues, out ppResults);
		ppResults.GetErrorValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT, out pValue);
		if (pValue != 0)
		{
			throw new Exception();
		}
		uint pValue5 = 0u;
		ppResults.GetUnsignedIntegerValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_CODE, out pValue5);
		resCode = (ushort)pValue5;
		ppResults.GetIPortableDevicePropVariantCollectionValue(ref WpdPKeys.WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_PARAMS, out var ppValue);
		uint pcElems = 0u;
		ppValue.GetCount(ref pcElems);
		for (uint num2 = 0u; num2 < pcElems; num2++)
		{
			PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT pValue6 = default(PortableDeviceApiLib.tag_inner_PROPVARIANT);
			ppValue.GetAt(num2, ref pValue6);
			ConvertPropVariantToUInt32(ref pValue6, out resParams[num2]);
		}
	}

	public ushort MtpGetDeviceInfo(out MtpDeviceInfo devInfo)
	{
		devInfo = new MtpDeviceInfo();
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(4097, null, out var resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (data != null)
		{
			int num = 0;
			uint num2 = 0u;
			devInfo.PtpVer = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
			num += 2;
			devInfo.VendorExtID = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			devInfo.MtpVer = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
			num += 2;
			num2 = data[num];
			num++;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				byte[] array = new byte[num2 * 2];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array, 0, (int)(num2 * 2));
				devInfo.MtpExtDsc = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array);
				num += (int)(num2 * 2);
			}
			devInfo.FuncMode = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
			num += 2;
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				devInfo.OpSupported.Capacity = (int)num2;
				for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
				{
					devInfo.OpSupported.Add(BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num));
					num += 2;
				}
			}
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				devInfo.EvSupported.Capacity = (int)num2;
				for (int j = 0; j < num2; j++)
				{
					devInfo.EvSupported.Add(BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num));
					num += 2;
				}
			}
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				devInfo.PropSupported.Capacity = (int)num2;
				for (int k = 0; k < num2; k++)
				{
					devInfo.PropSupported.Add(BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num));
					num += 2;
				}
			}
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				devInfo.CaptureFormats.Capacity = (int)num2;
				for (int l = 0; l < num2; l++)
				{
					devInfo.CaptureFormats.Add(BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num));
					num += 2;
				}
			}
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
			num += 4;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				devInfo.PlayFormats.Capacity = (int)num2;
				for (int m = 0; m < num2; m++)
				{
					devInfo.PlayFormats.Add(BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num));
					num += 2;
				}
			}
			num2 = data[num];
			num++;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				byte[] array2 = new byte[num2 * 2];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array2, 0, (int)(num2 * 2));
				devInfo.Manufacturer = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array2);
				num += (int)(num2 * 2);
			}
			num2 = data[num];
			num++;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				byte[] array3 = new byte[num2 * 2];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array3, 0, (int)(num2 * 2));
				devInfo.Model = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array3);
				num += (int)(num2 * 2);
			}
			num2 = data[num];
			num++;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				byte[] array4 = new byte[num2 * 2];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array4, 0, (int)(num2 * 2));
				devInfo.DeviceVersion = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array4);
				num += (int)(num2 * 2);
			}
			num2 = data[num];
			num++;
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				num2--;
				byte[] array5 = new byte[num2 * 2];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array5, 0, (int)(num2 * 2));
				devInfo.SerialNo = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array5);
				num += (int)(num2 * 2);
			}
		}
		return resCode;
	}

	protected void MtpGetStorageIDs(out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(4100, null, out resCode, out var _, out var data);

		{

			_camStorageIDs = new uint[num];
			for (int i = 0; i < (int)num; i++)
			{

			}
		}
	}

	protected void MtpGetObjectInfo(uint objectHandle, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		if (objectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = objectHandle;
		}
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(4104, array, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			_objectInfo.StorageID = 0u;
			return;
		}
		int num = 0;
		_objectInfo.StorageID = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ObjectFormat = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
		num += 2;
		_objectInfo.ProtectionStatus = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
		num += 2;
		_objectInfo.ObjectCompressedSize = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ThumbFormat = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
		num += 2;
		_objectInfo.ThumbCompressedSize = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ThumbPixWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ThumbPixHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ImagePixWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ImagePixHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ImageBitDepth = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.ParentObject = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.AssociationType = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, num);
		num += 2;
		_objectInfo.AssociationDescription = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		_objectInfo.SequenceNumber = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, num);
		num += 4;
		byte b = data[num];
		num++;
		if ((long)b > 0L)
		{
			b--;
			byte[] array2 = new byte[b * 2];
			Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array2, 0, b * 2);
			_objectInfo.FileName = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array2);
			num += b * 2 + 2;
		}
		b = data[num];
		num++;
		if ((long)b > 0L)
		{
			b--;
			byte[] array3 = new byte[b * 2];
			Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array3, 0, b * 2);
			_objectInfo.DateCreated = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array3);
			num += b * 2 + 2;
		}
		b = data[num];
		num++;
		if ((long)b > 0L)
		{
			b--;
			byte[] array4 = new byte[b * 2];
			Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array4, 0, b * 2);
			_objectInfo.DateModified = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array4);
			num += b * 2 + 2;
		}
		b = data[num];
		num++;
		if ((long)b > 0L)
		{
			b--;
			byte[] array5 = new byte[b * 2];
			Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, num, array5, 0, b * 2);
			_objectInfo.Keywords = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array5);
		}
	}

	protected void MtpGetObject(uint objectHandle, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		if (objectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = objectHandle;
		}
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(4105, array, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			_rwlMemTransObj.EnterWriteLock();
			if (data != null)
			{
				_memTransferedObject = new MemoryStream(data);
			}
			_rwlMemTransObj.ExitWriteLock();
		}
	}

	protected void MtpGetPartialObject(uint objectHandle, uint offsetBytes, uint maxBytesToObtain, out byte[] readData, out uint readBytes, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[3];
		if (objectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = objectHandle;
		}
		array[1] = offsetBytes;
		array[2] = maxBytesToObtain;
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(4123, array, out resCode, out var resParams, out readData);
		readBytes = resParams[0];
	}
