	protected void MtpGetLiveViewFrameData(out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36870, null, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (data.Length < 10)
			{
				throw new Exception();
			}
			_rwlMemLVFrame.EnterWriteLock();
			if (data != null)
			{
				_memLVFrame = new WrappedStream(new MemoryStream(data), "LiveViewFrameData");
			}
			else
			{
				_memLVFrame = null;
			}
			_rwlMemLVFrame.ExitWriteLock();
		}
		catch
		{
			_memLVFrame = null;
		}
	}

	protected void MtpGetAllConditions(out ushort resCode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36879, null, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 32) == 1)
		{
			_transCandidateObjectFlag = true;
			_transCandidateObjectHandle = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 36);
			if (_transCandidateObjectHandle == 1)
			{
				_transCandidateObjectHandle = uint.MaxValue;
				_isMovieTransferMode = false;
			}
			else if (_isNewTransferMode)
			{
				_isMovieTransferMode = true;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_transCandidateObjectFlag = false;
			_transCandidateObjectHandle = 0u;
		}
		uint num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 12);
		_isNoiseReducing = (((num & 8u) != 0) ? true : false);
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 16);
		if ((num & 0x700u) != 0)
		{
			_releaseCanceled = (byte)((num & 0x700) >> 8);
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 24);
		_isMovieRecording = (num & 0xFF) == 26;
		_isAstro3PreExp = (num & 0xFF) == 49;
		_isAstro3MainExp = (num & 0xFF) == 50;
		if (_isLS)
		{
			_hyperMode = false;
			_shiftMode = false;
			_advancedHyperMode = false;
			_exposureMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 184);
			_progMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 316);
			if (_progMode == 0)
			{
				_progMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 188);
			}
			if (_exposureMode == 5 || _progMode == 40 || _progMode == 14)
			{
				IsMovieMode = true;
			}
			else
			{
				IsMovieMode = false;
			}
			bool flag2 = _progMode == 35;
			if ((!_isZoomMacro && flag2) || (_isZoomMacro && !flag2))
			{
				RefreshFocalLengthList();
				_isZoomMacro = flag2;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_exposureMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 184);
			_hyperMode = (((BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 220) & 2) == 0) ? true : false);
			_advancedHyperMode = (((BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 220) & 8u) != 0) ? true : false);
			num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 40);
			if (_userMode != num)
			{
				_userMode = num;
			}
			num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 320);
			_shiftMode = (((num & 0x400u) != 0) ? true : false);
			_apertureKeep = (((num & 0x1000u) != 0) ? true : false);
			_apertureKeepInhibit = (((num & 0x2000u) != 0) ? true : false);
			_isAstro3MovementDetectFailed = (((num & 0x4000u) != 0) ? true : false);
			_isAstro3ExposureTimeTooLong = (((num & 0x8000u) != 0) ? true : false);
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 168);
		uint num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 328);
		bool flag3 = false;
		if (num != _exposureStep)
		{
			_exposureStep = num;
			RefreshShutterSpeedList();
			RefreshApertuerList();
			if (_isExpBracketSupport)
			{
				RefreshExpBracketStepList();
			}
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			RefreshExpCompansationList();
			_openAvNum = num2;
		}
		else
		{
			num = ((_exposureMode == 15 || _exposureMode == 13 || _exposureMode == 14) ? 1u : BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 172));
			if (num != _sensitivityStep)
			{
				flag3 = true;
				_sensitivityStep = num;
			}
			if (_openAvNum != num2)
			{
				RefreshApertuerList();
				flag = true;
				_openAvNum = num2;
			}
		}
		_colorTemperature = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 252);
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 272);
		num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 276);
		ConvertFractionalTvValueToString(num, num2, out _TvCurrentValueText);
		TimeSpan timeSpan = new TimeSpan(0, 0, (int)num);
		_camBulbTimerValue = timeSpan.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan.ToString("ss\\\"");
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 280);
		num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 284);
		if (num == 0)
		{
			_AvCurrentValueText = "F- -";
		}
		else
		{
			_AvCurrentValueText = "F" + ((float)num / (float)num2).ToString("0.0");
		}
		_AvCurrentIdx = _AvCbxItems.IndexOf(_AvCurrentValueText);
		_SvCurrentValueText = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 312).ToString();
		_SvCurrentIdx = _SvCbxItems.IndexOf(_SvCurrentValueText);
		int num3 = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 288);
		num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 292);
		_XvCurrentValueText = ((float)num3 / (float)num2).ToString("+0.0;-0.0;0.0");
		_XvCurrentIdx = _XvCbxItems.IndexOf(_XvCurrentValueText);
		_IsIsoAuto = ((BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 108) == 0) ? true : false);
		BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 108);
		if (_isLS)
		{
			if (IsMovieMode)
			{
				_releaseMode = 3u;
			}
			else
			{
				_releaseMode = 0u;
			}
		}
		else if (_camVdrExtVer == 0)
		{
			_driveMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 216);
			if (flag3)
			{
				RefreshSensitivityList();
			}
			_SvCurrentIdx = _SvCbxItems.IndexOf(_SvCurrentValueText);
			if (!flag)
			{
				if (_exposureMode == 10 || _exposureMode == 11 || _exposureMode == 12 || _exposureMode == 17 || _exposureMode == 14)
				{
					if (!_isAvRingUsing)
					{
						RefreshApertuerList();
						_isAvRingUsing = true;
					}
				}
				else if (_isAvRingUsing)
				{
					RefreshApertuerList();
					_isAvRingUsing = false;
				}
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_driveModeNew = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 492);
			if ((_exposureMode == 9 || _exposureMode == 12 || _exposureMode == 20) && !IsCamBulbTimer)
			{
				_releaseMode = 2u;
			}
			else if (IsMovieMode)
			{
				_releaseMode = 3u;
			}
			else
			{
				_releaseMode = 0u;
			}
			switch (_driveModeNew)
			{
			case 4u:
			case 5u:
			case 6u:
				_releaseMode = 1u;
				IsContinuousShootingMode = true;
				break;
			case 3u:
			case 9u:
			case 10u:
			case 11u:
			case 13u:
			case 17u:
				IsRemoteControl = true;
				IsContinuousShootingMode = false;
				break;
			default:
				IsRemoteControl = false;
				IsContinuousShootingMode = false;
				break;
			}
		}
		IsExpBracketMode = BitConverter.ToBoolean(data, 80);
		if (IsExpBracketMode)
		{
			num3 = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 92);
			num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 84);
			num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 88);
			switch (num3)
			{
			case 3:
				_EvBracketMode = 1;
				break;
			case 5:
				_EvBracketMode = 2;
				break;
			case 2:
				_EvBracketMode = 3;
				break;
			case -2:
				_EvBracketMode = 4;
				break;
			}
			string item = ((float)num / (float)num2).ToString("0.0;0.0;0.0");
			_EvBracketStepCurrentIndex = _ExpBracketStepCbxItems.IndexOf(item);
		}
		else
		{
			_EvBracketMode = 0;
		}
		BracketCount = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 232);
		if (IsLS)
		{
			bool flag4 = false;
			_LSFocusMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 196);
			if (_progMode == 41)
			{
				_AFMode = 0u;
			}
			else if (_LSFocusMode < 3)
			{
				_AFMode = 255u;
			}
			else
			{
				_AFMode = 0u;
			}
			flag4 = _LSFocusMode == 2;
			if (_isLSFocusMode1cmMacro ^ flag4)
			{
				RefreshFocalLengthList();
			}
			_isLSFocusMode1cmMacro = flag4;
		}
		else
		{
			_AFMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 196);
		}
		if (_isLS)
		{
			_LSWBMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 120);
		}
		else
		{
			_WBMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 120);
		}
		_CIMode = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 148);
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 420);
		_flCurrentIdx = _FocalLengthList.IndexOf(num);
		if (_isLS)
		{
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(20481, out var devPropValue, out var resCode2);
			if (resCode2 != 8193)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (devPropValue[0] == 0)
			{
				_batteryLevel = 1u;
			}
			else if (devPropValue[0] < 17)
			{
				_batteryLevel = 2u;
			}
			else if (devPropValue[0] < 50)
			{
				_batteryLevel = 3u;
			}
			else if (devPropValue[0] < 84)
			{
				_batteryLevel = 4u;
			}
			else
			{
				_batteryLevel = 5u;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 368);
			switch ((byte)((num & 0xF00) >> 8))
			{
			case 2:
				_batteryLevel = (num & 0xF0) >> 4;
				break;
			case 3:
				_batteryLevel = num & 0xFu;
				break;
			case 4:
				_batteryLevel = 6u;
				break;
			default:
				_batteryLevel = 0u;
				break;
			}
		}
		if (_camVdrExtVer != 0)
		{
			IsTempWarning = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 472) == 1;
		}
		else
		{
			num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 28);
			if (num > 55)
			{
				IsTempWarning = true;
			}
			else
			{
				IsTempWarning = false;
			}
		}
		if (_camVdrExtVer != 0)
		{
			_SD1Format = (int)BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 464);
			_SD2Format = (int)BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 468);
			_SD1Remain = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 456);
			_SD2Remain = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 460);
			if (_SD1Remain > 99999)
			{
				_SD1Remain = 99999u;
			}
			if (_SD2Remain > 99999)
			{
				_SD2Remain = 99999u;
			}
			_camActualWritingFileFormat = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 132);
			if ((long)_SD1Format == 3 || (long)_SD1Format == 4)
			{
				_isRawPlusShooting = true;
			}
			else if (_isDualSlot && ((long)_SD1Format == 1 || (long)_SD1Format == 2) && _SD2Format == 0L)
			{
				_isRawPlusShooting = true;
			}
			else
			{
				_isRawPlusShooting = false;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_SD1Format = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, 132);
			_SD2Format = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, 134);
		}
		_imageSize = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 136);
		if (IsMovieMode && _isMovieSettingSupported)
		{
			_imageSizeOfMovie = (short)(_imageSize & 0xFFFF);
			_frameRate = (short)(_imageSize >> 16);
			_imageSize = 0;
		}
		_jpegQuality = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 140);
		_rawKind = data[144];
		if (_camVdrExtVer == 0)
		{
			return;
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 224);
		if (!Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z") && !(Model == "PENTAX K-3"))
		{
			num++;
		}
		if (_camPcLiveViewMode && _rolling != (int)num)
		{
			_rolling = (int)num;
			RaiseLVChanged("LiveViewRotated");
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 448);
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 496);
		_usbLvAfResult = (byte)(num & 3u);
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 500);
		_capturedImageRotate = (byte)(num & 7u);
		Sd1CardState = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 476);
		Sd2CardState = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 480);
		_sd1Activity = 1 - BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 484);
		if (_isLS)
		{
			_internalDriveActivity = 1 - BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 488);
			if (_internalDriveActivity == 1)
			{
				_InternalMemoryRemain = _SD2Remain;
			}
			else
			{
				_InternalMemoryRemain = 0u;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_sd2Activity = 1 - BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 488);
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 104);
		IsImageProcessing = (((num & 2u) != 0) ? true : false);
		if (!_isLS)
		{
			bool isMovieMode = IsMovieMode;
			IsMovieMode = (((num & 0x100u) != 0) ? true : false);
			if (isMovieMode != IsMovieMode)
			{
				RefreshExpCompansationList();
				if (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && IsMovieMode)
				{
					_camPcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				_shutterReleased = false;
			}
		}
		_isMovieRecording |= (byte)(((num & 0x200u) != 0) ? 1 : 0) != 0;
		IsMirroUpMode = (((num & 0x400u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsMirrorUpping = (((num & 0x800u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsIntervalMode = (((num & 0x1000u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsMultiCaptureMode = (((num & 0x4000u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsMultiCapturing = (((num & 0x8000u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsShooting = (((num & (true ? 1u : 0u)) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsSelfTimerRunning = (((num & 0x100000u) != 0) ? true : false);
		if (IsMultiCaptureMode && !IsMultiCapturing && _shutterReleased)
		{
			_shutterReleased = false;
		}
		num = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 504);
		IsAvChangeable = (((num & (true ? 1u : 0u)) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsTvChangeable = (((num & 2u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsSvChangeable = (((num & 4u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsXvChangeable = (((num & 8u) != 0) ? true : false);
		if (IsXvChangeable && _XvCurrentIdx == -1)
		{
			RefreshExpCompansationList();
		}
		IsSvAutoSelectable = (((num & 0x10u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsTaskChanging = (((num & 0x20u) != 0) ? true : false);
		IsCamBulbTimer = (((num & 0x40u) != 0) ? true : false);
		if (IsTvChangeable)
		{
			if (IsCamBulbTimer)
			{
				_camBulbTimerValue = timeSpan.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan.ToString("ss\\\"");
				_TvCurrentIdx = _TvCbxItems.IndexOf(_camBulbTimerValue);
			}
			else
			{
				_TvCurrentIdx = _TvCbxItems.IndexOf(_TvCurrentValueText);
			}
			if (_TvCurrentIdx == -1)
			{
				RefreshShutterSpeedList();
			}
		}
		GPSState = (num & 0x180) >> 7;
		IsAstroTracer3 = (((num & 0x200u) != 0) ? true : false);
		_ = data.Length;
		_ = 508;
		if (data.Length > 524)
		{
			_camCardSlotSetting = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 520) + 1;
			_camWritingFormatSetting = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 524);
			_camAstroTracerLimitTime = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 528);
		}
		if (data.Length > 552)
		{
			_camCmpAdjFlag = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 532);
			_camCmpAdjX = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 536);
			_camCmpAdjXLim = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 540);
			_camCmpAdjY = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 544);
			_camCmpAdjYLim = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 548);
			_camCmpAdjR = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 552);
			_camCmpAdjRLim = BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 556);
		}
		if (data.Length > 560)
		{
			_camMovieCardSlotSetting = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 560);
			bool flag5 = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 564) == 1;
			if (flag5 != IsElectronicShutter)
			{
				IsElectronicShutter = flag5;
				RefreshShutterSpeedList();
				_TvCurrentIdx = _TvCbxItems.IndexOf(_TvCurrentValueText);
			}
		}
		else
		{
			ulong num4 = BitConverter.ToUInt64(data, 304);
			if (_camCalcuratedTvMax != num4)
			{
				if (num4 == 103079215104001L)
				{
					IsElectronicShutter = true;
				}
				else
				{
					IsElectronicShutter = false;
				}
				RefreshShutterSpeedList();
				_camCalcuratedTvMax = num4;
			}
		}
		if (!flag && IsAvChangeable == _isAvRingUsing)
		{
			RefreshApertuerList();
			_isAvRingUsing = !IsAvChangeable;
			flag = true;
		}
		if (flag3 || _isIsoAutoExists != IsSvAutoSelectable)
		{
			try
			{
				RefreshSensitivityList();
				_SvCurrentIdx = _SvCbxItems.IndexOf(_SvCurrentValueText);
			}
			catch
			{
				_SvCurrentIdx = -1;
			}
			_isIsoAutoExists = IsSvAutoSelectable;
		}
		if (data.Length > 568)
		{
			_currentWritingSlot = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 568);
		}
	}

	private void MtpInitiatePentaxCapture(uint releaseMode, uint focusMode, uint mwbMode, uint syncMode, uint apertureReset, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36881, new uint[5] { releaseMode, focusMode, mwbMode, syncMode, apertureReset }, out resCode, out var _);
		_ = resCode;
		_ = 8193;
	}

	private void MtpTerminatePentaxCapture(uint releaseMode, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36882, new uint[1] { releaseMode }, out resCode, out var _);
		_ = resCode;
		_ = 8193;
	}

	private void MtpRecievedPentaxCreatedObject(uint transferedObjectHandle, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		if (transferedObjectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = transferedObjectHandle;
		}
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36867, array, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpGetPentaxSubImage(uint objectHandle, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		if (objectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = objectHandle;
		}
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36871, array, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			_rwlMemTransPostView.EnterWriteLock();
			if (data != null)
			{
				_memPostView = new WrappedStream(new MemoryStream(data), "MtpGetPentaxSubImage");
			}
			_rwlMemTransPostView.ExitWriteLock();
		}
	}

	private void MtpGetPentaxMainImage(uint objectHandle, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		if (objectHandle == 0)
		{
			array[0] = _transCandidateObjectHandle;
		}
		else
		{
			array[0] = objectHandle;
		}
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36872, array, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterWriteLock();
			if (data != null)
			{
				_memLargePostView = new WrappedStream(new MemoryStream(data), "GetPentaxMainImage");
			}
			_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitWriteLock();
		}
	}

	private void MtpInterruptFunction(out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36883, null, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpFocusControl(uint driveAmount, uint driveDirection, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36886, new uint[2] { driveAmount, driveDirection }, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpFocusControlNew(int imagePlaneDisplacement, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36887, new uint[1] { (uint)imagePlaneDisplacement }, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpSetCompositionAdjustmentOffset(byte adjustDirection, byte step, out byte adjustDirectionResult, out byte effectiveStep, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36888, new uint[2] { adjustDirection, step }, out resCode, out var resParams);
		adjustDirectionResult = (byte)resParams[0];
		effectiveStep = (byte)resParams[1];
	}

	private void MtpSetFlagToKeepAperturePosition(byte keepFlag, uint apertureValue, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36889, new uint[2] { keepFlag, apertureValue }, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpGeneralCommand(uint CommandNumber, uint parameter1, out ushort resCode, uint parameter2 = 0u, uint parameter3 = 0u, uint parameter4 = 0u)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(38911, new uint[5] { CommandNumber, parameter1, parameter2, parameter3, parameter4 }, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpSetWarningMessageFlag(uint flag, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithoutDataPhase(36873, new uint[1] { flag }, out resCode, out var _);
	}

	private void MtpGetTransferCandidateFileInfo(byte typeOfTransImg, out TransCdFileInfo fileInfo, out ushort resCode)
	{
		uint[] array = new uint[1];
		fileInfo = new TransCdFileInfo();
		array[0] = typeOfTransImg;
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36875, array, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			fileInfo.FileFormat = data[0];
			fileInfo.Quality = data[1];
			fileInfo.ImageSize = data[2];
			int num = data[3] * 2;
			if (num > 0)
			{
				byte[] array2 = new byte[num];
				Array.ConstrainedCopy(data, 4, array2, 0, num);
				fileInfo.FileName = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(array2).TrimEnd(default(char));
			}
		}
	}

	private void MtpGetCamFileOperationCommand(out CamFileOperation fileOpCmd, out ushort resCode)
	{
		fileOpCmd = new CamFileOperation();
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36876, null, out resCode, out var _, out var data);
		fileOpCmd.FileOperation = data[0];
		fileOpCmd.OperationInfo = BitConverter.ToInt32(data, 1);
	}

	private void MtpGetTransferFileBlock(int transRequestSize, out byte[] readData, out int transferredDataSize, out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36877, new uint[1] { (uint)transRequestSize }, out resCode, out var resParams, out readData);
		if (resCode == 8193)
		{
			transferredDataSize = (int)resParams[0];
		}
		else
		{
			transferredDataSize = 0;
		}
	}

	private void MtpDeleteTransferCandidate(out ushort resCode)
	{
		ExecuteCommandWithDataToRead(36878, null, out resCode, out var _, out var _);
	}
}

internal static class NewDriveMode
{
	public const uint SingleShot = 0u;

	public const uint ExpBracket = 1u;

	public const uint SelfTimerExpBracket = 2u;

	public const uint RemoteControlBracket = 3u;

	public const uint Continuous_High = 4u;

	public const uint Continuous_Middle = 5u;

	public const uint Continuous_Low = 6u;

	public const uint SelfTimer_12sec = 7u;

	public const uint SelfTimer_2sec = 8u;

	public const uint RemoteControl = 9u;

	public const uint RemoteControl_3sec = 10u;

	public const uint RemoteControlContinuous = 11u;

	public const uint MirrorUp = 12u;

	public const uint RemoteControlMirrorUp = 13u;

	public const uint MultiExposure = 14u;

	public const uint MultiExposureContinuous = 15u;

	public const uint SelfTimerMultiExposure = 16u;

	public const uint RemoteControlMultiExp = 17u;

	public const uint Interval = 18u;

	public const uint IntervalMultiExposure = 19u;

	public const uint IntervalMovie = 20u;

	public const uint StartStream = 21u;

	public const uint SelfTimerContinuous = 22u;

	public const uint DepthOfFieldBracket = 23u;

	public const uint DepthOfFieldBracket_Self = 24u;

	public const uint DepthOfFieldBracket_Self2 = 25u;

	public const uint MotionBracket = 26u;

	public const uint MotionBracket_Self = 27u;

	public const uint MotionBracket_Self2 = 28u;

	public const uint SelfTimer2secBracket = 29u;

	public const uint RemoteControl3secBracket = 30u;

	public const uint SelfTimerContinuous_Hi = 31u;

	public const uint SelfTimerContinuous_Mi = 32u;

	public const uint SelfTimerContinuous_Lo = 33u;

	public const uint SelfTimer2sContinuous_Hi = 34u;

	public const uint SelfTimer2sContinuous_Mi = 35u;

	public const uint SelfTimer2sContinuous_Lo = 36u;

	public const uint RemoteControl3secCont_Hi = 37u;

	public const uint RemoteControl3secCont_Mi = 38u;

	public const uint RemoteControl3secCont_Lo = 39u;

	public const uint RemoteControlCont_Hi = 40u;

	public const uint RemoteControlCont_Mi = 41u;

	public const uint RemoteControlCont_Lo = 42u;

	public const uint DepthOfFieldBktRemote3sec = 43u;

	public const uint DepthOfFieldBktRemote = 44u;

	public const uint MotionBracketRemote3sec = 45u;

	public const uint MotionBracketRemote = 46u;

	public const uint MirrorUpSelfTimer = 47u;

	public const uint MirrorUpSelfTimer2sec = 48u;

	public const uint MirrorUpRemoteControl3sec = 49u;

	public const uint SelfTimer2secMultiExp = 50u;

	public const uint RemoteControl3secMultiExp = 51u;
}
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Data;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class OptionWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private BindingExpression textGridSpaceBe;

	private BindingExpression textScaleIntBe;

	private BindingExpression textNumOfDigitsBe;

	public OptionWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void OptionOkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting = (AppOptions)base.DataContext;
		if (LVGridNormalRbn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		}
		else if (LVGridGoldenSectionRbn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 1;
		}
		else
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = 2;
		}
		if (rbtSession.IsChecked == true)
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder = 1;
		}
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void OptionWindow1_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DataContext = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.Copy();
		textGridSpaceBe = TbxLVGridSpace.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		textScaleIntBe = TbxLVScaleInterval.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		textNumOfDigitsBe = TbxNumOfDigits.GetBindingExpression(TextBox.TextProperty);
		switch (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid)
		{
		case 0:
			LVGridNormalRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		case 1:
			LVGridGoldenSectionRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		case 2:
			LVGridScaleRbn.IsChecked = true;
			break;
		}
		if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder == 0)
		{
			rbtSession.IsChecked = true;
		}
		else
		{
			rbtDate.IsChecked = true;
		}
	}

	private void OptionCancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void GridSpaceUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).SpaceOfLVGrid++;
		textGridSpaceBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void GridSpaceDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).SpaceOfLVGrid--;
		textGridSpaceBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void ScaleIntervalUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid++;
		textScaleIntBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void ScaleIntervalDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid--;
		textScaleIntBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void TbxNumOfDigits_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key == Key.Return)
		{
			if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
			{
				((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
			}
			if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
			{
				((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
			}
			textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
		}
	}

	private void TbxNumOfDigits_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
		}
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void NumOfDigitsUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber++;
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber > 5)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 5;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}

	private void NumOfDigitsDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber--;
		if (((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber < 1)
		{
			((AppOptions)base.DataContext).NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = 1;
		}
		textNumOfDigitsBe.UpdateTarget();
	}
}
using System;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Controls.Primitives;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Interop;
using System.Windows.Markup;
using System.Windows.Media;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class PostViewWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	public double ZoomMagnification;

	private byte _rotateParam = 1;

	private bool _portraitDir;

	private RotateTransform LargePostViewImageRotation = new RotateTransform(0.0, 0.5, 0.5);

	public bool isShutdownRequest;

	private bool _isFirstPressed;

	private bool _isFirstClicked;

	private bool _isDragging;

	private double _dragStartX;

	private double _dragStartY;

	private bool _centeringOnClickPoint;

	private double _newOffsetX;

	private double _newOffsetY;

	private double _mag;

	private bool _isCbxTextReplacing;

	public byte Rotation
	{
		set
		{
			_rotateParam = value;
			RotateLargePostView(value);
		}
	}

	public PostViewWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void RotateLargePostView(byte rotate)
	{
		switch (rotate)
		{
		case 1:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			_portraitDir = false;
			break;
		case 3:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			_portraitDir = true;
			break;
		case 2:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			_portraitDir = false;
			break;
		case 4:
			LargePostViewImageRotation.Angle = 270.0;
			_portraitDir = true;
			break;
		}
		if (FitButton.IsChecked == true)
		{
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void PostViewWindow1_Closing(object sender, CancelEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!isShutdownRequest)
		{
			Hide();
			base.Owner.Activate();
			e.Cancel = true;
		}
	}

	private void PostViewWindow1_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		LargePostViewImage.LayoutTransform = LargePostViewImageRotation;
		FitButton.IsChecked = true;
		HwndSource.FromHwnd(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle).AddHook(WndProc);
		ImageMagnificationCbx.AddHandler(TextBoxBase.TextChanged, new TextChangedEventHandler(ImageMagnificationCbx_TextChanged));
	}

	private void FitButton_Checked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source != null)
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Disabled;
			LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Disabled;
			LargePostViewImage.Width = LPVScrollViewer.Width;
			LargePostViewImage.Height = LPVScrollViewer.Height;
			ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
			ActualButton.IsEnabled = true;
			FitButton.IsEnabled = false;
			LargePostViewImage.Cursor = null;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void ActualButton_Checked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source == null)
		{
			ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
		LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
		LargePostViewImage.Width = LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
		LargePostViewImage.Height = LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
		if (_centeringOnClickPoint)
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset(_newOffsetX);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset(_newOffsetY);
			_centeringOnClickPoint = false;
		}
		else
		{
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Source.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Source.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
		}
		FitButton.IsChecked = false;
		FitButton.IsEnabled = true;
		ActualButton.IsEnabled = false;
		LargePostViewImage.Cursor = Cursors.Hand;
		_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
		ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem = ActualSizeCbi;
		_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
		_mag = 1.0;
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!_isFirstPressed)
		{
			_isFirstPressed = true;
		}
		if (FitButton.IsChecked != true)
		{
			Point position = e.GetPosition(LPVScrollViewer);
			_dragStartX = position.X;
			_dragStartY = position.Y;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_isFirstClicked)
		{
			_isFirstClicked = false;
		}
		if (_isFirstPressed)
		{
			_isFirstPressed = false;
			_isDragging = true;
		}
		if (_isDragging)
		{
			Point position = e.GetPosition(LPVScrollViewer);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset(LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalOffset - position.X + _dragStartX);
			LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset(LPVScrollViewer.VerticalOffset - position.Y + _dragStartY);
			_dragStartX = position.X;
			_dragStartY = position.Y;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_isFirstPressed)
		{
			if (_isFirstClicked)
			{
				if (ActualButton.IsChecked == true)
				{
					FitButton.IsChecked = true;
				}
				else
				{
					Point position = e.GetPosition(LargePostViewImage);
					_centeringOnClickPoint = true;
					switch (_rotateParam)
					{
					case 1:
						_newOffsetX = position.X * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = position.Y * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 3:
						_newOffsetX = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - position.Y) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = position.X * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 2:
						_newOffsetX = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - position.X) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - position.Y) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					case 4:
						_newOffsetX = position.Y * LargePostViewImage.Source.Height / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentWidth - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / 2.0;
						_newOffsetY = (LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - position.X) * LargePostViewImage.Source.Width / LPVScrollViewer.ExtentHeight - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / 2.0;
						break;
					}
					ActualButton.IsChecked = true;
				}
				_isFirstClicked = false;
			}
			else
			{
				_isFirstClicked = true;
			}
			_isFirstPressed = false;
		}
		else if (_isDragging)
		{
			_isDragging = false;
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewImage_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
	{
		_isDragging = false;
		_isFirstClicked = false;
		_isFirstPressed = false;
	}

	private void RecalcFittingMagnification()
	{
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source != null && FitButton.IsChecked != false)
		{
			double num;
			double num2;
			if (_portraitDir)
			{
				num = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
				num2 = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
			}
			else
			{
				num = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth / LargePostViewImage.Source.Width;
				num2 = LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight / LargePostViewImage.Source.Height;
			}
			double mag = ((num < num2) ? num : num2);
			_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = mag.ToString("#.##%");
			_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
			_mag = mag;
		}
	}

	private IntPtr WndProc(IntPtr hwnd, int msg, IntPtr wParam, IntPtr lParam, ref bool handled)
	{
		if (msg == 5 && wParam.ToInt32() == 0)
		{
			RecalcFittingMagnification();
		}
		return IntPtr.Zero;
	}

	private void ImageMagnificationCbx_TextChanged(object sender, TextChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!_isCbxTextReplacing)
		{
			RecalcFreeMagnification();
		}
	}

	private void ImageMagnificationCbx_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key == Key.Return)
		{
			RecalcFreeMagnification();
			_isCbxTextReplacing = false;
		}
		else
		{
			_isCbxTextReplacing = true;
		}
	}

	private void RecalcFreeMagnification()
	{
		double result;
		if (LargePostViewImage.Source == null)
		{
			if (_mag == 0.0)
			{
				ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = "Fit";
			}
			else
			{
				ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
			}
		}
		else if (double.TryParse(ImageMagnificationCbx.Text.TrimEnd('%'), NumberStyles.AllowDecimalPoint, CultureInfo.CreateSpecificCulture("en-US"), out result))
		{
			_mag = result / 100.0;
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
			LPVScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
			LPVScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility = ScrollBarVisibility.Auto;
			LargePostViewImage.Width = LargePostViewImage.Source.Width * _mag;
			LargePostViewImage.Height = LargePostViewImage.Source.Height * _mag;
			if (_rotateParam < 3)
			{
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
			}
			else
			{
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToHorizontalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Height - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportWidth) / 2.0);
				LPVScrollViewer.ScrollToVerticalOffset((LargePostViewImage.Width - LPVScrollViewer.ViewportHeight) / 2.0);
			}
			if (ImageMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem == ActualSizeCbi)
			{
				ActualButton.IsEnabled = false;
				ActualButton.IsChecked = true;
			}
			else
			{
				ActualButton.IsChecked = false;
				ActualButton.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			FitButton.IsChecked = false;
			FitButton.IsEnabled = true;
			LargePostViewImage.Cursor = Cursors.Hand;
		}
		else
		{
			ImageMagnificationCbx.Text = _mag.ToString("#.##%");
		}
	}
}

	public VersionInfoWindow()

	private void VersionDlg_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		Version version = Assembly.GetEntryAssembly().GetName().Version;
		VersionLbl.Content = "Version " + version.ToString(3);
		AssemblyCopyrightAttribute assemblyCopyrightAttribute = (AssemblyCopyrightAttribute)Attribute.GetCustomAttribute(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly(), typeof(AssemblyCopyrightAttribute));
		CopyrightLbl.Content = assemblyCopyrightAttribute.Copyright;
		CameraVersionLbl.Content = FirmwareVersion;
	}

	{

	}

	};

public class WpdPKeys

	public static Guid WPD_PROPERTIES_MTP_VENDOR_EXTENDED_OBJECT_PROPS;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_COMMON_HRESULT;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_COMMAND_MTP_EXT_EXECUTE_COMMAND_WITHOUT_DATA_PHASE;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_CODE;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_RESPONSE_PARAMS;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_VENDOR_OPERATION_CODES;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_CONTEXT;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_TOTAL_DATA_SIZE;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_TO_READ;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_READ;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_TO_WRITE;

	public static _tagpropertykey WPD_PROPERTY_MTP_EXT_TRANSFER_NUM_BYTES_WRITTEN;

using System;
using System.IO;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class WrappedStream : Stream
{
	private Stream _streamBase;

	private string _streamName;

	public override long Position
	{
		get
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			return _streamBase.Position;
		}
		set
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			_streamBase.Position = value;
		}
	}

	public override long Length
	{
		get
		{
			ThrowIfDisposed();
			return _streamBase.Length;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanWrite
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanWrite;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanRead
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanRead;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	public override bool CanSeek
	{
		get
		{
			if (_streamBase != null)
			{
				return _streamBase.CanSeek;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	protected Stream StreamWrapper => _streamBase;

	public WrappedStream(MemoryStream streamBase, string name)
	{
		if (streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("streamBase");
		}
		_streamBase = streamBase;
		_streamName = name;
	}

	public WrappedStream(FileStream streamBase)
	{
		if (streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("streamBase");
		}
		_streamBase = new MemoryStream();
		streamBase.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
		streamBase.CopyTo(_streamBase);
		_streamBase.Seek(0L, SeekOrigin.Begin);
	}

	public override void Write(byte[] buffer, int offset, int count)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.Write(buffer, offset, count);
	}

	public override int Read(byte[] buffer, int offset, int count)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		return _streamBase.Read(buffer, offset, count);
	}

	public override void SetLength(long value)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.SetLength(value);
	}

	public override long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		return _streamBase.Seek(offset, origin);
	}

	public override void Flush()
	{
		ThrowIfDisposed();
		_streamBase.Flush();
	}

	protected override void Dispose(bool disposing)
	{
		if (disposing)
		{
			_streamBase = null;
		}
		base.Dispose(disposing);
	}

	private void ThrowIfDisposed()
	{
		if (_streamBase == null)
		{
			throw new ObjectDisposedException(GetType().Name);
		}
	}
}
namespace RemoteAssistant;

internal static class ApertureResetMode
{
	public const uint Reset = 0u;

	public const uint NoReset = 1u;
}
using System;
using System.Runtime.Remoting;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels;
using System.Runtime.Remoting.Channels.Ipc;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows;
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class App : Application
{
	public delegate void ArgsReceivedEventHandler(string[] args);

	private class Handler : MarshalByRefObject
	{
		public void Handle(string[] args)
		{
			if (App.ArgsReceived != null)
			{
				Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(App.ArgsReceived, new object[1] { args });
			}
		}

		public override object InitializeLifetimeService()
		{
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Mutex _mutex;

	public static string[] CmdLineArgs { get; private set; }

	public static event ArgsReceivedEventHandler ArgsReceived;

	private void Application_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e)
	{
		try
		{
			_mutex = new Mutex(initiallyOwned: false, "Global\\PENTAXCameraController");
		}
		catch (ApplicationException)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		if (!_mutex.WaitOne(0, exitContext: false))
		{
			if (e.Args.Length == 0)
			{
				MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxAlreadyRunning, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
			else
			{
				CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
				ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcClientChannel(), ensureSecurity: true);
				((Handler)Activator.GetObject(typeof(Handler), "ipc://IMAGE_Transmitter_2/ArgHandler")).Handle(e.Args);
			}
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
			Shutdown();
			return;
		}
		CmdLineArgs = e.Args;
		MainWindow mainWindow = new MainWindow();
		ChannelServices.RegisterChannel(new IpcServerChannel("IMAGE_Transmitter_2"), ensureSecurity: true);
		RemotingServices.Marshal(new Handler(), "ArgHandler", typeof(Handler));
		try
		{
			mainWindow.Show();
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			MessageBox.Show(ex2.ToString(), "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Hand);
		}
	}

	private void Application_Exit(object sender, ExitEventArgs e)
	{
		if (_mutex != null)
		{
			_mutex.ReleaseMutex();
			_mutex.Close();
			_mutex = null;
		}
	}
}
using RemoteAssistant.Properties;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class AppOptions
{
	private static AppOptions _currentSetting;

	private bool _optionIsLinkDCU5;

	private bool _optionDispLVGrid;

	private int _optionTypeOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;

	private int _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;

	private bool _optionShowPostViewWindow;

	private bool _optionReleaseWithAfSw;

	private bool _optionUseBulbTimer;

	private int _optionLVGridColorIndex;

	private byte _optionRawFileFormat;

	private bool _optionAutoSubFolder;

	private byte _optionSubFolderRule;

	private string _optionSubFolderBaseName;

	private byte _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;

	private bool _optionShowApertureFixBtn;

	public static AppOptions CurrentSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			return _currentSetting;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_currentSetting == null)
			{
				_currentSetting = new AppOptions();
			}
			_currentSetting = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsLinkDCU5
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionIsLinkDCU5;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionIsLinkDCU5 = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsDispLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionDispLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionDispLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int TypeOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionTypeOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionTypeOfLVGrid = value;
		}
	}

	public int SpaceOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionSpaceOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public int ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = value;
			if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid > 100)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 100;
			}
			else if (_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid < 5)
			{
				_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 5;
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsShowPostViewWindow
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowPostViewWindow;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowPostViewWindow = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsReleaseWithAf
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionReleaseWithAfSw;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionReleaseWithAfSw = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsUseBulbTimer
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionUseBulbTimer;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionUseBulbTimer = value;
		}
	}

	public int LVGridColorIndex
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionLVGridColorIndex;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionLVGridColorIndex = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RawFileFormat
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionRawFileFormat;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionRawFileFormat = value;
		}
	}

	public bool IsAutoCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionAutoSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionAutoSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public byte RuleOfCreateSubFolder
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderRule;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderRule = value;
		}
	}

	public string SubFolderBaseName
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionSubFolderBaseName;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionSubFolderBaseName = value;
		}
	}

	public byte NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = value;
		}
	}

	public bool ShowApertureFixBtn
	{
		get
		{
			return _optionShowApertureFixBtn;
		}
		set
		{
			_optionShowApertureFixBtn = value;
		}
	}

	public AppOptions()
	{
		_optionIsLinkDCU5 = false;
		_optionDispLVGrid = false;
		_optionTypeOfLVGrid = 0;
		_optionSpaceOfLVGrid = 48;
		_optionScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = 12;
		_optionShowPostViewWindow = false;
		_optionReleaseWithAfSw = false;
		_optionUseBulbTimer = false;
		_optionRawFileFormat = 0;
		_optionAutoSubFolder = false;
		_optionSubFolderBaseName = Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		_optionNumberOfDigitsOfSubFolder = 1;
		_optionShowApertureFixBtn = false;
	}

	public AppOptions Copy()
	{
		return (AppOptions)MemberwiseClone();
	}
}

using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Markup;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public partial class CIDetailParamDlgWindow : Window, IComponentConnector
{
	private MtpDevice _camObject;

	private int _customImageMode;

	public MtpDevice CamObject
	{
		set
		{
			_camObject = value;
		}
	}

	public CIDetailParamDlgWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
	}

	private void CIDetailParamDlgWindow_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_customImageMode = _camObject.CIMode;
		CIParameterEnabler(_customImageMode);
		CIParameterReadFromCamera();
	}

	private void CIParameterEnabler(int ciMode)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		bool flag7 = false;
		bool flag8 = false;
		bool flag9 = false;
		switch (ciMode)
		{
		case 10:
			flag9 = true;
			break;
		case 7:
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 5:
			flag6 = true;
			flag7 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		case 6:
		case 8:
			flag8 = true;
			flag = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		default:
			flag = true;
			flag2 = true;
			flag3 = true;
			flag4 = true;
			flag5 = true;
			break;
		}
		SaturationSlider.IsEnabled = flag;
		ImgSaturation.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		HueSlider.IsEnabled = flag2;
		ImgHue.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag2 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		KeySlider.IsEnabled = flag3;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag3 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ContrastSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastHighlightSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ContrastShadowSlider.IsEnabled = flag4;
		ImgContrast.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContHighLight.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ImgContShadow.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag4 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled = flag5;
		ImgKey.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag5 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled = flag6;
		ImgFilterEffect.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag6 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled = flag7;
		ImgToningMono.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag7 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		ToningCbx.IsEnabled = flag8;
		ImgToning.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag8 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
		CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled = flag9;
		ImgCrossProcess.Opacity = 0.3 + 0.7 * (flag9 ? 1.0 : 0.0);
	}

	private void CIParameterReadFromCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SaturationSlider.Value = _camObject.CISaturation;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			HueSlider.Value = _camObject.CIHue;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			KeySlider.Value = _camObject.CIKey;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ContrastSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrast;
			ContrastHighlightSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastHighlight;
			ContrastShadowSlider.Value = _camObject.CIContrastShadow;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			SharpnessSlider.Value = _camObject.CISharpness;
			SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFineSharpness;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIFilterEffect;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
				UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
				UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
				UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
				UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
				Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
				Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningMonoSlider.Value = _camObject.CIMonotoneToning;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			ToningCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CIToning;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = _camObject.CICrossProcessType;
		}
		else
		{
			CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
		}
	}

	private void CIParameterWriteToCamera()
	{
		if (SaturationSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISaturation = (sbyte)SaturationSlider.Value;
		}
		if (HueSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIHue = (sbyte)HueSlider.Value;
		}
		if (KeySlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIKey = (sbyte)KeySlider.Value;
		}
		if (ContrastSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIContrast = (sbyte)ContrastSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastHighlight = (sbyte)ContrastHighlightSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIContrastShadow = (sbyte)ContrastShadowSlider.Value;
		}
		if (SharpnessSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CISharpness = (sbyte)SharpnessSlider.Value;
			_camObject.CIFineSharpness = (byte)SharpnessKindCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (FilterEffectCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIFilterEffect = (byte)FilterEffectCbx.SelectedIndex;
			if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
			{
				short[] cIUserFilterEffect = new short[3]
				{
					(short)UserFilterRGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterGGainSlider.Value,
					(short)UserFilterBGainSlider.Value
				};
				_camObject.CIUserFilterEffect = cIUserFilterEffect;
			}
		}
		if (ToningMonoSlider.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIMonotoneToning = (sbyte)ToningMonoSlider.Value;
		}
		if (ToningCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CIToning = (byte)ToningCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		if (CrossProcessCbx.IsEnabled)
		{
			_camObject.CICrossProcessType = (byte)CrossProcessCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void OkBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_camObject.CIMode = _customImageMode;
		CIParameterWriteToCamera();
		base.DialogResult = true;
	}

	private void CancelBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.DialogResult = false;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterRGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterRGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		TbxUserFilterRGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterRGainSlider.Value + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(UserFilterRGainSlider.Value))) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterRGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterGGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterGGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterGGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterGGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterGGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterGGain.Text);
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;
	}

	private void TbxUserFilterBGain_LostFocus(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (double.TryParse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text, out var result))
		{
			if (result > 200.0)
			{
				result = 200.0;
			}
			if (result < -200.0)
			{
				result = -200.0;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			result = 0.0;

		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = (short)((result + (double)(5 * Math.Sign(result))) / 10.0) * 10;

	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value += 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value -= 10.0;
	}

	private void UserFilterBGainSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		if (UserFilterBGainSlider.Value > 0.0)
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		else
		{
			TbxUserFilterBGain.Text = ((short)((UserFilterBGainSlider.Value - 5.0) / 10.0) * 10).ToString();
		}
		UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = double.Parse(TbxUserFilterBGain.Text);
	}

	private void FilterEffectCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		if (FilterEffectCbx.SelectedItem == CbiFilterEffectUser)
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = true;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Glabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			Blabel.Opacity = 1.0;
			short[] cIUserFilterEffect = _camObject.CIUserFilterEffect;
			UserFilterRGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[0];
			UserFilterGGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[1];
			UserFilterBGainSlider.Value = cIUserFilterEffect[2];
		}
		else
		{
			UserFilterRGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterGGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			UserFilterBGainSlider.IsEnabled = false;
			Rlabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Glabel.Opacity = 0.3;
			Blabel.Opacity = 0.3;
		}
	}
}

public class CIModeLUT
{
	public static byte[] NominalToInternal = new byte[14]
	{
		255, 1, 0, 2, 3, 4, 12, 9, 6, 11,
		8, 7, 5, 10
	};

	public static Dictionary<uint, byte> InternalToNominal = new Dictionary<uint, byte>
	{
		{ 12u, 0 },
		{ 1u, 1 },
		{ 0u, 2 },
		{ 2u, 3 },
		{ 3u, 4 },
		{ 4u, 5 },
		{ 13u, 6 },
		{ 9u, 7 },
		{ 6u, 8 },
		{ 11u, 9 },
		{ 8u, 10 },
		{ 7u, 11 },
		{ 5u, 12 },
		{ 10u, 13 }
	};
}

	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = _camObject.CurrentColorTemperature;
	}

	{
		_camObject.WBColorTemp = (ushort)ColorTempSlider.Value;
		base.DialogResult = true;

	}

	{
	}

	private void TbxColorTempValue_KeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)
	{
	}

	private void ColorTempSlider_ValueChanged(object sender, RoutedPropertyChangedEventArgs<double> e)
	{
		ColorTempSlider.Value = Math.Floor((ColorTempSlider.Value + 5.0) / 10.0) * 10.0;
	}
}

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public static class Extensions
{
	[DllImport("gdi32.dll")]
	public static extern bool DeleteObject(IntPtr hObject);

	public static BitmapSource ToWPFBitmap(this Bitmap bitmap)
	{
		IntPtr hbitmap = bitmap.GetHbitmap();
		BitmapSource bitmapSource = null;
		try
		{
			return Imaging.CreateBitmapSourceFromHBitmap(hbitmap, IntPtr.Zero, Int32Rect.Empty, BitmapSizeOptions.FromEmptyOptions());
		}
		finally
		{
			DeleteObject(hbitmap);
		}
	}
}

	public event PropertyChangedEventHandler DisplayChanged;

	public MainWindow()
	{
		InitializeComponent();
		win32handle = new WindowWrapper(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle);
		App.ArgsReceived += delegate(string[] args)
		{
			Activate();
			DecodeCommandLineOption(args);
		};
		if (App.CmdLineArgs.Length != 0)
		{
			DecodeCommandLineOption(App.CmdLineArgs);
		}
		_ocFocalLength = new ObservableCollection<string>();
		_ocFocalLength.Add("0mm");
		_ocFocalLength.Add("10mm");
		FocalLengthCbx.Items.Clear();
		FocalLengthCbx.DataContext = _ocFocalLength;
	}

	private void DecodeCommandLineOption(string[] args)
	{
		if (!args[0].StartsWith("/") && !args[0].StartsWith("-"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (args[0].Substring(1, 2).ToLower() == "lr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = true;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = true;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "nolr")
			{
				_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin = false;
				ExitBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = false;
				}
			}
			else if (args[0].Substring(1, 4).ToLower() == "exit")
			{
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					DisconnectDevice();
				}
				Close();
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}

	private void ConnectDevice(bool msgSw)
	{
		if (_mtpDevice == null)
		{
			int errno = 0;
			int num = 0;
			_mtpDevices.Clear();
			_camModelNames.Clear();
			PortableDeviceManagerClass portableDeviceManagerClass = new PortableDeviceManagerClass();
			uint pcPnPDeviceIDs = 1u;
			portableDeviceManagerClass.GetDevices(null, ref pcPnPDeviceIDs);
			if (pcPnPDeviceIDs != 0)
			{
				string[] array = new string[pcPnPDeviceIDs];
				portableDeviceManagerClass.GetDevices(array, ref pcPnPDeviceIDs);
				string[] array2 = array;
				foreach (string deviceId in array2)
				{
					string deviceModelName = string.Empty;
					try
					{
						if (MtpDevice.IsSupported(deviceId, ref deviceModelName, out errno))
						{
							_mtpDevices.Add(new MtpDevice(deviceId));
							_camModelNames.Add(deviceModelName);
						}
						if (num < errno)
						{
							num = errno;
						}
					}
					catch (Exception)
					{
					}
				}
			}
			switch (num)
			{
			case 0:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				if (msgSw)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCameraNotFound);
				}
				return;
			case 1:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotSupported);
				return;
			case 2:
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotSupportedFwVer);
				return;
			}
			if (_mtpDevices.Count == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			for (int j = 0; j < _mtpDevices.Count; j++)
			{
				_mtpDevices[j].Model = _camModelNames[j];
			}
			_mtpDevice = _mtpDevices[0];
		}
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_mtpDevice.Connect();
			if (_mtpDevices.Count > 1)
			{
				_mtpDevices[1].Connect();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
			ushort connectResult = _mtpDevice.ConnectResult;
			if (connectResult == 40965)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMovieMode);
				MsgTbSv.ScrollToEnd();
			}
			else
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNotConnected);
				MsgTbSv.ScrollToEnd();
			}
			return;
		}
		if (_saveFolder == null)
		{
			ShowSaveFolderSelectDlg();
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.saveFolder = SelectSubFolder(_saveFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber);
			try
			{
				_driveToSave = new DriveInfo(_saveFolder);
			}
			catch
			{
				_driveToSave = null;
				GetDiskFreeSpaceEx(_saveFolder, out freeBytesAvailable, out totalNumberOfBytes, out totalNumberOfFreeBytes);
			}
		}
		_mtpCamLVChanged = LiveViewFrameRefreshed;
		_mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified = TransferringFileNameNotified;
		_mtpCamPostViewChanged = PostViewRefreshed;
		_mtpCamLargePostViewChanged = LargePostViewRefreshed;
		_mtpCamFileTransferred = FileTransferred;
		_mtpCamConditionChanged = CamConditionChanged;
		_mtpCamParameterListChanged = CamParamListChanged;
		_mtpDestinationFolderChanged = DestinationFolderChanged;
		_mtpCameraSettingFailed = CameraSettingFailed;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamLVChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamPostViewChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamLargePostViewChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamFileTransferred;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamConditionChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCamParameterListChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpDestinationFolderChanged;
		_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged += _mtpCameraSettingFailed;
		_mtpDevice.TimerInitialize();
		IsConnected = true;
		ConnectStateImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		ConnectBtn.IsChecked = true;
		System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
		toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnDisconnect;
		ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
		ModelNameLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.Model;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			LiveViewBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GreenBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			DriveModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LSWBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			WBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			CIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LSCIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsProgModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ChangeMainWindowState(0);
			ResizeBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		else
		{
			LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
			{
				ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.ExpBracketStepCbxItems;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketStepCurrentIndex;
			}
			else
			{
				ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
			{
				IndependentMirrorUp = true;
				Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				Lvz12xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUp.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItem_Flat.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				FmtCbi_TIFF.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			else
			{
				IndependentMirrorUp = false;
				if (_mtpDevice.IsCISatobiSupported)
				{
					CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					CICbxItem_Satobi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsPcLvHighResolutionSupported)
				{
					WinCntxItemExpand.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					WinCntxItemExpand.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					ChangeMainWindowState(0);
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
				{
					Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else
				{
					Lvx2xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				Lvz12xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_MUp.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP"))
				{
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else
				{
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsSelfTimerContinuousNewSupported)
				{
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MUpRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_MultiExpSelfTimer2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				CICbxItem_Flat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (_mtpDevice.Model == "PENTAX K-3")
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					Lvz16xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1"))
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					CICbxItemAutoSelect.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					CamFocusAssistExtractCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					Lvz10xCbi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
				}
				FmtCbi_TIFF.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			}
			CIModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			WBModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (!_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z") && _mtpDevice.Model != "PENTAX K-3")
			{
				WBCbxItemFlash.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			}
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			_expStepFlg = _mtpDevice.IsExposureStepHalf;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		SerialNoLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.SerialNumber;
		ShutterSpeedCbx.Items.Clear();
		ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.TvCbxItems;
		ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex;
		ApertureCbx.Items.Clear();
		ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.AvCbxItems;
		ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex;
		SensitivityCbx.Items.Clear();
		SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.SvCbxItems;
		SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex;
		ExpCmpCbx.Items.Clear();
		ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.XvCbxItems;
		ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			ZoomSlider.Maximum = _mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems.Count - 1;
			_ocFocalLength.Clear();
			_ocFocalLength = new ObservableCollection<string>(_mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems);
			FocalLengthCbx.ItemsSource = _ocFocalLength;
			FocalLengthCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FLCurrentIdx;
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = true;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked = true;
			LsProgModeImg.Source = LsProgModeImages[_mtpDevice.ProgMode];
			ImageSizeCbiSetting(1);
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.SD1State == 0)
		{
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				SD1WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = false;
			}
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.SD2State == 0)
		{
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = false;
		}
		_mtpDevice.IsRawSaving = RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.IsJpgSaving = JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.IsTifSaving = TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		_mtpDevice.SDWritingMode = (SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value ? 1 : 0) + (SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value ? 2 : 0);
		_mtpDevice.TouchAFSwitch = TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex > 0;
		_mtpDevice.IsReleaseWithAF = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf;
		_mtpDevice.LvZoomMag = byte.Parse(((ComboBoxItem)LvZoomMagnificationCbx.SelectedItem).Content.ToString().TrimEnd('x'));
		_mtpDevice.Dcu5Path = _pathOfDcu5;
		_mtpDevice.Dcu5LinkSw = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
		_mtpDevice.LrPlginLinkSw = _cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin;
		_mtpDevice.IsShowLargePostView = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		if (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D")
		{
			SD1Img.Source = SD1Images[_mtpDevice.SD1State];
			SD2Img.Source = SD2Images[_mtpDevice.SD2State];
			SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		else
		{
			SD1Img.Source = SD1ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd1CardState];
			if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
			{
				InMemoryLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			else
			{
				SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot)
			{
				SD2Img.Source = SD2ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd2CardState];
				SD2WritingModeChk.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			else
			{
				SD2Img.Source = null;
				SD2WritingModeChk.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsApertureKeepSupported && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn)
			{
				ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsColorTempSettingSupported)
			{
				WBColorTempBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
