			if (_mtpDevice.IsCIDetailParameterSupported)
			{
				CIDetailsBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GreenBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			AFBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = true;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			LvZoomMagnificationCbx.IsEnabled = true;
			FocusFineTunePanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCamConnected);
		CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
		_mtpDevice.IsDotNet451Later = _isDotNet451Later;
		_mtpDevice.IsOuterViewer = _existOuterViewer;
		_mtpDevice.OuterViewerPath = _outerViewerPath;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			PcLiveViewStart();
		}
	}

	private void ConnectBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			ConnectDevice(msgSw: true);
			if (!IsConnected)
			{
				ConnectBtn.IsChecked = false;
				System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
				toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnConnect;
				try
				{
					ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
				}
				catch (Exception)
				{
				}
			}
		}
		else
		{
			DisconnectDevice();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCamDisconnected);
		}
	}

	private void DisconnectDevice()
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			IsConnected = false;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCameraSettingFailed;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpDestinationFolderChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamParameterListChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamConditionChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamFileTransferred;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamPostViewChanged;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified;
			_mtpDevice.PropertyChanged -= _mtpCamLVChanged;
			_mtpCamParameterListChanged = null;
			_mtpCamConditionChanged = null;
			_mtpCamFileTransferred = null;
			_mtpCamPostViewChanged = null;
			_mtpCamTransferringFileNameNotified = null;
			_mtpCamLVChanged = null;
			_mtpDevice.Disconnect();
			_mtpDevice = null;
			LastExposureMode = -1;
			LastProgramMode = -1;
			LastDriveMode = -1;
			LastDriveModeNew = -1;
			LastMirrorUpMode = false;
			LastAFMode = -1;
			LastWBMode = -1;
			LastCIMode = -1;
			LastBatteryLevel = -1;
			LastLvAfMode = -1;
			IndependentMirrorUp = false;
			IsOperationInhibited = false;
			LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag = false;
			ConnectStateImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ConnectBtn.IsChecked = false;
			System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
			toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnConnect;
			ConnectBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
			ModelNameLbl.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.Model_NoConnect;
			SerialNoLbl.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.Serial_NoConnect;
			BatteryLevelImg.Source = null;
			GPSStatusImg.Source = null;
			GPSStatusImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			TempWarningImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpModeImg.Source = null;
			LsProgModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsUserMovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UserModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			HyperModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShiftModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			AdvHypLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			AFModeImg.Source = null;
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBCbxItemFlash.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CIModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			ISOAutoLbl.Content = "";
			SD1Img.Source = SD1Images[0];
			SD2Img.Source = SD2Images[0];
			SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1FmtImg.Source = null;
			SD2FmtImg.Source = null;
			SD1SizeImg.Source = null;
			SD2SizeImg.Source = null;
			SD1StarImg.Source = null;
			SD2StarImg.Source = null;
			SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1RemainLbl.Content = "";
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2RemainLbl.Content = "";
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = true;
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsEnabled = true;
			ImageSizeCbiSetting(0);
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			PostViewImg.Source = null;
			PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			ApertureKeepBtnImg.Source = ApertureKeepImages[0];
			WBColorTempBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CIDetailsBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableXv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LsUnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ResizeBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GreenBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			AFBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = false;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			LvZoomMagnificationCbx.IsEnabled = false;
			FocusFineTunePanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			LiveViewBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GbxMovieTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			GreenBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			DriveModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LSWBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			WBModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LSCIModeLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileNameInTransfer.Content = "";
			FileTransferringImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LblMovieFileFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LastMovieModeFlag = false;
			MoviePixSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MovieFrameRateCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = null;
			LblRAWPlusFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			StillShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
	}

	private void ImageSaveSettingCheck()
	{
		bool flag = false;
		bool flag2 = false;
		bool flag3 = false;
		bool flag4 = false;
		bool flag5 = false;
		bool flag6 = false;
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
			{
				flag5 = true;
			}
			else
			{
				flag6 = true;
			}
		}
		if (SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value)
		{
			if ((_mtpDevice.Model != "645D" && _mtpDevice.Sd1CardState == 4) || (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D" && _mtpDevice.SD1State > 0))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
				{
					flag = true;
				}
				else
				{
					flag2 = true;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				flag2 = true;
			}
		}
		else if (!_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
		{
			flag2 = true;
		}
		else if (RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD1Format > 0 && _mtpDevice.SD1Format < 5)
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		else if (JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && (_mtpDevice.SD1Format == 0 || _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 3 || _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 4))
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		else if (TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 5)
		{
			flag = true;
		}
		if (SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value)
		{
			if ((_mtpDevice.Model != "645D" && _mtpDevice.Sd2CardState == 4) || (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D" && _mtpDevice.SD2State > 0))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
				{
					flag3 = true;
				}
				else
				{
					flag4 = true;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				flag4 = true;
			}
		}
		else if (!_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot || !_mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
		{
			flag4 = true;
		}
		else if (RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD2Format > 0 && _mtpDevice.SD2Format < 5)
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		else if (JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && (_mtpDevice.SD2Format == 0 || _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 3 || _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 4))
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		else if (TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value && _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 5)
		{
			flag3 = true;
		}
		if (!(flag || flag3 || flag5))
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamMessageFlag = true;
			if (!_imageSaveWarningShowed)
			{
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = true;
				System.Windows.MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxNoImageSaving, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation);
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = false;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamMessageFlag = false;
			if (_imageSaveWarningShowed)
			{
				MessageBoxEx.Close("IMAGE Transmitter 2");
				_imageSaveWarningShowed = false;
			}
		}
	}

	private void MainWindow01_Closing(object sender, CancelEventArgs e)
	{
		DisplayChanged -= _bulbTimerTicked;
		_bulbTimerTicked = null;
		UnregisterUsbDeviceNotification();
		foreach (MtpDevice mtpDevice in _mtpDevices)
		{
			mtpDevice.Disconnect();
		}
		Settings.Default.IsRAWSaving = RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsJPEGSaving = JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsTIFFSaving = TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsReleaseWithAF = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf;
		Settings.Default.IsSD1Writing = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.IsSD2Writing = SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		Settings.Default.TouchAFMode = (byte)TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex;
		Settings.Default.SaveFolder = _saveFolder;
		Settings.Default.FolderSaved = true;
		Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left = base.Left;
		Settings.Default.MainWindow_Top = base.Top;
		Settings.Default.ViewImgByDCU5 = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
		Settings.Default.IsDispLVGrid = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.LVGridSpace = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.TypeOfLVGrid = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.LVGridScaleInterval = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		Settings.Default.IsShowPostViewWindow = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		Settings.Default.LVGridColorIndex = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex;
		Settings.Default.IsUseBulbTimer = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsUseBulbTimer;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Left = PVWindow.Left;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Top = PVWindow.Top;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Width = PVWindow.Width;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Height = PVWindow.Height;
		Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_WindowState = PVWindow.WindowState;
		Settings.Default.MainWindowState = _mainWindowState;
		Settings.Default.IsAutoSubFolder = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder;
		Settings.Default.RuleOfSubFolder = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder;
		Settings.Default.SubFolderBaseName = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName;
		Settings.Default.SubFolderDigits = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber;
		Settings.Default.ShowApertureFixBtn = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn;
		Settings.Default.Save();
		PVWindow.isShutdownRequest = true;
		PVWindow.Close();
	}

	private void PcLiveViewStart()
	{
		LiveViewImg.Source = null;
		PostViewImg.Source = null;
		try
		{
			_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = true;
		}
		catch
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			throw new Exception();
		}
		if (!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
		{
			return;
		}
		PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("RICOH G900SE"))
		{
			LS_Setting.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LVSpecialFunctionTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvSettingTi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LvControlTab.SelectedIndex = 3;
		}
		else
		{
			LS_Setting.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LVSpecialFunctionTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvSettingTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LvControlTab.SelectedIndex = 0;
		}
		LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		RotateLvPanel(sw: false);
		AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
		Point liveViewAFPosition = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition;
		if (LVCanvas.Width < (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth)
		{
			_lvSizeRatio = LVCanvas.Width / (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth;
			liveViewAFPosition.X = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.X * _lvSizeRatio;
			liveViewAFPosition.Y = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.Y * _lvSizeRatio;
		}
		else
		{
			_lvSizeRatio = 1.0;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
		{
			liveViewAFPosition.Offset(41.0, 1.0);
		}
		else if (_mtpDevice.IsCompositionAdjSupported)
		{
			CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CompositionCtrlChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjState > 0;
			if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjState == 1)
			{
				_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustmentSw = true;
			}
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjX))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustX.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjX).ToString();
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjY))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustY.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjY).ToString();
			switch (Math.Sign(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjR))
			{
			case 0:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[0];
				break;
			case -1:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[1];
				break;
			case 1:
				AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[2];
				break;
			}
			CompositionAdjustR.Content = Math.Abs(_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjR).ToString();
		}
		Canvas.SetLeft(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.X - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		Canvas.SetTop(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.Y - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		AFAreaBdr.Width = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio;
		AFAreaBdr.Height = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio;
		AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
		{
			createLVGrid();
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.IsEnabled = false;
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FocusPeakingMode;
		CamFocusAssistSettingCbx.IsEnabled = true;
	}

	private void LiveViewBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			if (!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
			{
				try
				{
					PcLiveViewStart();
				}
				catch
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxLvNotStarted);
					return;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				try
				{
					_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				catch
				{
					LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = true;
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxLvNotStopped);
					return;
				}
				LiveViewImg.Source = null;
				PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				RotateLvPanel(sw: true);
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
				_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = false;
			}
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode;
		}
		else
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewFrameRefreshed(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new LiveViewFrameRefreshDelegate(LiveViewRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void LiveViewRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (LiveViewBtn.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
		{
			if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == false)
			{
				return;
			}
		}
		else if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "LiveViewRefreshed")
		{
			try
			{
				jpgLv = new JpegBitmapDecoder(_mtpDevice.MemStreamLVFrame, BitmapCreateOptions.PreservePixelFormat, BitmapCacheOption.OnLoad);
				LiveViewImg.Source = jpgLv.Frames[0];
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
			}
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "LiveViewRotated")
		{
			RotateLvPanel(sw: false);
		}
		if (_isLvZoomCanceled)
		{
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
			{
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			_isLvZoomCanceled = false;
		}
	}

	private void TransferringFileNameNotified(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new TransferringFileNameNotifyDelegate(TransferringFileNameNotify), sender, e);
	}

	private void TransferringFileNameNotify(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.PropertyName == "TransferringFileNameNotified")
		{
			try
			{
				FileNameInTransfer.Content = _mtpDevice.SaveFileName;
				FileTransferringImg.Source = FileTransferringIndicaterImages[0];
				FileTransferringImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
			}
		}
	}

	private void PostViewRefreshed(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new PostViewRefreshDelegate(PostViewRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void PostViewRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!(e.PropertyName == "PostViewRefreshed"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			FileNameInTransfer.Content = _mtpDevice.SaveFileName;
			FileTransferringImg.Source = FileTransferringIndicaterImages[0];
			FileTransferringImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			jpgPostView = new JpegBitmapDecoder(_mtpDevice.MemStreamPostView, BitmapCreateOptions.IgnoreImageCache, BitmapCacheOption.OnLoad);
			_mtpDevice.MemStreamPostView.Dispose();
			jpgPostView.Frames[0].Freeze();
			if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
			{
				PostViewImg.Source = jpgPostView.Frames[0];
				RotatePostView(_mtpDevice.PostViewRotate);
			}
			else
			{
				LiveViewImg.Source = jpgPostView.Frames[0];
				RotateLvPanel(sw: false);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
		}
		finally
		{
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
		}
	}

	private void LargePostViewRefreshed(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new LargePostViewRefreshDelegate(LargePostViewRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void LargePostViewRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!(e.PropertyName == "LargePostViewRefreshed"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			PVWindow.Show();
			PVWindow.LargePostViewImage.Source = null;
			PVWindow.Title = _mtpDevice.SaveFileName + " - IMAGE Transmitter 2";
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			Thread.Sleep(5);
			BitmapDecoder bitmapDecoder = BitmapDecoder.Create(_mtpDevice.MemStreamLargePostView, BitmapCreateOptions.IgnoreImageCache, BitmapCacheOption.OnLoad);
			_mtpDevice.MemStreamLargePostView.Dispose();
			bitmapDecoder.Frames[0].Freeze();
			if (bitmapDecoder.Frames.Count > 1)
			{
				bitmapDecoder.Frames[1].Freeze();
			}
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			Thread.Sleep(5);
			PVWindow.LargePostViewImage.Source = bitmapDecoder.Frames[0];
			PVWindow.Rotation = _mtpDevice.PostViewRotate;
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
		}
		finally
		{
			if (_isDotNet451Later)
			{
				GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode = GCLargeObjectHeapCompactionMode.CompactOnce;
			}
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
			GC.WaitForPendingFinalizers();
			GC.Collect(2, GCCollectionMode.Forced);
		}
	}

	private void ChangeUI4MovieMode(bool isMovie)
	{
		if (isMovie)
		{
			GbxMovieTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
			{
				ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			_mtpDevice.IsMovieSaving = MovieAcquisitionSw.IsChecked.Value;
			if (movieRecordingTimer == null)
			{
				movieRecordingTimerDelegate = MovieRecordingTimerTask;
				movieRecordingTimer = new System.Threading.Timer(movieRecordingTimerDelegate, null, -1, -1);
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot)
			{
				SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
				{
					SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			else if (_mtpDevice.MovieCardSlotSetting == 1)
			{
				SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			else
			{
				SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			WBCbxItemMultiAWB.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				ExpModeImg.Source = LsExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
				if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 3 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 4)
				{
					LsUserMovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				ExpModeImg.Source = MovieExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
			}
			StillShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LblMovieFileFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			LblRAWPlusFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieSettingSupported)
			{
				SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			else
			{
				MoviePixSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				MovieFrameRateCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			CompositionAdjTi.IsEnabled = false;
			UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1"))
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				LiveViewImg.Source = null;
				PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				RotateLvPanel(sw: true);
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			}
			else if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
			{
				_mtpDevice.RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo();
				if (LVGrid.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
				{
					createLVGrid();
				}
			}
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			return;
		}
		GbxMovieTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		GbxTransferFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
		{
			ExpBktLvl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpBracketModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.ExpBracketStepCbxItems;
			ExpBracketStepCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketStepCurrentIndex;
		}
		MovieRecordingTimer(sw: false);
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			ExpModeImg.Source = LsExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
			LsUserMovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		else
		{
			WBCbxItemMultiAWB.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ExpModeImg.Source = ExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
			FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			DriveModeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CompositionAdjTi.IsEnabled = true;
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1"))
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			else if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
			{
				_mtpDevice.RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo();
				if (LVGrid.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
				{
					createLVGrid();
				}
			}
		}
		StillShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		LblMovieFileFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		FileImageSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		FileJpgCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
		{
			SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		else
		{
			SD1FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot)
		{
			_lastMovieSlotSetting = -1;
			SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			SD2FmtImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			SlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			MovieSlotSettingCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		MoviePixSizeCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		MovieFrameRateCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
	}

	private void FileTransferred(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new FileTransferDelegate(CamFileTransferred), sender, e);
	}

	private void CamFileTransferred(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.PropertyName == "FileTransferred")
		{
			try
			{
				FileTransferringImg.Source = FileTransferringIndicaterImages[1];
				FileTransferringImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			catch (Exception)
			{
			}
			CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
		}
	}

	private void CalcAvailableDriveSpace()
	{
		double num = ((_driveToSave == null) ? ((double)freeBytesAvailable / 1048576.0) : ((double)_driveToSave.AvailableFreeSpace / 1048576.0));
		string toolTip;
		if (num < 1024.0)
		{
			toolTip = num.ToString("#.0MB");
		}
		else
		{
			num /= 1024.0;
			toolTip = ((!(num < 1024.0)) ? (num / 1024.0).ToString("#.0TB") : num.ToString("#.0GB"));
		}
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		bool? isChecked = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked;
		bool flag = false;
		if (isChecked.GetValueOrDefault() == flag && isChecked.HasValue && _mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
		{
			SD1RemainLbl.ToolTip = toolTip;
		}
		else
		{
			SD1RemainLbl.ToolTip = null;
		}
		isChecked = SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked;
		flag = false;
		if (isChecked.GetValueOrDefault() == flag && isChecked.HasValue && _mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
		{
			SD2RemainLbl.ToolTip = toolTip;
			return;
		}
		isChecked = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked;
		flag = false;
		if (isChecked.GetValueOrDefault() == flag && isChecked.HasValue && _mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
		{
			SD2RemainLbl.ToolTip = toolTip;
		}
		else
		{
			SD2RemainLbl.ToolTip = null;
		}
	}

	private void MovieRecordingTimer(bool sw)
	{
		if (movieRecordingTimer != null)
		{
			if (sw)
			{
				movieRecordingTimer.Change(0, 1000);
			}
			else
			{
				movieRecordingTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			}
		}
	}

	private void MovieRecordingTimerTask(object o)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			movieRecordingTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			return;
		}
		_movieRecordingTimeCounter++;
		if (_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
		{
			base.Dispatcher.Invoke(delegate
			{
				SD1RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, _movieRecordingTimeCounter).ToString();
			});
		}
		else if (_mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
		{
			base.Dispatcher.Invoke(delegate
			{
				SD2RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, _movieRecordingTimeCounter).ToString();
			});
		}
	}

	private void CamConditionChanged(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new CamConditionRefreshDelegate(CamConditionDispRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void CamConditionDispRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected || IsMouseOperating || !(e.PropertyName == "ConditionChanged"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.SdWritingModeChanged || LastSD1Format != _mtpDevice.SD1Format || LastSD2Format != _mtpDevice.SD2Format || LastSD1Activity != _mtpDevice.SD1Activity || LastSD2Activity != _mtpDevice.SD2Activity)
			{
				_mtpDevice.SdWritingModeChanged = false;
				LastSD1Format = _mtpDevice.SD1Format;
				LastSD2Format = _mtpDevice.SD2Format;
				LastSD1Activity = _mtpDevice.SD1Activity;
				LastSD2Activity = _mtpDevice.SD2Activity;
				SlotSettingCbxImgChengeRequest = true;
				ImageSaveSettingCheck();
				CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsShooting)
			{
				_isLvZoomCanceled = true;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsMultiCaptureMode && _mtpDevice.IsMultiCapturing)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMultiExposuring);
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsRemoteControl && LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
			{
				if (!LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotRCwUSBLV);
					LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag = true;
				}
			}
			else if (LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				LastRemoteControlWithLvFlag = false;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketMode)
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
				{
					if (!_isBktModeModifing)
					{
						ExpBracketModeCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketMode;
					}
					if (!ExpBracketStepCbx.IsEnabled)
					{
						ExpBracketStepCbx.IsEnabled = true;
					}
					if (!_isBktStepModifing)
					{
						ExpBracketStepCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketStepCurrentIndex;
					}
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.BracketCount != 0)
				{
					_brackettingStarted = true;
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxExpBracketting);
				}
				else
				{
					_brackettingStarted = false;
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (_brackettingStarted)
				{
					_brackettingStarted = false;
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsExpBracketSupport)
				{
					if (!_isBktModeModifing)
					{
						ExpBracketModeCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.EvBracketMode;
					}
					if (ExpBracketStepCbx.IsEnabled)
					{
						ExpBracketStepCbx.IsEnabled = false;
					}
				}
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsAstroTracer3)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				if (_mtpDevice.IsAstroTracer3PreExp)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxAstroTracer3TestExposure);
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.IsAstroTracer3MainExp)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxAstroTracer3MainExposure);
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.IsAstro3MovementDetectFailed)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxAstroTracer3MovmentNotDetected);
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.IsAstro3ExposureTimeTooLong)
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxAstroTracer3ExpTimeFailed);
				}
				else
				{
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxAstroTracer3Mode);
				}
				_isAstro3Disp = true;
			}
			else if (_isAstro3Disp)
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				_isAstro3Disp = false;
			}
			if (LastMovieModeFlag != _mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				ChangeUI4MovieMode(_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode);
				LastMovieModeFlag = _mtpDevice.IsMovieMode;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieRecording)
				{
					if (MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility == Visibility.Hidden)
					{
						movieRecordingTimer.Change(1000, 1000);
						_movieRecordingTimeCounter = 1;
						if (_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
						{
							SD1RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, _movieRecordingTimeCounter).ToString();
						}
						else
						{
							SD2RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, _movieRecordingTimeCounter).ToString();
						}
						MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					if (!_isInitiateCaptureFromApp)
					{
						MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
						MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMovieShooting);
						_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = true;
						LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = false;
					}
				}
				else
				{
					if (MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
					{
						movieRecordingTimer.Change(-1, -1);
						MovieShutterBtnImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						MovieShutterBtnOnRecordingImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					}
					if (_isInitiateCaptureFromApp)
					{
						MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
						_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = false;
						LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = true;
					}
				}
				if (!_IsMoviePixSizeChanging)
				{
					MoviePixSizeCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.MoviePixSize;
				}
				if (!_IsMovieFrameRateChanging)
				{
					MovieFrameRateCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.MovieFrameRate;
				}
			}
			bool flag;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				flag = !_mtpDevice.IsMovieSupported | !(SD1WritingModeChk.IsEnabled | (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot & SD2WritingModeChk.IsEnabled));
			}
			else
			{
				flag = _mtpDevice.IsIntervalMode | ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 15) | ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 22);
				flag |= _mtpDevice.IsNoiseReducing;
			}
			if ((long)_mtpDevice.ProgMode == 33)
			{
				flag = flag || true;
			}
			if (flag)
			{
				if (!IsOperationInhibited)
				{
					if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
					{
						try
						{
							_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = false;
						}
						catch
						{
						}
						LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
						PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
						{
							LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						else
						{
							LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						}
						LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						RotateLvPanel(sw: true);
					}
					LiveViewImg.Source = null;
					PostViewImg.Source = null;
				}
				ControlDisableSetting(IsEnabled: false);
				IsOperationInhibited = true;
			}
			else
			{
				ControlDisableSetting(IsEnabled: true);
				IsOperationInhibited = false;
			}
			if (IndependentMirrorUp && _mtpDevice.IsMirroUpMode != LastMirrorUpMode)
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsMirroUpMode)
				{
					ExModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				else
				{
					ExModeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				}
				LastMirrorUpMode = _mtpDevice.IsMirroUpMode;
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode && ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 20 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 9 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 12))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsCamBulbTimer)
				{
					DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.CamBulbTimerValue;
					ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					_useAppBulbTimerFlag = false;
				}
				else if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 20 || AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsUseBulbTimer)
				{
					DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = "";
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 20 && !_isInitiateCaptureFromApp)
					{
						TimeSpan timeSpan = new TimeSpan(0, 0, 0, (int)_mtpDevice.AstroTracerTimeLimit);
						if (TSBulbTime > timeSpan)
						{
							TSBulbTime = timeSpan;
						}
					}
					RefreshTbxBulbTime(sbte.sec);
					ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					_useAppBulbTimerFlag = true;
				}
				else
				{
					DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = "Bulb";
					ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					_useAppBulbTimerFlag = false;
				}
			}
			if (LastExposureMode != _mtpDevice.ExposureMode || (_mtpDevice.IsLS && LastProgramMode != _mtpDevice.ProgMode))
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
				{
					ExpModeImg.Source = LsExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 1 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 6)
					{
						LsProgModeImg.Source = null;
					}
					else
					{
						LsProgModeImg.Source = LsProgModeImages[_mtpDevice.ProgMode];
					}
					DoEvents();
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 6)
					{
						ImageSizeCbiSetting(2);
					}
					else
					{
						ImageSizeCbiSetting(1);
					}
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ProgMode == 32)
					{
						CbiFixed.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						CbiMacro.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						CbiMacro1cm.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						CbiPanFocus.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					}
					else
					{
						CbiFixed.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						CbiMacro.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						CbiMacro1cm.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						CbiPanFocus.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ProgMode == 35)
					{
						ZoomGrpBx.IsEnabled = false;
						LSFocusSettingPanel.IsEnabled = false;
					}
					else if ((long)_mtpDevice.ProgMode == 41)
					{
						LSFocusSettingPanel.IsEnabled = false;
					}
					else
					{
						LSFocusSettingPanel.IsEnabled = true;
					}
				}
				else if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
				{
					ExpModeImg.Source = MovieExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
				}
				else
				{
					ExpModeImg.Source = ExpModeImages[_mtpDevice.ExposureMode];
					if (_mtpDevice.IsTvBracketSupport && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 4)
					{
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
					}
					else if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III") && ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 13 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 14))
					{
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					else
					{
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MotionBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					}
					if (_mtpDevice.IsAvBracketSupport && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 5)
					{
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
					}
					else if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III") && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 13)
					{
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					else
					{
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBracket.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_DOFBktRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					}
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 9 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 12 || (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 20)
					{
						ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						_fixefTvValue = true;
						ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						_isBulb = true;
						DriveCbxItem_ContH.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_ContL.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						if (_mtpDevice.IsSelfTimerContinuousNewSupported)
						{
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						}
						else
						{
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						}
						DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MultiExpCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
					}
					else if ((long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 18)
					{
						DriveCbxItem_ContH.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_ContL.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2s.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						DriveCbxItem_MultiExpCont.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
						ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = "LS";
						ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						_fixefTvValue = true;
						_isBulb = false;
					}
					else
					{
						DriveCbxItem_ContH.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_ContL.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2s.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						if (_mtpDevice.IsSelfTimerContinuousNewSupported)
						{
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContHi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContMi.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmr2secContLo.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf2sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						else
						{
							DriveCbxItem_SelfTmrCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						if (_mtpDevice.IsRemoteContinuousNewSupported)
						{
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_H.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3secCont_L.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote3sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						else if (!_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_RemoteCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						DriveCbxItem_MultiExpCont.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_Int.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						DriveCbxItem_IntMulti.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						if (!_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_ContM.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_Bracket.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_BracketSelf.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_IntMovie.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							DriveCbxItem_StarStream.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && _mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_BracketRemote.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						if (!_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP"))
						{
							DriveCbxItem_Remote3Sec.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						}
						ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						ExpTimerDisp.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
						ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						_fixefTvValue = false;
						_isBulb = false;
					}
				}
				LastExposureMode = _mtpDevice.ExposureMode;
				if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
				{
					LastProgramMode = _mtpDevice.ProgMode;
				}
			}
			AdvHypLbl.Visibility = ((!_mtpDevice.AdvancedHyperMode) ? Visibility.Hidden : Visibility.Visible);
			HyperModeImg.Visibility = ((!_mtpDevice.HyperMode) ? Visibility.Hidden : Visibility.Visible);
			ShiftModeImg.Visibility = ((!_mtpDevice.ShiftMode) ? Visibility.Hidden : Visibility.Visible);
			UserModeImg.Visibility = ((!_mtpDevice.UserMode) ? Visibility.Hidden : Visibility.Visible);
			if (_mtpDevice.Model != "645D")
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsAvChangeable)
				{
					ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					if (!_IsAvModifing && ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex)
					{
						ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex;
					}
				}
				else if (!IsOperationInhibited)
				{
					ApertureCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
					if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
					{
						UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						UnchangeableAvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.AvText;
					}
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.ApertureKeepSw)
				{
					ApertureKeepBtnImg.Source = ApertureKeepImages[1];
				}
				else
				{
					ApertureKeepBtnImg.Source = ApertureKeepImages[0];
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsTvChangeable)
				{
					ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					if (!_IsTvModifing && ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode != 18)
					{
						ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex;
					}
				}
				else if (!IsOperationInhibited && !_isBulb)
				{
					ShutterSpeedCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
					if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
					{
						UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						if (!_fixefTvValue)
						{
							UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.TvText;
						}
					}
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsSvChangeable)
				{
					SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
					{
						if (_mtpDevice.IsIsoAuto)
						{
							LsUnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							LsUnchangeableSvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.SvText;
							SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = -1;
							SensitivityCbx.Text = "";
						}
						else
						{
							LsUnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
							SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex;
						}
					}
					else if (!_IsSvModifing && SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex)
					{
						SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex;
					}
				}
				else if (!IsOperationInhibited)
				{
					SensitivityCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					LsUnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
					{
						UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
						UnchangeableSv.Opacity = 1.0;
						UnchangeableSvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.SvText;
					}
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsXvChangeable)
				{
					ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableXv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					if (!_IsXvModifing && ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex)
					{
						ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex;
					}
				}
				else if (!IsOperationInhibited)
				{
					ExpCmpCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					UnchangeableXv.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					UnchangeableXvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.XvText;
				}
				if (!_IsDriveModeModifing && DriveModeCbx.SelectedIndex != DriveModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew])
				{
					DriveModeCbx.SelectedIndex = DriveModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew];
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (!_IsTvModifing && ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode != 18 && !_isBulb)
				{
					ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex;
					UnchangeableTvLabel.Content = _mtpDevice.TvText;
				}
				if (!_IsAvModifing && ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex)
				{
					ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex;
					UnchangeableAvLabel.Content = ApertureCbx.Text;
				}
				if (!_IsSvModifing && SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex)
				{
					SensitivityCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.SvCurrentIndex;
					UnchangeableSvLabel.Content = SensitivityCbx.Text;
				}
				if (!_IsXvModifing && ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex)
				{
					ExpCmpCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.XvCurrentIndex;
				}
				if (LastDriveMode != _mtpDevice.DriveMode)
				{
					LastDriveMode = _mtpDevice.DriveMode;
				}
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsIsoAuto)
			{
				ISOAutoLbl.Content = "AUTO";
			}
			else
			{
				ISOAutoLbl.Content = "";
			}
			if ((_mtpDevice.IsContinuousShootingMode || _isBulb) && LastLvAfMode == -1)
			{
				LastLvAfMode = (byte)TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex;
				TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex = 0;
				TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else if (!_mtpDevice.IsContinuousShootingMode && !_isBulb && LastLvAfMode != -1)
			{
				TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex = LastLvAfMode;
				TouchAFSwitchCbx.IsEnabled = true;
				LastLvAfMode = -1;
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				if (LastAFMode != _mtpDevice.AFMode)
				{
					AFModeImg.Source = AFModeImages[_mtpDevice.AFMode];
					LastAFMode = _mtpDevice.AFMode;
					if (!IsOperationInhibited)
					{
						AFBtn.IsEnabled = _mtpDevice.AFMode > 0;
					}
				}
				if (!_IsWBModifing && WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex != WBModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.WBMode])
				{
					WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex = WBModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.WBMode];
				}
				if (WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex >= WBModeLUT.InternalToNominal[12u] && WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex <= WBModeLUT.InternalToNominal[14u])
				{
					WBColorTempBtn.IsEnabled = true;
					LastColorTemp = _mtpDevice.CurrentColorTemperature;
					WBColorTempBtn.ToolTip = LastColorTemp + "K";
				}
				else
				{
					WBColorTempBtn.IsEnabled = false;
					WBColorTempBtn.ToolTip = null;
				}
				if (!_IsCIModeModifing && CIModeCbx.SelectedIndex != CIModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.CIMode])
				{
					CIModeCbx.SelectedIndex = CIModeLUT.InternalToNominal[(uint)_mtpDevice.CIMode];
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (LastLSFocusSetting != _mtpDevice.LSFocusModeIndex)
				{
					AFModeImg.Source = LsAfModeImages[_mtpDevice.LSFocusModeIndex];
					if (!_IsLSFocusSettingChanging)
					{
						LSFocusSettingCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.LSFocusModeIndex;
						LastLSFocusSetting = _mtpDevice.LSFocusModeIndex;
					}
					if ((long)_mtpDevice.LSFocusModeIndex == 5)
					{
						LSFocusFineTunePanel.IsEnabled = true;
					}
					else
					{
						LSFocusFineTunePanel.IsEnabled = false;
					}
				}
				if (!_IsLSWBModifing && LSWBModeCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.LSWBMode)
				{
					LSWBModeCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.LSWBMode;
				}
				LSCIModeImg.Source = LsCIModeImages[_mtpDevice.CIMode];
				if (_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
				{
					SD2FmtImg.Source = FormatImagesNew[0];
					SD2RemainLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.InternalMemoryRemain.ToString();
					SD2SizeImg.Source = ImageSizeImages[_mtpDevice.ImageSize];
					SD2StarImg.Source = StarImages[_mtpDevice.JpegQuality];
				}
				if (!_IsFocalLengthChanging && FocalLengthCbx.SelectedIndex != _mtpDevice.FLCurrentIdx)
				{
					FocalLengthCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FLCurrentIdx;
				}
			}
			if (LastBatteryLevel != _mtpDevice.BatteryLevel)
			{
				BatteryLevelImg.Source = BatteryLevelImages[_mtpDevice.BatteryLevel];
				LastBatteryLevel = _mtpDevice.BatteryLevel;
			}
			if (LastGPSStatus != (int)_mtpDevice.GPSState)
			{
				LastGPSStatus = (int)_mtpDevice.GPSState;
				if (LastGPSStatus == 0)
				{
					GPSStatusImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				}
				else
				{
					GPSStatusImg.Source = GPSStatusImages[LastGPSStatus - 1];
					GPSStatusImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.IsTempWarning && TempWarningImg.Visibility == Visibility.Hidden)
			{
				TempWarningImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsTempWarning && TempWarningImg.Visibility == Visibility.Visible)
			{
				TempWarningImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.Model == "645D")
			{
				SD1FmtImg.Source = FormatImages[_mtpDevice.SD1Format];
				SD2FmtImg.Source = FormatImages[_mtpDevice.SD2Format];
				if (_mtpDevice.SD1Format == 1 || _mtpDevice.SD1Format == 3)
				{
					SD1SizeImg.Source = null;
					SD1StarImg.Source = null;
				}
				else
				{
					SD1SizeImg.Source = ImageSizeImages[_mtpDevice.ImageSize];
					SD1StarImg.Source = StarImages[_mtpDevice.JpegQuality];
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.SD2Format == 1 || _mtpDevice.SD2Format == 3)
				{
					SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
					SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
				}
				else
				{
					SD2SizeImg.Source = ImageSizeImages[_mtpDevice.ImageSize];
					SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					SD2StarImg.Source = StarImages[_mtpDevice.JpegQuality];
					SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.SD1WritingMode)
				{
					SD1Img.Source = SD1ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd1CardState];
				}
				else
				{
					SD1Img.Source = SD1Images[_mtpDevice.SD1State];
				}
				if (!_mtpDevice.InternalDriveActivity)
				{
					SD1FmtImg.Source = FormatImagesNew[_mtpDevice.SD1Format];
					if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
					{
						if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieRecording && _mtpDevice.IsMovieSettingSupported)
						{
							SD1SizeImg.Source = MoviePixSizeImages[_mtpDevice.MoviePixSize];
							SD1StarImg.Source = MovieFrameRateImages[_mtpDevice.MovieFrameRate];
							SD1RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, (int)_mtpDevice.SD1Remain).ToString();
						}
					}
					else
					{
						SD1RemainLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.SD1Remain.ToString();
						switch (_mtpDevice.SD1Format)
						{
						case 1:
						case 2:
						case 5:
							SD1SizeImg.Source = null;
							SD1StarImg.Source = null;
							break;
						default:
							SD1SizeImg.Source = ImageSizeImages[_mtpDevice.ImageSize];
							SD1StarImg.Source = StarImages[_mtpDevice.JpegQuality];
							break;
						}
					}
				}
				if (!_IsFileFormatChanging)
				{
					FileFormatCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.CamWritingFileFormat;
				}
				if (!_IsFileImageSizeChanging)
				{
					FileImageSizeCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.ImageSize;
				}
				_ = _mtpDevice.ImageSize;
				if (!_IsJpegCmpChanging)
				{
					FileJpgCmpCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.JpegQuality;
				}
				if (_mtpDevice.IsDualSlot)
				{
					if (_mtpDevice.SD2WritingMode)
					{
						SD2Img.Source = SD2ImagesNew[_mtpDevice.Sd2CardState];
					}
					else
					{
						SD2Img.Source = SD2Images[_mtpDevice.SD2State];
					}
					if (!_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
					{
						SD2FmtImg.Source = FormatImagesNew[_mtpDevice.SD2Format];
						SD2RemainLbl.Content = _mtpDevice.SD2Remain.ToString();
						switch (_mtpDevice.SD2Format)
						{
						case 1:
						case 2:
						case 5:
							SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
							SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
							break;
						default:
							SD2SizeImg.Source = ImageSizeImages[_mtpDevice.ImageSize];
							SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							SD2StarImg.Source = StarImages[_mtpDevice.JpegQuality];
							SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							break;
						}
						if (!_IsSlotSettingChanging)
						{
							SlotSettingCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.CardSlotSetting;
							if (SlotSettingCbx.SelectedIndex == 2)
							{
								FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								LblRAWPlusFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							}
							else
							{
								FileFormatCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								LblRAWPlusFormat.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								if (_mtpDevice.CurrentWritingSlot < 0)
								{
									if (SlotSettingCbx.SelectedIndex == 0 && SlotSettingCbxImgChengeRequest)
									{
										if (_mtpDevice.SD1Activity)
										{
											SlotSequentialCbiImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images/SLOT_RESERVE_SD2.png", UriKind.Relative));
										}
										else
										{
											SlotSequentialCbiImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images/SLOT_RESERVE_SD1.png", UriKind.Relative));
										}
										SlotSettingCbxImgChengeRequest = false;
									}
								}
								else if (_mtpDevice.CurrentWritingSlot == 0)
								{
									SlotSequentialCbiImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images/SLOT_RESERVE_SD2.png", UriKind.Relative));
								}
								else
								{
									SlotSequentialCbiImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images/SLOT_RESERVE_SD1.png", UriKind.Relative));
								}
							}
						}
					}
					else
					{
						if (_lastMovieSlotSetting != _mtpDevice.MovieCardSlotSetting)
						{
							_lastMovieSlotSetting = _mtpDevice.MovieCardSlotSetting;
							MovieSlotSettingCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.MovieCardSlotSetting;
							if (_mtpDevice.MovieCardSlotSetting == 0)
							{
								SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
							}
							else
							{
								SD1MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD2MovieLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD1SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD1StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD2SizeImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD2StarImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
								SD1RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
								SD2RemainLbl.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
							}
						}
						if (_mtpDevice.SD2Activity && !_mtpDevice.IsMovieRecording && _mtpDevice.IsMovieSettingSupported)
						{
							SD2SizeImg.Source = MoviePixSizeImages[_mtpDevice.MoviePixSize];
							SD2StarImg.Source = MovieFrameRateImages[_mtpDevice.MovieFrameRate];
							SD2RemainLbl.Content = new TimeSpan(0, 0, (int)_mtpDevice.SD2Remain).ToString();
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.AFMode == 0 || _mtpDevice.UsbLvAfState)
			{
				AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
			}
			else
			{
				switch (_mtpDevice.UsbLvAfResult)
				{
				case 1:
					AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Lime);
					break;
				case 2:
					AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Red);
					break;
				default:
					AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
					break;
				}
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsCompositionAdjSupported)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjLimX == cmpAdjX)
			{
				if (cmpAdjDirX == 1)
				{
					CompositionAdjLeftBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				}
				else
				{
					CompositionAdjRightBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				CompositionAdjLeftBtn.IsEnabled = true;
				CompositionAdjRightBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjLimY == cmpAdjY)
			{
				if (cmpAdjDirY == 2)
				{
					CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				}
				else
				{
					CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = true;
				CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjLimR == 0)
			{
				CompositionAdjRPlusBtn.IsEnabled = false;
				CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjLimR > cmpAdjR)
			{
				CompositionAdjRPlusBtn.IsEnabled = true;
				CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			else if (cmpAdjDirR == 5)
			{
				CompositionAdjRPlusBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else
			{
				CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
		}
	}

	private void ImageSizeCbiSetting(int mode)
	{
		switch (mode)
		{
		case 0:
			CbiImageSizeL.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeM.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeS.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeXS.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeVGA.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSize2M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSize1M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			break;
		case 1:
			CbiImageSizeL.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeM.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeS.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeXS.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSizeVGA.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSize2M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSize1M.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			break;
		case 2:
			CbiImageSizeL.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSizeM.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSizeS.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSizeXS.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSizeVGA.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			CbiImageSize2M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			CbiImageSize1M.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			break;
		}
	}

	private void CamParamListChanged(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new CamParameterListRefreshDelegate(CamParamListRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void CamParamListRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected && !IsMouseOperating)
		{
			if (e.PropertyName == "TvListChanged")
			{
				ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				ShutterSpeedCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.TvCbxItems;
			}
			if (e.PropertyName == "AvListChanged")
			{
				ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				ApertureCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.AvCbxItems;
			}
			if (e.PropertyName == "SvListChanged")
			{
				SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				SensitivityCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.SvCbxItems;
			}
			if (e.PropertyName == "XvListChanged")
			{
				ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				ExpCmpCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.XvCbxItems;
			}
			if (e.PropertyName == "ExpBracketListChanged")
			{
				ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				ExpBracketStepCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.ExpBracketStepCbxItems;
			}
			if (e.PropertyName == "FocalLengthListChanged")
			{
				ZoomSlider.Maximum = _mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems.Count - 1;
				FocalLengthCbx.ItemsSource = null;
				FocalLengthCbx.ItemsSource = _mtpDevice.FocalLengthCbxItems;
				FocalLengthCbx.SelectedIndex = _mtpDevice.FLCurrentIdx;
			}
		}
	}

	private void DestinationFolderChanged(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new DestinationFolderChangeDelegate(DestinationRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void DestinationRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected || !(e.PropertyName == "DestinationFailed"))
		{
			return;
		}
		ShowSaveFolderSelectDlg();
		try
		{
			_mtpDevice.PollingConditionTimer(sw: true);
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}

	private void CameraSettingFailed(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new CameraSettingFailedDelegate(CameraSettingReset), sender, e);
	}

	private void CameraSettingReset(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "CardWriteModeFailed")
		{
			try
			{
				SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD1WritingMode;
				SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD2WritingMode;
				return;
			}
			catch
			{
				return;
			}
		}
		if (e.PropertyName == "LvStartFailed")
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxLvNotStarted);
		}
		else if (e.PropertyName == "LvStopFailed")
		{
			LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = true;
		}
	}

	[DllImport("kernel32.dll", CharSet = CharSet.Auto)]
	[return: MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.Bool)]
	public static extern bool GetDiskFreeSpaceEx(string ipDirectoryName, out ulong lpFreeBytesAvailable, out ulong lpTotalNumberOfBytes, out ulong lpTotalNumberOfFreeBytes);

	private void SaveFolderBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		ShowSaveFolderSelectDlg();
	}

	private void ShowSaveFolderSelectDlg()
	{
		saveFolderDlg.SelectedPath = _saveFolder;
		if (saveFolderDlg.ShowDialog(win32handle) == System.Windows.Forms.DialogResult.OK)
		{
			_saveFolder = saveFolderDlg.SelectedPath;
			try
			{
				_driveToSave = new DriveInfo(_saveFolder);
			}
			catch
			{
				_driveToSave = null;
				GetDiskFreeSpaceEx(_saveFolder, out freeBytesAvailable, out totalNumberOfBytes, out totalNumberOfFreeBytes);
			}
			CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
		}
		SaveFolderTbx.Text = _saveFolder;
		SaveFolderTbx.ToolTip = _saveFolder;
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			_mtpDevice.saveFolder = SelectSubFolder(_saveFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber);
		}
	}

	private void ExitBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			DisconnectDevice();
		}
		Close();
	}

	private void MainWindow01_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		base.OnMouseLeftButtonDown(e);
		if (e.ButtonState != MouseButtonState.Pressed)
		{
			return;
		}
		IsMouseOperating = true;
		try
		{
			DragMove();
		}
		catch
		{
		}
	}

	private void ResizeBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		switch (_mainWindowState)
		{
		case 0:
			ChangeMainWindowState(1);
			break;
		case 1:
			try
			{
				if (_mtpDevice.IsPcLvHighResolutionSupported)
				{
					ChangeMainWindowState(2);
				}
				else
				{
					ChangeMainWindowState(0);
				}
				break;
			}
			catch
			{
				ChangeMainWindowState(0);
				break;
			}
		default:
			ChangeMainWindowState(0);
			break;
		}
	}

	private void ChangeMainWindowState(byte winState)
	{
		System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip toolTip = new System.Windows.Controls.ToolTip();
		switch (winState)
		{
		case 0:
			if (IsConnected && !_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && !_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z") && _mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			PostViewPanel.Width = 240.0;
			PostViewPanel.Height = 160.0;
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MainWindow01.Width = 1024.0;
			MainWindow01.Height = 768.0;
			LVCanvas.Width = 720.0;
			LVCanvas.Height = 480.0;
			MsgTbSv.Width = 272.0;
			LVCanvas.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ResizeBtnImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images\\MINIMIZE.png", UriKind.Relative));
			toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnShrinkWindow;
			DoEvents();
			try
			{
				ResizeBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			VersionBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (IsConnected)
			{
				_mtpDevice.IsShowPostView = true;
				if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
				{
					if (PostViewMargin.Left == 286.0)
					{
						PostViewMargin.Top = 524.0;
					}
					else
					{
						PostViewMargin.Left = 774.0;
					}
					PostViewPanel.Margin = PostViewMargin;
					PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					_mtpDevice.RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo();
					_lvSizeRatio = LVCanvas.Width / (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth;
					if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
					{
						createLVGrid();
						LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					Point liveViewAFPosition2 = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition;
					liveViewAFPosition2.X = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.X * _lvSizeRatio;
					liveViewAFPosition2.Y = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.Y * _lvSizeRatio;
					Canvas.SetLeft(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition2.X - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
					Canvas.SetTop(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition2.Y - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
					AFAreaBdr.Width = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio;
					AFAreaBdr.Height = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio;
					AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			WinCntxItemExpand.IsEnabled = true;
			WinCntxItemRestore.IsEnabled = false;
			WinCntxItemShrink.IsEnabled = true;
			break;
		case 1:
			ResizeBtnImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images\\MAXIMIZE.png", UriKind.Relative));
			toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnRestoreWindow;
			try
			{
				ResizeBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			if (IsConnected && _mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
			{
				try
				{
					_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				catch
				{
					return;
				}
				LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			}
			LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			LiveViewImg.Source = null;
			VersionBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVCanvas.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
			MsgTbSv.Width = 208.0;
			if (IsConnected)
			{
				_mtpDevice.IsShowPostView = false;
			}
			MainWindow01.Width = 284.0;
			MainWindow01.Height = 768.0;
			WinCntxItemExpand.IsEnabled = true;
			WinCntxItemRestore.IsEnabled = true;
			WinCntxItemShrink.IsEnabled = false;
			break;
		case 2:
			if (IsConnected && !_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && !_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z") && _mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			PostViewPanel.Width = 360.0;
			PostViewPanel.Height = 240.0;
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			MainWindow01.Width = 1384.0;
			MainWindow01.Height = 1128.0;
			LVCanvas.Width = 1080.0;
			LVCanvas.Height = 720.0;
			MsgTbSv.Width = 272.0;
			LVCanvas.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			ResizeBtnImg.Source = new BitmapImage(new Uri("Images\\MINIMIZE.png", UriKind.Relative));
			toolTip.Content = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.BtnShrinkWindow;
			DoEvents();
			try
			{
				ResizeBtn.ToolTip = toolTip;
			}
			catch
			{
			}
			VersionBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			if (IsConnected)
			{
				_mtpDevice.IsShowPostView = true;
				if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
				{
					if (PostViewMargin.Left == 286.0)
					{
						PostViewMargin.Top = 764.0;
					}
					else
					{
						PostViewMargin.Left = 1014.0;
					}
					PostViewPanel.Margin = PostViewMargin;
					PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					_mtpDevice.RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo();
					_lvSizeRatio = LVCanvas.Width / (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth;
					if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
					{
						createLVGrid();
						LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
					}
					Point liveViewAFPosition = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition;
					liveViewAFPosition.X = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.X * _lvSizeRatio;
					liveViewAFPosition.Y = _mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition.Y * _lvSizeRatio;
					Canvas.SetLeft(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.X - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
					Canvas.SetTop(AFAreaBdr, liveViewAFPosition.Y - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
					AFAreaBdr.Width = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio;
					AFAreaBdr.Height = (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio;
					AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			WinCntxItemExpand.IsEnabled = false;
			WinCntxItemRestore.IsEnabled = true;
			WinCntxItemShrink.IsEnabled = true;
			break;
		}
		_mainWindowState = winState;
	}

	private void ShutterBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			SendReleaseCommand(_isTouchAf: false);
		}
	}

	private void ReleaseBtnPressTimerCallback(object o)
	{
		ReleaseBtnPressDelayTimer.Change(-1, -1);
		ReleaseBtnPressTimerStarted = false;
