		ShutterBtnPressContinuing = true;
	}

	private void ShutterBtn_PreviewMouseUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (ShutterBtnPressContinuing)
		{
			ShutterBtnPressContinuing = false;
			SendReleaseCommand(_isTouchAf: false);
		}
		else
		{
			ReleaseBtnPressDelayTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			ReleaseBtnPressTimerStarted = false;
		}
	}

	private void SendReleaseCommand(bool _isTouchAf)
	{
		if (_isShutterBtnClicked)
		{
			return;
		}
		_isShutterBtnClicked = true;
		if (LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = false;
			_isLvZoomCanceled = true;
			if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
			{
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
		}
		if (_mtpDevices.Count > 1 && _mtpDevices[1].IsOpened)
		{
			_mtpDevices[1].CamRelease(_isTouchAf);
		}
		switch (_mtpDevice.CamRelease(_isTouchAf))
		{
		case 0u:
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = false;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			if (_isBulbTimerStarted)
			{
				StopBulbTimer();
			}
			break;
		case 1u:
			ReleaseBtnPressDelayTimer.Change(250, -1);
			ReleaseBtnPressTimerStarted = true;
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxContinuousShooting);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = true;
			break;
		case 2u:
			if (_useAppBulbTimerFlag)
			{
				if (!_isBulbTimerStarted)
				{
					StartBulbTimer();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				ReleaseBtnPressDelayTimer.Change(250, -1);
				ReleaseBtnPressTimerStarted = true;
			}
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxBulbShooting);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = true;
			break;
		case 3u:
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMovieShooting);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = true;
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			break;
		case 4u:
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMirrorUpping);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = false;
			break;
		case 5u:
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCountDownStarted);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = false;
			break;
		}
		_isShutterBtnClicked = false;
	}

	private void AFBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected || _isShutterBtnClicked)
		{
			return;
		}
		_isShutterBtnClicked = true;
		if (LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom && !_mtpDevice.IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom)
			{
				LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
				_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = false;
				AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
				{
					LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
			}
			_mtpDevice.CamAutoFocus();
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamAutoFocus();
		}
		_isShutterBtnClicked = false;
	}

	public static void RegisterUsbDeviceNotification(IntPtr windowHandle)
	{
		DevBroadcastDeviceinterface devBroadcastDeviceinterface = default(DevBroadcastDeviceinterface);
		devBroadcastDeviceinterface.DeviceType = 5;
		devBroadcastDeviceinterface.Reserved = 0;
		devBroadcastDeviceinterface.ClassGuid = GuidDevinterfaceUSBDevice;
		devBroadcastDeviceinterface.Name = 0;
		DevBroadcastDeviceinterface structure = devBroadcastDeviceinterface;
		structure.Size = Marshal.SizeOf(structure);
		IntPtr intPtr = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(structure.Size);
		Marshal.StructureToPtr(structure, intPtr, fDeleteOld: true);
		notificationHandle = RegisterDeviceNotification(windowHandle, intPtr, 0);
	}

	public static void UnregisterUsbDeviceNotification()
	{
		UnregisterDeviceNotification(notificationHandle);
	}

	[DllImport("user32.dll", CharSet = CharSet.Auto, SetLastError = true)]
	private static extern IntPtr RegisterDeviceNotification(IntPtr recipient, IntPtr notificationFilter, int flags);

	[DllImport("user32.dll")]
	private static extern bool UnregisterDeviceNotification(IntPtr handle);

	private void MainWindow01_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left >= 0.0)
		{
			base.Left = Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left;
		}
		if (Settings.Default.MainWindow_Top >= 0.0)
		{
			base.Top = Settings.Default.MainWindow_Top;
		}
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5 = Settings.Default.ViewImgByDCU5;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid = Settings.Default.IsDispLVGrid;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid = Settings.Default.LVGridSpace;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid = Settings.Default.TypeOfLVGrid;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid = Settings.Default.LVGridScaleInterval;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow = Settings.Default.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex = Settings.Default.LVGridColorIndex;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf = Settings.Default.IsReleaseWithAF;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsUseBulbTimer = Settings.Default.IsUseBulbTimer;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder = Settings.Default.IsAutoSubFolder;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder = Settings.Default.RuleOfSubFolder;
		if (Settings.Default.SubFolderBaseName != "")
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName = Settings.Default.SubFolderBaseName;
		}
		else
		{
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName = RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxDefaultSubFolderBaseName;
		}
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber = Settings.Default.SubFolderDigits;
		AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn = Settings.Default.ShowApertureFixBtn;
		if (Settings.Default.MainWindowState == 1)
		{
			ChangeMainWindowState(1);
		}
		try
		{
			RegistryKey registryKey = ((!Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem) ? RegistryKey.OpenBaseKey(RegistryHive.LocalMachine, RegistryView.Registry32) : RegistryKey.OpenBaseKey(RegistryHive.LocalMachine, RegistryView.Registry64));
			RegistryKey registryKey2 = registryKey.OpenSubKey("SOFTWARE\\PENTAX\\Digital Camera Utility 5");
			_pathOfDcu5 = (string)registryKey2.GetValue("Path");
		}
		catch
		{
			_pathOfDcu5 = null;
		}
		RegistryKey registryKey3 = RegistryKey.OpenBaseKey(RegistryHive.LocalMachine, RegistryView.Registry32).OpenSubKey("SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\NET Framework Setup\\NDP\\v4\\Full\\");
		if (registryKey3 != null && registryKey3.GetValue("Release") != null && (int)registryKey3.GetValue("Release") >= 378675)
		{
			_isDotNet451Later = true;
		}
		_appDir = System.IO.Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
		_outerViewerPath = System.IO.Path.Combine(_appDir, "ITViewer.exe");
		_existOuterViewer = File.Exists(_outerViewerPath);
		ConstructImageList();
		ReleaseBtnPressDelayDelegate = ReleaseBtnPressTimerCallback;
		ReleaseBtnPressDelayTimer = new System.Threading.Timer(ReleaseBtnPressDelayDelegate);
		HwndSource hwndSource = HwndSource.FromHwnd(new WindowInteropHelper(this).Handle);
		hwndSource.AddHook(WndProc);
		RegisterUsbDeviceNotification(hwndSource.Handle);
		if (Settings.Default.FolderSaved)
		{
			_saveFolder = Settings.Default.SaveFolder;
		}
		if (Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left > 0.0)
		{
			base.Left = Settings.Default.MainWindow_Left;
			base.Top = Settings.Default.MainWindow_Top;
		}
		RawAcquisitionSw.IsChecked = Settings.Default.IsRAWSaving;
		JpegAcquisitionSw.IsChecked = Settings.Default.IsJPEGSaving;
		TiffAcquisitionSw.IsChecked = Settings.Default.IsTIFFSaving;
		SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = Settings.Default.IsSD1Writing;
		SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = Settings.Default.IsSD2Writing;
		TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex = Settings.Default.TouchAFMode;
		SaveFolderTbx.Text = _saveFolder;
		SaveFolderTbx.ToolTip = _saveFolder;
		LVCanvas.RenderTransform = LVPanelRotation;
		LiveViewImg.RenderTransform = LVImageRotation;
		LiveViewImg.Source = null;
		LiveViewImg.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		PostViewPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		PostViewPanel.Margin = PostViewMargin;
		PostViewPanel.RenderTransform = PostViewPanelRotation;
		PostViewImg.RenderTransform = PostViewImageRotation;
		ResizeBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		LvControlTab.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		CompositionAdjTi.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		PVWindow = new PostViewWindow();
		PVWindow.Owner = this;
		if (Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Left >= 0.0)
		{
			PVWindow.Left = Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Left;
		}
		if (Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Top >= 0.0)
		{
			PVWindow.Top = Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Top;
		}
		if (Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Width >= 0.0)
		{
			PVWindow.Width = Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Width;
		}
		if (Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Height >= 0.0)
		{
			PVWindow.Height = Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_Height;
		}
		PVWindow.WindowState = Settings.Default.PostViewWindow_WindowState;
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 128, 128, 128)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 192, 192, 192)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 211, 211, 211)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 0, 0, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, byte.MaxValue, 0, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 0, byte.MaxValue, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 0, 0, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, 0, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, byte.MaxValue, 0, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(128, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 128, 128, 128)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 192, 192, 192)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 211, 211, 211)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 0, 0, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, 0, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 0, byte.MaxValue, 0)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 0, 0, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, 0, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, 0, byte.MaxValue)));
		LVGridBrushList.Add(new SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb(byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, byte.MaxValue, 0)));
		_bulbTimerTicked = BulbTimerTicked;
		DisplayChanged += _bulbTimerTicked;
		ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
		WBColorTempBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
		CIDetailsBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
		PreviewBtn.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
		ConnectDevice(msgSw: false);
		_ = IsConnected;
	}

	private void createLVGrid()
	{
		double num = _lvSizeRatio * (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveWidth;
		double num2 = _lvSizeRatio * (double)_mtpDevice.LVActiveHeight;
		switch (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.TypeOfLVGrid)
		{
		case 0:
			createLVGrid1((int)num, (int)num2);
			break;
		case 1:
			if (num / num2 < 1.4)
			{
				createLVGrid2((int)num, (int)num2);
			}
			else
			{
				createLVGrid4((int)num, (int)num2);
			}
			break;
		case 2:
			createLVGrid3((int)num, (int)num2);
			break;
		}
	}

	private void createLVGrid1(int lvWidth, int lvHeight)
	{
		Brush brush = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex + 11];
		Brush stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
		LVGrid.Children.Clear();
		for (int i = (int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0); (double)i < (LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0; i += AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid)
		{
			System.Windows.Shapes.Path element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
			{
				Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(i, (LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0), new Point(i, (LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0)),
				Stroke = stroke,
				StrokeThickness = 1.0
			};
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		}
		stroke = brush;
		int num = (int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0);
		while ((double)num > (LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0)
		{
			System.Windows.Shapes.Path element2 = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
			{
				Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num, (LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0), new Point(num, (LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0)),
				Stroke = stroke,
				StrokeThickness = 1.0
			};
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element2);
			if (num != 0)
			{
				stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
			}
			num -= AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
		for (int j = (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0); (double)j < (LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0; j += AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid)
		{
			System.Windows.Shapes.Path element3 = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
			{
				Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0, j), new Point((LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0, j)),
				Stroke = stroke,
				StrokeThickness = 1.0
			};
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element3);
		}
		stroke = brush;
		int num2 = (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0);
		while ((double)num2 > (LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0)
		{
			System.Windows.Shapes.Path element4 = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
			{
				Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0, num2), new Point((LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0, num2)),
				Stroke = stroke,
				StrokeThickness = 1.0
			};
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element4);
			if (num2 != 0)
			{
				stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
			}
			num2 -= AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SpaceOfLVGrid;
		}
	}

	private void createLVGrid2(int lvWidth, int lvHeight)
	{
		_ = Brushes.LightGray;
		Brush stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
		_ = (1.0 + Math.Sqrt(5.0)) / 2.0;
		double num = (6.0 + 2.0 * Math.Sqrt(5.0)) / 4.0;
		int num2 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0);
		int num3 = num2 + (int)((double)lvWidth / (num + 1.0));
		int num4 = num2 + (int)((double)lvWidth * num / (num + 1.0));
		int num5 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0);
		int num6 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0);
		int num7 = num6 + (int)((double)lvHeight / (num + 1.0));
		int num8 = num6 + (int)((double)lvHeight * num / (num + 1.0));
		int num9 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0);
		LVGrid.Children.Clear();
		System.Windows.Shapes.Path element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, num6), new Point(num5, num9)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, num9), new Point(num5, num6)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num3, num6), new Point(num3, num9)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num4, num6), new Point(num4, num9)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, num7), new Point(num5, num7)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, num8), new Point(num5, num8)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
	}

	private void createLVGrid3(int lvWidth, int lvHeight)
	{
		Brush stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex + 11];
		Brush stroke2 = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
		LVGrid.Children.Clear();
		System.Windows.Shapes.Path element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0), (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0)), new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0), (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0))),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0), (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0)), new Point((int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0), (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0))),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		int i = (int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0);
		int num = 0;
		for (; (double)i < (LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0; i += AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid)
		{
			if (num != 5)
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(i, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) - scaleSize), new Point(i, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) + scaleSize)),
					Stroke = stroke2,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num++;
			}
			else
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(i, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) - scaleSize * 2), new Point(i, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) + scaleSize * 2)),
					Stroke = stroke,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num = 0;
			}
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		}
		int num2 = (int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0);
		int num3 = 0;
		while ((double)num2 > (LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0)
		{
			if (num3 != 5)
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) - scaleSize), new Point(num2, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) + scaleSize)),
					Stroke = stroke2,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num3++;
			}
			else
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) - scaleSize * 2), new Point(num2, (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0) + scaleSize * 2)),
					Stroke = stroke,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num3 = 0;
			}
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
			num2 -= AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
		int j = (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0);
		int num4 = 0;
		for (; (double)j < (LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0; j += AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid)
		{
			if (num4 != 5)
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) - scaleSize, j), new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) + scaleSize, j)),
					Stroke = stroke2,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num4++;
			}
			else
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) - scaleSize * 2, j), new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) + scaleSize * 2, j)),
					Stroke = stroke,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num4 = 0;
			}
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		}
		int num5 = (int)(LVGrid.ActualHeight / 2.0);
		int num6 = 0;
		while ((double)num5 > (LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0)
		{
			if (num6 != 5)
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) - scaleSize, num5), new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) + scaleSize, num5)),
					Stroke = stroke2,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num6++;
			}
			else
			{
				element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
				{
					Data = new LineGeometry(new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) - scaleSize * 2, num5), new Point((int)(LVGrid.ActualWidth / 2.0) + scaleSize * 2, num5)),
					Stroke = stroke,
					StrokeThickness = 1.0
				};
				num6 = 0;
			}
			LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
			num5 -= AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ScaleIntervalOfLVGrid;
		}
	}

	private void createLVGrid4(int lvWidth, int lvHeight)
	{
		_ = Brushes.LightGray;
		Brush stroke = LVGridBrushList[AppOptions.CurrentSetting.LVGridColorIndex];
		int num = (int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth - (double)lvWidth) / 2.0);
		int num2 = num + (int)((double)lvWidth * 12.0 / 13.0 / 3.0);
		int num3 = num + (int)((double)lvWidth * 27.0 / 13.0 / 3.0);
		int num4 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualWidth + (double)lvWidth) / 2.0);
		int num5 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight - (double)lvHeight) / 2.0);
		int num6 = num5 + (int)((double)lvHeight * 8.0 / 13.0 / 2.0);
		int num7 = num5 + (int)((double)lvHeight * 18.0 / 13.0 / 2.0);
		int num8 = (int)((LVGrid.ActualHeight + (double)lvHeight) / 2.0);
		LVGrid.Children.Clear();
		System.Windows.Shapes.Path element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num, num5), new Point(num4, num8)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num, num8), new Point(num4, num5)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num2, num5), new Point(num2, num8)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num3, num5), new Point(num3, num8)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num, num6), new Point(num4, num6)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
		element = new System.Windows.Shapes.Path
		{
			Data = new LineGeometry(new Point(num, num7), new Point(num4, num7)),
			Stroke = stroke,
			StrokeThickness = 2.0
		};
		LVGrid.Children.Add(element);
	}

	private void ShutterSpeedCbx_ValueChanged()
	{
		if (IsConnected && ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex != -1 && _mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex != ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex)
		{
			_mtpDevice.TvCurrentIndex = ShutterSpeedCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
	}

	private void ApertureCbx_ValueChanged()
	{
		if (IsConnected && ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex != -1 && _mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex != ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.ApertureKeepSw)
			{
				_mtpDevice.FixedApertureIndex = ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex;
			}
			else
			{
				_mtpDevice.AvCurrentIndex = ApertureCbx.SelectedIndex;
			}
		}
	}

	private void ApertureCbx_KeyUp(object sender, System.Windows.Input.KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		ApertureCbx_ValueChanged();
	}

	private void ApertureCbx_DropDownOpened(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		_IsAvModifing = true;
	}

	private void ApertureCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		ApertureCbx_ValueChanged();
		_IsAvModifing = false;
		ShutterBtn.Focus();
	}

	private void testbutton_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		rotate++;
		switch (rotate)
		{
		case 0:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 300.0;
			PostViewMargin.Top = 550.0;
			break;
		case 1:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 790.0;
			PostViewMargin.Top = 60.0;
			break;
		case 2:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 300.0;
			PostViewMargin.Top = 550.0;
			break;
		case 3:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 790.0;
			PostViewMargin.Top = 60.0;
			rotate = -1;
			break;
		}
		PostViewPanel.Margin = PostViewMargin;
	}

	private void RotateLvPanel(bool sw)
	{
		switch (sw ? 1 : ((!IsConnected) ? 1 : ((!_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode) ? _mtpDevice.PostViewRotate : ((LvRotationSettingCbx.SelectedIndex <= 0) ? _mtpDevice.RollingState : LvRotationSettingCbx.SelectedIndex))))
		{
		case 1:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 286.0;
			if (MainWindow01.Width == 1384.0)
			{
				PostViewMargin.Top = 764.0;
			}
			else
			{
				PostViewMargin.Top = 524.0;
			}
			break;
		case 3:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			if (MainWindow01.Width == 1384.0)
			{
				PostViewMargin.Left = 1014.0;
			}
			else
			{
				PostViewMargin.Left = 774.0;
			}
			PostViewMargin.Top = 32.0;
			break;
		case 2:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			PostViewMargin.Left = 286.0;
			if (MainWindow01.Width == 1384.0)
			{
				PostViewMargin.Top = 764.0;
			}
			else
			{
				PostViewMargin.Top = 524.0;
			}
			break;
		case 4:
			LVPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			LVImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			if (MainWindow01.Width == 1384.0)
			{
				PostViewMargin.Left = 1014.0;
			}
			else
			{
				PostViewMargin.Left = 774.0;
			}
			PostViewMargin.Top = 32.0;
			break;
		}
		PostViewPanel.Margin = PostViewMargin;
	}

	private void RotatePostView(byte rotate)
	{
		switch (rotate)
		{
		case 1:
			PostViewPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			PostViewImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			break;
		case 3:
			PostViewPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			PostViewImageRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			break;
		case 2:
			PostViewPanelRotation.Angle = 0.0;
			PostViewImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			break;
		case 4:
			PostViewPanelRotation.Angle = 90.0;
			PostViewImageRotation.Angle = 180.0;
			break;
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewImg_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected || IsOperationInhibited || !_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode)
		{
			return;
		}
		Point position = e.GetPosition(LiveViewImg);
		Point position2 = e.GetPosition(LVCanvas);
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom)
		{
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom)
			{
				LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
				_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = false;
				AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
				{
					LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
				}
				return;
			}
			if (!_mtpDevice.IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea)
			{
				_mtpDevice.CamAutoFocus();
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			if (position.X < _lvSizeRatio * (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFActiveAreaOriginX || position.X > _lvSizeRatio * (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFActiveAreaLimitX || position.Y < _lvSizeRatio * (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFActiveAreaOriginY || position.Y > _lvSizeRatio * (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFActiveAreaLimitY)
			{
				e.Handled = true;
				return;
			}
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
			{
				position.Offset(-40.0, 0.0);
			}
		}
		Canvas.SetLeft(AFAreaBdr, position2.X - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotWidth * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		Canvas.SetTop(AFAreaBdr, position2.Y - (double)(int)_mtpDevice.CAFSpotHeight * _lvSizeRatio / 2.0);
		AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
		if (_lvSizeRatio != 1.0)
		{
			position.X /= _lvSizeRatio;
			position.Y /= _lvSizeRatio;
		}
		_mtpDevice.LiveViewAFPosition = position;
		if (_mtpDevice.TouchAFSwitch && !_mtpDevice.IsMovieRecording)
		{
			SendReleaseCommand(_isTouchAf: true);
		}
		else
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamAutoFocus();
		}
		e.Handled = true;
	}

	private void TouchAFSwitchCbx_SelectionChanged(object sender, SelectionChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected && TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex != -1)
		{
			_mtpDevice.TouchAFSwitch = TouchAFSwitchCbx.SelectedIndex > 0;
		}
	}

	private void SD1WritingModeClicked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		if (_isCardWriteModeChanging)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotChangeCameraSetting);
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD1WritingMode;
			return;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsImageTransferring || _mtpDevice.IsShooting || _mtpDevice.IsImageProcessing)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotChangeCameraSetting);
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD1WritingMode;
			return;
		}
		bool? isChecked = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked;
		bool flag = true;
		if (isChecked.GetValueOrDefault() == flag && isChecked.HasValue && _mtpDevice.SD1State == 0 && !_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNoSD1Card);
			SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		_isCardWriteModeChanging = true;
		_mtpDevice.SD1WritingMode = SD1WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			try
			{
				_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = true;
			}
			catch
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			}
		}
		_isCardWriteModeChanging = false;
		CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
	}

	private void SD2WritingModeClicked(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			return;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		if (_isCardWriteModeChanging)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotChangeCameraSetting);
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD2WritingMode;
			return;
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsImageTransferring || _mtpDevice.IsShooting || _mtpDevice.IsImageProcessing)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotChangeCameraSetting);
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.SD2WritingMode;
			return;
		}
		bool? isChecked = SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked;
		bool flag = true;
		if (isChecked.GetValueOrDefault() == flag && isChecked.HasValue && _mtpDevice.SD2State == 0)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxNoSD2Card);
			SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		_isCardWriteModeChanging = true;
		_mtpDevice.SD2WritingMode = SD2WritingModeChk.IsChecked.Value;
		if (LiveViewBtn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			try
			{
				_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode = true;
			}
			catch
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsChecked = false;
			}
		}
		_isCardWriteModeChanging = false;
		CalcAvailableDriveSpace();
	}

	private void LVZoomSwitchBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected || !LiveViewBtn.IsChecked.Value)
		{
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		if (_mtpDevice.IsImageTransferring || _mtpDevice.IsShooting || _mtpDevice.IsImageProcessing)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotChangeCameraSetting);
			LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = _mtpDevice.IsLVZoom;
			return;
		}
		if (AFAreaBdr.Visibility == Visibility.Hidden)
		{
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
			if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
			{
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = LVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked.Value;
	}

	private void CamShutDwnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.RequestCamShutdown())
			{
				DisconnectDevice();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			}
			else
			{
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
				MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCannotCamShutdown);
			}
		}
	}

	private void ControlDisableSetting(bool IsEnabled)
	{
		DriveModeCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		System.Windows.Controls.ComboBox cIModeCbx = CIModeCbx;
		bool isEnabled = (WBModeCbx.IsEnabled = (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode != 21 && IsEnabled);
		cIModeCbx.IsEnabled = isEnabled;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
		{
			LSWBModeCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
			if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieRecording)
			{
				ZoomGrpBx.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else
			{
				ZoomGrpBx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
			}
			LSFocusSettingCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
			LSFocusFineTunePanel.IsEnabled = LSFocusFineTunePanel.IsEnabled && IsEnabled;
			LsLvZoomPanel.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		}
		ShutterSpeedCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		ApertureCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		SensitivityCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		ExpCmpCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		ExpBracketModeCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		if (!IsEnabled)
		{
			UnchangeableTv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableAv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableSv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			UnchangeableXv.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		GreenBtn.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		if (MainWindow01.Width != 284.0)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.Model.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1") && _mtpDevice.IsMovieMode)
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else
			{
				LiveViewBtn.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
			}
		}
		AFBtn.IsEnabled = IsEnabled && _mtpDevice.AFMode > 0;
		if (LastGPSStatus == 1 && (long)_mtpDevice.ExposureMode == 20)
		{
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = false;
		}
		else
		{
			ShutterBtn.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		}
		FileFormatCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		FileImageSizeCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		FileJpgCmpCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		SlotSettingCbx.IsEnabled = IsEnabled;
		if (_mtpDevice.IsMovieMode && !IsEnabled)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMovieMode);
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.IsIntervalMode)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxIntervalMode);
		}
		if ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 15)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxMultiExpContinuous);
		}
		if ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 22)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxSelfTimerContinuous);
		}
		if ((long)_mtpDevice.ProgMode == 33)
		{
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
			MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxSkewCorrection);
		}
		if (IsEnabled && !_isInitiateCaptureFromApp && !_mtpDevice.IsSelfTimerRunning && !_mtpDevice.IsMirrorUpping)
		{
			_ = _mtpDevice.IsExpBracketMode;
		}
	}

	private IntPtr WndProc(IntPtr hwnd, int msg, IntPtr wParam, IntPtr lParam, ref bool handled)
	{
		if (msg == 537)
		{
			handled = false;
			switch (wParam.ToInt32())
			{
			case 32768:
				if (!IsConnected)
				{
					_isConnectWaiting = true;
				}
				break;
			case 7:
				if (_isConnectWaiting)
				{
					ConnectDevice(msgSw: false);
					_isConnectWaiting = false;
				}
				break;
			case 32772:
				if (IsConnected && _mtpDevice.MtpGetDeviceInfo(out deviceInfo) != 8193)
				{
					DisconnectDevice();
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
					MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Add(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.TbxCamDisconnectedUnex);
				}
				break;
			}
		}
		return IntPtr.Zero;
	}

	private void VersionBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		VersionInfoWindow versionInfoWindow = new VersionInfoWindow();
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			versionInfoWindow.FirmwareVersion = _mtpDevice.Model + " Ver." + _mtpDevice.FirmVersion;
		}
		else
		{
			versionInfoWindow.FirmwareVersion = "";
		}
		versionInfoWindow.Owner = Window.GetWindow(this);
		versionInfoWindow.ShowDialog();
	}

	private void OptionBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		OptionWindow optionWindow = new OptionWindow();
		optionWindow.Owner = Window.GetWindow(this);
		if (_mtpDevice != null)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.IsLS)
			{
				optionWindow.OptionRawKindCbx.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			}
			else
			{
				AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RawFileFormat = _mtpDevice.RawKind;
			}
			optionWindow.DiaphragmCtrlFixSw.Visibility = ((!_mtpDevice.IsApertureKeepSupported) ? Visibility.Hidden : Visibility.Visible);
		}
		bool? flag;
		if (_cmdopIsLinkLrPlugin)
		{
			_tempDcu5LinkSw = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5 = false;
			optionWindow.DCU5LinkSw.IsEnabled = false;
			flag = optionWindow.ShowDialog();
			optionWindow.DCU5LinkSw.IsEnabled = true;
			AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5 = _tempDcu5LinkSw;
		}
		else
		{
			flag = optionWindow.ShowDialog();
		}
		ShutterBtn.Focus();
		if (_mtpDevice == null || flag != true)
		{
			return;
		}
		_mtpDevice.Dcu5LinkSw = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsLinkDCU5;
		_mtpDevice.IsShowLargePostView = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow;
		_mtpDevice.IsReleaseWithAF = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsReleaseWithAf;
		_mtpDevice.RawKind = AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RawFileFormat;
		if (AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsShowPostViewWindow)
		{
			if (_existOuterViewer)
			{
				try
				{
					if (IsConnected)
					{
						Process.Start(_outerViewerPath, "/show");
					}
				}
				catch
				{
					_existOuterViewer = false;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				PVWindow.LargePostViewImage.Source = null;
				PVWindow.Show();
			}
		}
		else if (_existOuterViewer)
		{
			try
			{
				if (IsConnected)
				{
					Process.Start(_outerViewerPath, "/hide");
				}
			}
			catch
			{
				_existOuterViewer = false;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			PVWindow.LargePostViewImage.Source = null;
			PVWindow.Hide();
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
		{
			createLVGrid();
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
		}
		else
		{
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		LastExposureMode = -1;
		ApertureKeepBtn.Visibility = ((!(AppOptions.CurrentSetting.ShowApertureFixBtn & _mtpDevice.IsApertureKeepSupported)) ? Visibility.Collapsed : Visibility.Visible);
	}

			}
		}
	}

	private void WBModeCbx_DropDownOpened(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{
		_IsWBModifing = true;
	}

	{
		if (_mtpDevice.WBMode != WBModeLUT.NominalToInternal[WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex])
		{
			_mtpDevice.WBMode = (int)WBModeLUT.NominalToInternal[WBModeCbx.SelectedIndex];
		}
		_IsWBModifing = false;
		ShutterBtn.Focus();
	}

	}

	}

	private void FileFormatCbx_DropDownClosed(object sender, EventArgs e)
	{

		if (num == 3)
		{
			num = 5;
		}
		if (num != _mtpDevice.CamWritingFileFormat)
		{
			_mtpDevice.CamWritingFileFormat = FileFormatCbx.SelectedIndex;
		}
		_IsFileFormatChanging = false;
		ShutterBtn.Focus();
	}

	private void BulbTimeUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		TSBulbTime += TimeStep;
		if (TSBulbTime > TSBulbTimeLimit)
		{
			TSBulbTime = TSBulbTimeLimit;
			RefreshTbxBulbTime(sbte.sec);
		}
		RefreshTbxBulbTime(SelectedBulbTimeElement);
	}

	private void BulbtimeDnBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		TSBulbTime -= TimeStep;
		if (TSBulbTime < TimeSpan.Zero)
		{
			TSBulbTime = TimeSpan.Zero;
			RefreshTbxBulbTime(sbte.sec);
		}
		RefreshTbxBulbTime(SelectedBulbTimeElement);
	}

	private void TbxBulbSec_MouseDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		TbxBulbSec.Foreground = HighlightColor;
		TbxBulbMin.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbHur.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		SelectedBulbTimeElement = sbte.sec;
		TimeStep = OneSecond;
	}

	private void TbxBulbMin_MouseDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		TbxBulbSec.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbMin.Foreground = HighlightColor;
		TbxBulbHur.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		SelectedBulbTimeElement = sbte.min;
		TimeStep = OneMinute;
	}

	private void TbxBulbHur_MouseDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
	{
		TbxBulbSec.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbMin.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbHur.Foreground = HighlightColor;
		SelectedBulbTimeElement = sbte.hour;
		TimeStep = OneHour;
	}

	private void RefreshTbxBulbTime(sbte flag)
	{
		TbxBulbHur.Text = TSBulbTime.ToString("hh\\:");
		if (flag != sbte.hour)
		{
			TbxBulbMin.Text = TSBulbTime.ToString("mm\\'");
			if (flag != sbte.min)
			{
				TbxBulbSec.Text = TSBulbTime.ToString("ss\\\"");
			}
		}
	}

	private void RaiseBulbTimerTicked()
	{
		if (this.DisplayChanged != null)
		{
			this.DisplayChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("BulbTimerTicked"));
		}
	}

	private void StartBulbTimer()
	{
		TbxBulbSec.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbMin.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		TbxBulbHur.Foreground = DefaultColor;
		Settings.Default.DefaultBulbTime = TSBulbTime;
		BulbTimeUpDnStp.IsEnabled = false;
		if (ExposureTimer == null)
		{
			BulbTimerTickDelegate = BulbTimerTick;
			ExposureTimer = new System.Threading.Timer(BulbTimerTickDelegate, null, OneSecond, OneSecond);
		}
		else
		{
			ExposureTimer.Change(OneSecond, OneSecond);
		}
		if ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 7)
		{
			_selfTimerWait = 12;
		}
		else if ((long)_mtpDevice.DriveModeNew == 8)
		{
			_selfTimerWait = 2;
		}
		_isBulbTimerStarted = true;
	}

	private void StopBulbTimer()
	{
		if (ExposureTimer != null)
		{
			ExposureTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			_isBulbTimerStarted = false;
			TSBulbTime = Settings.Default.DefaultBulbTime;
			RaiseBulbTimerTicked();
		}
	}

	private void BulbTimerTick(object o)
	{
		if (_selfTimerWait > 0)
		{
			_selfTimerWait--;
			return;
		}
		TSBulbTime -= OneSecond;
		RaiseBulbTimerTicked();
		if (TSBulbTime == TimeSpan.Zero)
		{
			Thread.Sleep(100);
			_mtpDevice.CamRelease(_isTouchAf: false);
			_isInitiateCaptureFromApp = false;
			StopBulbTimer();
		}
	}

	private void BulbTimerTicked(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		base.Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new BulbTimerRefreshNotifyDelegate(BulbTimerRefresh), sender, e);
	}

	private void BulbTimerRefresh(object sender, PropertyChangedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!(e.PropertyName == "BulbTimerTicked"))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			RefreshTbxBulbTime(sbte.sec);
			if (!_isBulbTimerStarted)
			{
				BulbTimeUpDnStp.IsEnabled = true;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception)
		{
		}
	}

	private void MovieModeBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (MovieModeBtn.IsChecked == true)
		{
			if (_mtpDevice.SetMovieMode(sw: true))
			{
				MovieModeBtn.IsChecked = true;
				MovieModeBtn.Foreground = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Red);
			}
			else
			{
				MovieModeBtn.IsChecked = false;
			}
		}
		else if (_mtpDevice.SetMovieMode(sw: false))
		{
			MovieModeBtn.IsChecked = false;
			MovieModeBtn.Foreground = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Gray);
		}
		else
		{
			MovieModeBtn.IsChecked = true;
		}
	}

	private void CompositionAdjUpBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		byte directionResult;
		byte stepResult;
		switch (_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustment(2, 1, out directionResult, out stepResult))
		{
		case 8193:
			if (!CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled)
			{
				CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			break;
		case 40973:
			CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			break;
		}
		CompositionAdjustY.Content = stepResult.ToString();
		if (stepResult == 0)
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[0];
		}
		else if (directionResult == 2)
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[1];
		}
		else
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[2];
		}
		cmpAdjDirY = directionResult;
		cmpAdjY = stepResult;
	}

	private void CompositionAdjDownBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		byte directionResult;
		byte stepResult;
		switch (_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustment(3, 1, out directionResult, out stepResult))
		{
		case 8193:
			if (!CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled)
			{
				CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			break;
		case 40973:
			CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			break;
		}
		CompositionAdjustY.Content = stepResult.ToString();
		if (stepResult == 0)
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[0];
		}
		else if (directionResult == 2)
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[1];
		}
		else
		{
			AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[2];
		}
		cmpAdjDirY = directionResult;
		cmpAdjY = stepResult;
	}

	private void CompositionAdjRPlusBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		byte directionResult;
		byte stepResult;
		switch (_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustment(5, 1, out directionResult, out stepResult))
		{
		case 8193:
			if (!CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled)
			{
				CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			}
			break;
		case 40973:
			CompositionAdjRPlusBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			break;

		CompositionAdjustR.Content = stepResult.ToString();
		if (stepResult == 0)
		{
			AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[0];
			CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			CompositionAdjLeftBtn.IsEnabled = true;
			CompositionAdjRightBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		}

		else

		{

			{
				CompositionAdjLeftBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else
			{
				CompositionAdjRightBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
		}
		if (_mtpDevice.CamCompositionAdjLimY == cmpAdjY)
		{
			if (cmpAdjDirY == 2)
			{
				CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
			else
			{
				CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = false;
			}
		}
	}

	private void CompositionAdjResetBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		_mtpDevice.CompositionAdjustment(6, 0, out var _, out var _);
		cmpAdjDirX = 6;
		cmpAdjDirY = 6;
		cmpAdjDirR = 6;
		cmpAdjX = 0;
		cmpAdjY = 0;
		cmpAdjR = 0;
		CompositionAdjustX.Content = "0";
		CompositionAdjustY.Content = "0";
		CompositionAdjustR.Content = "0";
		AdjustGuideXImg.Source = AdjustGuideXImages[0];
		AdjustGuideYImg.Source = AdjustGuideYImages[0];
		AdjustGuideRImg.Source = AdjustGuideRImages[0];
		CompositionAdjUpBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		CompositionAdjDownBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		CompositionAdjRightBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		CompositionAdjLeftBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		CompositionAdjRPlusBtn.IsEnabled = true;
		CompositionAdjRMinusBtn.IsEnabled = true;
	}

	private void LsLVZoomSwitchBtn_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
	{
		if (!IsConnected)
		{
			LsLVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked = false;
			return;
		}
		MessageTextBlock.Inlines.Clear();
		if (AFAreaBdr.Visibility == Visibility.Hidden)
		{
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			AFAreaRectangle.BorderBrush = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
			if (_mtpDevice.PcLiveViewMode && AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsDispLVGrid)
			{
				LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			AFAreaBdr.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
			LVGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Hidden;
		}
		_mtpDevice.IsLVZoom = LsLVZoomSwitchBtn.IsChecked.Value;
	}

	private void SaveFolderTbx_KeyDown(object sender, System.Windows.Input.KeyEventArgs e)
	{
		if (e.Key != Key.Return || SaveFolderTbx.Text.Length <= 0)
		{
			return;
		}
		string text = SaveFolderTbx.Text;
		if (Directory.Exists(text))
		{
			_saveFolder = text;
			SaveFolderTbx.ToolTip = _saveFolder;
			if (IsConnected)
			{
				_mtpDevice.saveFolder = SelectSubFolder(_saveFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.IsAutoCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.RuleOfCreateSubFolder, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.SubFolderBaseName, AppOptions.CurrentSetting.NumberOfDigitsOfSubFolderNumber);
			}
		}
		else
		{
			SaveFolderTbx.Text = _saveFolder;
		}
		SaveFolderTbx.SelectAll();
	}

		colorTempDlgWindow.ShowDialog();
	}

	private string SelectSubFolder(string saveFolder, bool sw, byte rule, string baseName, byte digits)
	{
		bool flag = false;
		if (!sw)
		{
			return saveFolder;
		}
		string tempName;
		string text;
		if (rule == 0)
		{
			DirectoryInfo directoryInfo = new DirectoryInfo(saveFolder);
			DirectoryInfo[] directories = directoryInfo.GetDirectories(baseName + "*");
			if (directories.Length != 0)
			{
				int num;
				while (true)
				{
					tempName = baseName + "\\d{1," + digits + "}$";
					num = (from x in directories
						select Regex.Match(x.Name, tempName) into m
						where m.Success
						select int.Parse(m.Groups[0].Value.Replace(baseName, ""))).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Max();
					if ((double)num < Math.Pow(10.0, (int)digits) - 1.0)
					{
						break;
					}
					digits++;
					if (digits > 5)
					{
						System.Windows.MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxSubFolderNumOverflowed, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Exclamation);
						baseName += "_";
						digits = 1;
						flag = false;
					}
					else
					{
						flag = true;
					}
				}
				text = System.IO.Path.Combine(saveFolder, string.Format("{0}{1:d" + digits + "}", baseName, num + 1));
			}
			else
			{
				text = System.IO.Path.Combine(saveFolder, string.Format("{0}{1:d" + digits + "}", baseName, 1));
			}
			Directory.CreateDirectory(text);
			if (flag)
			{
				System.Windows.MessageBox.Show(RemoteAssistant.Properties.Resources.MbxSubFolderNumDigitsIncreased, "IMAGE Transmitter 2", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Asterisk);
			}
		}
		else
		{
			tempName = System.IO.Path.Combine(saveFolder, baseName + DateTime.Today.ToString("yyyyMMdd"));
			DirectoryInfo directoryInfo = new DirectoryInfo(tempName);
			if (!directoryInfo.Exists)
			{
				directoryInfo.Create();
			}
			text = tempName;
		}
		return text;
	}

	private void DoEvents()
	{
		DispatcherFrame dispatcherFrame = new DispatcherFrame();
		DispatcherOperationCallback method = delegate(object obj)
		{
			((DispatcherFrame)obj).Continue = false;
			return null;
		};
		Dispatcher.CurrentDispatcher.BeginInvoke(DispatcherPriority.Background, method, dispatcherFrame);
		Dispatcher.PushFrame(dispatcherFrame);
	}
}
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace RemoteAssistant;

public class MessageBoxEx
{
	private const int WM_CLOSE = 16;

	[DllImport("user32.dll", SetLastError = true)]
	private static extern IntPtr FindWindow(string lpClassName, string lpWindowName);

	[DllImport("user32.dll", CharSet = CharSet.Unicode)]
	internal static extern int SendMessage(IntPtr hwnd, int msg, IntPtr wParam, IntPtr lParam);

	public static void Close(string caption)
	{
		IntPtr intPtr = FindWindow(null, caption);
		if (intPtr != IntPtr.Zero)
		{
			SendMessage(intPtr, 16, IntPtr.Zero, IntPtr.Zero);
		}
	}
}

	public const uint AstroTraceTimer = 64u;

	public const uint BulbTimer = 64u;

	public const uint GPSState = 384u;

	public const uint AstroTracer3 = 512u;
}

		public MtpException(string message, ushort opCode, int hr)
			: base(string.Format("OpCode:0x{2:X4}, HRESULT:0x{1:X8}){0}", message, hr, opCode))
		{
			base.HResult = hr;
		}
	}

	public string Model
	{
		get
		{
			return _camModel;
		}
		set
		{
			if (value.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3 Mark III"))
			{
				_camModel = value;
				_camModelNo = 78420u;
				_camVdrExtVer = 1u;
				_isDualSlot = true;
				_isNewTransferMode = true;
				_isNewFocusFineControl = true;
				_isTvBracketSupport = true;
				_isAvBracketSupport = true;
				_isExpBracketSupport = true;
				_isMovieSupported = true;
				_isMovieSettingSupported = true;
				_isMovieSubImageSupported = true;
				_isCompositionAdjSupported = true;
				_isApertureKeepSupported = true;
				_isColorTempSettingSupported = true;
				_isCIDetailParameterSupported = true;
				_isSelfTimerContinuousNewSupported = true;
				_isRemoteContinuousNewSupported = true;
				_isSlotChangeSupported = true;
				_isPcLvHighResolutionSupported = true;
			}
			else if (value.StartsWith("PENTAX K-3"))
			{
				_camModel = value;
				_camModelNo = 77760u;
				_camVdrExtVer = 1u;
				_isDualSlot = true;
				_isNewTransferMode = false;
				_isNewFocusFineControl = false;
				_isMovieSupported = false;
			}
			else if (value.StartsWith("PENTAX 645Z"))
			{
				_camModel = value;
				_camModelNo = 77840u;
				_camVdrExtVer = 1u;
				_isDualSlot = true;
				_isNewTransferMode = false;
				_isNewFocusFineControl = false;
				_isExpBracketSupport = true;
				_isMovieSupported = false;
			}
			else if (value.StartsWith("645D"))
			{
				_camModel = value;
				_camModelNo = 77320u;
				_camVdrExtVer = 0u;
				_isDualSlot = true;
				_isNewTransferMode = false;
				_isNewFocusFineControl = false;
				_isMovieSupported = false;
			}
			else if (value.StartsWith("PENTAX K-1 Mark II"))
			{
				_camModel = value;
				_camModelNo = 78400u;
				_camVdrExtVer = 1u;
				_isDualSlot = true;
				_isNewTransferMode = true;
				_isNewFocusFineControl = false;
				_isMovieSupported = true;

	public int MoviePixSize
	{
		get
		{
			return _imageSizeOfMovie;
		}
		set
		{
			_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = (byte)value;
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int MovieFrameRate
	{
		get
		{
			if (_frameRate == 3)
			{
				return 2;
			}
			return _frameRate;
		}
		set
		{
			_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
			if (value == 2)
			{
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 3;
			}
			else
			{
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = (byte)value;
			}
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int CardSlotSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (IsMovieMode)
			{
				MtpGetDevicePropValue(53275, out _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
				return _camPropWritingFileFormat[9] - 1;
			}
			return _camCardSlotSetting - 1;
		}
		set
		{
			_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = (byte)(value + 1);
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int CurrentWritingSlot
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_isSlotChangeSupported)
			{
				return -1;
			}
			return _currentWritingSlot - 1;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_isSlotChangeSupported)
			{
				_camWritingFileFormatCopy();
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[10] = (byte)(value + 1);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public int MovieCardSlotSetting
	{
		get
		{
			if (_isDualSlot)
			{
				return _camMovieCardSlotSetting;
			}
			return 0;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_isDualSlot)
			{
				_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[10];
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 6;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
				_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = (byte)(value + 1);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53275, ref _camPropWritingFileFormat, out var _);
				_ = 8193;
			}
		}
	}

	protected bool VendorMode
	{
		get
		{
			return _camVendorMode;
		}
		set
		{
			bool flag = value;
			if (_camModelNo == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			uint funcAvailFlag;
			ushort resCode;
			if (flag)
			{
				if (_camVendorMode)
				{
					return;
				}
				MtpSetPentaxVendorMode(_camModelNo, 1u, _camVdrExtVer, out funcAvailFlag, out resCode);
				_IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea = (((funcAvailFlag & (true ? 1u : 0u)) != 0) ? true : false);
				_IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom = (((funcAvailFlag & 2u) != 0) ? true : false);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					ConnectResult = resCode;
					throw new Exception();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (!_camVendorMode)
				{
					return;
				}
				MtpSetPentaxVendorMode(_camModelNo, 0u, _camVdrExtVer, out funcAvailFlag, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					ConnectResult = resCode;
					_camVendorMode = false;
					throw new Exception();
				}
			}
			_camVendorMode = flag;
		}
	}

	public bool IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea => _IsCamJudgeAreaOfCAFArea;

	public bool IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom => _IsAvailableCAFInLVZoom;

	public bool PcLiveViewMode
	{
		get
		{
			return _camPcLiveViewMode;
		}
		set
		{
			bool flag = value;
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return;
			}
			ushort resCode;
			byte[] devPropValue;
			if (flag)
			{
				devPropValue = new byte[20];
				MtpGetDevicePropValue(53257, out devPropValue, out resCode);
				_lvAreaWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
				_lvAreaHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
				_lvActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 8);
				_lvActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 10);
				_contrastAfActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 12);
				_contrastAfActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 14);
				_contrastAfSpotWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 16);
				_contrastAfSpotHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 18);
				_cafActiveAreaOriginX = (ushort)((_lvAreaWidth - _contrastAfActiveWidth) / 2);
				_cafActiveAreaOriginY = (ushort)((_lvAreaHeight - _contrastAfActiveHeight) / 2);
				_cafActiveAreaLimitX = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginX + _contrastAfActiveWidth);
				_cafActiveAreaLimitY = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginY + _contrastAfActiveHeight);
				devPropValue = new byte[1] { 1 };
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53301, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
				if (resCode != 8193)
				{
					if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
					{
						this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("LvStartFailed"));
					}
					_camPcLiveViewMode = false;
				}
				else
				{
					_camPcLiveViewMode = true;
					LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: true);
				}
				return;
			}
			devPropValue = new byte[1] { 0 };
			LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: false);
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53301, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 40965 && resCode != 8193)
			{
				LiveViewRefreshTimer(sw: true);
				if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
				{
					this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("LvStopFailed"));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				_camPcLiveViewMode = false;
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamLVFrame
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemLVFrame.EnterReadLock();
				return _memLVFrame;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemLVFrame.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamPostView
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemTransPostView.EnterReadLock();
				return _memPostView;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemTransPostView.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
	}

	public WrappedStream MemStreamLargePostView
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.EnterReadLock();
				return _memLargePostView;
			}
			finally
			{
				_rwlMemTransLargePostView.ExitReadLock();
			}
		}
		set
		{
			if (value == null)
			{
				_memLargePostView.Dispose();
				_memLargePostView = null;
			}
		}
	}

	public ushort WBColorTemp
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[2];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53272, out devPropValue, out var resCode);
			if (resCode == 8193)
			{
				return BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 0);
			}
			return 0;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = BitConverter.GetBytes(value);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53272, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

			{
				return 9;

			return devPropValue[0];

		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)

				byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
				if (value == 9)
				{
					devPropValue[0] = byte.MaxValue;
				}

					devPropValue[0] = value;
				}
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53284, ref devPropValue, out var _);

	public short[] CIUserFilterEffect
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return null;
			}
			short[] array = new short[3];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53293, out var devPropValue, out var _);
			array[0] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x10) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[5]) : devPropValue[5]);
			array[1] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x20) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[6]) : devPropValue[6]);
			array[2] = (short)(((devPropValue[4] & 0x40) > 0) ? (-devPropValue[7]) : devPropValue[7]);
			return array;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8]
				{
					4,
					0,
					0,
					0,
					(byte)(((value[0] < 0) ? 16u : 0u) | ((value[1] < 0) ? 32u : 0u) | ((value[2] < 0) ? 64u : 0u)),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[0]),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[1]),
					(byte)Math.Abs(value[2])
				};
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53293, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public byte CICrossProcessType
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_camVendorMode)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53292, out var devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue[0] > 32)
			{
				return (byte)(devPropValue[0] - 32 + 3);
			}
			return (byte)(devPropValue[0] - 1);
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
				if (value > 3)
				{
					devPropValue[0] = (byte)(value - 3 + 32);
				}
				else
				{
					devPropValue[0] = (byte)(value + 1);
				}
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53292, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}

	public System.Windows.Point LiveViewAFPosition
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53302, out devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue.Length == 4)
			{
				_LVAFPointX = (ushort)(_lvAreaWidth / 2);
				_LVAFPointY = (ushort)(_lvAreaHeight / 2);
			}
			else
			{
				_LVAFPointX = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
				_LVAFPointY = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
			}
			return new System.Windows.Point((int)_LVAFPointX, (int)_LVAFPointY);
		}
		set
		{
			_LVAFPointX = (ushort)value.X;
			_LVAFPointY = (ushort)value.Y;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[8]
			{
				2,
				0,
				0,
				0,
				(byte)(_LVAFPointX & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointX & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				(byte)(_LVAFPointY & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointY & 0xFF00) >> 8)
			};
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53302, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			_ = _AFMode;
		}
	}

	public bool SD1WritingMode
	{
		get
		{
			if (_sd1WritingMode <= 0)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		set
		{
			_sd1WritingMode = (value ? 1 : 0);
			SDWritingMode = _sd2WritingMode + _sd1WritingMode;
		}
	}

	public bool SD2WritingMode
	{
		get
		{
			if (_sd2WritingMode <= 0)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		set
		{
			_sd2WritingMode = (value ? 2 : 0);
			SDWritingMode = _sd2WritingMode + _sd1WritingMode;
		}
	}

	public int SDWritingMode
	{
		set
		{
			MtpSetCardWritingMode((uint)value, out var resCode);
			if (resCode == 8193)
			{
				_sd1WritingMode = value & 1;
				_sd2WritingMode = value & 2;
				_lastSd1WritingMode = _sd1WritingMode;
				_lastSd2WritingMode = _sd2WritingMode;
				SdWritingModeChanged = true;
			}
			else
			{
				_sd1WritingMode = _lastSd1WritingMode;
				_sd2WritingMode = _lastSd2WritingMode;
				if (this.PropertyChanged != null)
				{
					this.PropertyChanged(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs("CardWriteModeFailed"));
				}
			}
		}
	}

	public bool IsLVZoom
	{
		get
		{
			return _isLvZoom;
		}
		set
		{
			_isLvZoom = value;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[12]
			{
				4,
				0,
				0,
				0,
				(byte)(_LVAFPointX & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointX & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				(byte)(_LVAFPointY & 0xFFu),
				(byte)((_LVAFPointY & 0xFF00) >> 8),
				0,
				0,
				0,
				0
			};
			if (_isLvZoom)
			{
				devPropValue[8] = _lvZoomMag;
			}
			else
			{
				devPropValue[8] = 1;
			}
			devPropValue[9] = 0;
			devPropValue[10] = 0;
			devPropValue[11] = 0;
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53303, ref devPropValue, out var resCode);
			if (_lvZoomMag == 16 && resCode == 8220)
			{
				devPropValue[8] = 10;
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(53303, ref devPropValue, out resCode);
			}
			if (!_isLvZoom)
			{
				Thread.Sleep(100);
			}
		}
	}

	public byte LvZoomMag
	{
		get
		{
			return _lvZoomMag;
		}
		set
		{
			_lvZoomMag = value;
			if (_isLvZoom)
			{
				IsLVZoom = true;
			}
		}
	}

	public byte FocusPeakingMode
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53291, out devPropValue, out var resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			_lvFocusPeaking = devPropValue[0];
			return _lvFocusPeaking;
		}
		set
		{
			_lvFocusPeaking = value;
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1] { _lvFocusPeaking };
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53291, ref devPropValue, out var _);
		}
	}

	public int FocusFineTune
	{
		set
		{
			int num = 0;
			ushort resCode;
			int num2;
			if (!_isNewFocusFineControl)
			{
				num2 = value * 5;
				if (value > 0)
				{
					MtpFocusControl((uint)num2, 0u, out resCode);
				}
				else
				{
					MtpFocusControl((uint)Math.Abs(num2), 1u, out resCode);
				}
				return;
			}
			num2 = (int)((0.0 - (double)(float)_openAvNum * 2.5 / 3.0) * (double)value);
			MtpFocusControlNew(num2, out resCode);
			while (resCode == 40972)
			{
				num2 = (int)((double)num2 * Math.Sqrt(2.0));
				MtpFocusControlNew(num2, out resCode);
				num++;
				if (num == 10)
				{
					break;
				}
			}
		}
	}

	public bool CompositionAdjustmentSw
	{
		get
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53290, out devPropValue, out var _);
			if (devPropValue[0] == 1)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
		set
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[1];
			if (value)
			{
				devPropValue[0] = 1;
			}
			else
			{
				devPropValue[0] = 0;
			}
			MtpSetDevicePropValue(53290, ref devPropValue, out var _);
		}
	}

	public bool LrPlginLinkSw
	{
		get
		{
			return _LrPluginLinkSw;
		}
		set
		{
			if (value)
			{
				Process[] processesByName = Process.GetProcessesByName("tether_pentax");
				if (processesByName.Length == 0)
				{
					_LrPluginLinkSw = false;
					_LrPluginPath = "";
					return;
				}
				if (processesByName[0].MainModule.FileVersionInfo.FileMajorPart != 2)
				{
					_LrPluginLinkSw = false;
					_LrPluginPath = "";
					return;
				}
				_LrPluginPath = processesByName[0].MainModule.FileName;
			}
			_LrPluginLinkSw = value;
		}
	}

	public int FLCurrentIdx
	{
		get
		{
			return _flCurrentIdx;
		}
		set
		{
			if (_camVendorMode)
			{
				byte[] devPropValue = BitConverter.GetBytes(_FocalLengthList[value]);
				MtpSetDevicePropValue(20488, ref devPropValue, out var _);
			}
		}
	}

	public int LSFocusModeIndex

	}

	public MtpDevice(string deviceId)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceId))
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("deviceId");
		}
		mtpDevice = new PortableDeviceClass();
		DeviceId = deviceId;
	}

	private void _camWritingFileFormatCopy()
	{
		if (!IsMovieMode && _isSlotChangeSupported)
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[11];
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 7;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[10] = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat = new byte[10];
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[0] = 6;
		}
		if (Model == "PENTAX KP")
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = (byte)_camWritingFormatSetting;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = (byte)_camWritingFormatSetting;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = (byte)_imageSize;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = (byte)(2 - _jpegQuality);
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = RawKind;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 1;
		}
		else if (_isLS)
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 0;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[4] = 6;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[5] = 6;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[6] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[7] = 4;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[8] = 2;
			_camPropWritingFileFormat[9] = 0;
		}
	}

	public void RefreshLiveViewAreaInfo()
	{
		if (_camVendorMode)
		{
			byte[] devPropValue = new byte[20];
			MtpGetDevicePropValue(53257, out devPropValue, out var _);
			_lvAreaWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 4);
			_lvAreaHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 6);
			_lvActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 8);
			_lvActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 10);
			_contrastAfActiveWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 12);
			_contrastAfActiveHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 14);
			_contrastAfSpotWidth = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 16);
			_contrastAfSpotHeight = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropValue, 18);
			_cafActiveAreaOriginX = (ushort)((_lvAreaWidth - _contrastAfActiveWidth) / 2);
			_cafActiveAreaOriginY = (ushort)((_lvAreaHeight - _contrastAfActiveHeight) / 2);
			_cafActiveAreaLimitX = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginX + _contrastAfActiveWidth);
			_cafActiveAreaLimitY = (ushort)(_cafActiveAreaOriginY + _contrastAfActiveHeight);
		}
	}

	protected void RefreshExpBracketStepList()
	{
		_ExpBracketStepList.Clear();
		_ExpBracketStepCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53269, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		byte item = devPropDesc[6];
		int num = 8;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			byte b = devPropDesc[num];
			num++;
			if (b != 0)
			{
				_ExpBracketStepList.Add(b);
				_ExpBracketStepCbxItems.Add(((double)(float)(int)b / 10.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
		}
		_EvBracketStepCurrentIndex = _ExpBracketStepList.IndexOf(item);
		RaiseParameterListChanged("ExpBracketListChanged");
	}

		}
	}

	private void RaiseParameterListChanged(string parameterName)

	private void ConvertFractionalTvValueToString(uint numerator, uint denominator, out string tvString)
	{
		if (denominator == 1)
		{
			tvString = numerator + "\"";
		}
		else if (numerator == 1)
		{
			tvString = "1/" + denominator;
		}
		else
		{
			tvString = ((float)numerator / (float)denominator).ToString("0.0") + "\"";
		}
	}

	protected void RefreshShutterSpeedList()
	{
		_TvList.Clear();
		_TvCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53263, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		ulong item = BitConverter.ToUInt64(devPropDesc, 13);
		int num = 22;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		uint num3 = 0u;
		uint num4 = 0u;
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			ulong item2 = BitConverter.ToUInt64(devPropDesc, num);
			num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num);
			num4 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num + 4);
			num += 8;
			if (num3 != 0)
			{
				_TvList.Add(item2);
				if (IsCamBulbTimer && IsTvChangeable)
				{
					TimeSpan timeSpan = new TimeSpan(0, 0, (int)num3);
					_TvCbxItems.Add(timeSpan.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan.ToString("ss\\\""));
				}
				else
				{
					ConvertFractionalTvValueToString(num3, num4, out var tvString);
					_TvCbxItems.Add(tvString);
				}
			}
		}
		if (Model.StartsWith("PENTAX KP") && IsElectronicShutter)
		{
			if (_exposureStep == 0)
			{
				string[] collection = new string[4] { "1/8000", "1/12000", "1/16000", "1/24000" };
				ulong[] collection2 = new ulong[4] { 34359738368001uL, 51539607552001uL, 68719476736001uL, 103079215104001uL };
				List<string> collection3 = new List<string>(collection);
				List<ulong> collection4 = new List<ulong>(collection2);
				_TvCbxItems.AddRange(collection3);
				_TvList.AddRange(collection4);
			}
			else
			{
				_TvList.Remove(6000uL);
				_TvCbxItems.Remove("1/6000");
				string[] collection5 = new string[7] { "1/6400", "1/8000", "1/10000", "1/12800", "1/16000", "1/20000", "1/24000" };
				ulong[] collection6 = new ulong[7] { 27487790694401uL, 34359738368001uL, 42949672960001uL, 54975581388801uL, 68719476736001uL, 85899345920001uL, 103079215104001uL };
				List<string> collection7 = new List<string>(collection5);
				List<ulong> collection8 = new List<ulong>(collection6);
				_TvCbxItems.AddRange(collection7);
				_TvList.AddRange(collection8);
			}
		}
		if (IsCamBulbTimer && IsTvChangeable)
		{
			TimeSpan timeSpan2 = new TimeSpan(0, 0, BitConverter.ToInt32(devPropDesc, 13));
			_TvCurrentIdx = _TvCbxItems.IndexOf(timeSpan2.ToString("mm\\'") + " " + timeSpan2.ToString("ss\\\""));
		}
		else
		{
			_TvCurrentIdx = _TvList.IndexOf(item);
		}
		RaiseParameterListChanged("TvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshSensitivityList()
	{
		_SvCbxItems.Clear();
		byte[] devPropDesc;
		ushort resCode;
		if (_IsOldSv)
		{
			MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20495, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
		}
		else
		{
			MtpGetDevicePropDesc(53278, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
			if (resCode != 8193)
			{
				_IsOldSv = true;
				MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20495, out devPropDesc, out resCode);
			}
		}
		if (_IsOldSv)
		{
			_SvList.Clear();
			ushort item = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, 7);
			int num = 10;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
			{
				ushort num3 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
				num += 2;
				if (num3 != 0)
				{
					_SvList.Add(num3);
					if (num3 == ushort.MaxValue)
					{
						_SvCbxItems.Add("AUTO");
					}
					else
					{
						_SvCbxItems.Add(num3.ToString());
					}
				}
			}
			_SvCurrentIdx = _SvList.IndexOf(item);
		}
		else
		{
			_SvListEx.Clear();
			uint item2 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, 9);
			int num = 14;
			ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			for (int j = 0; j < num2; j++)
			{
				uint num4 = BitConverter.ToUInt32(devPropDesc, num);
				num += 4;
				_SvListEx.Add(num4);
				if (num4 == 0)
				{
					_SvCbxItems.Add("AUTO");
				}
				else
				{
					_SvCbxItems.Add(num4.ToString());
				}
			}
			if (Model == "PENTAX K-1 Mark II")
			{
				if (_sensitivityStep == 0)
				{
					string[] collection = new string[2] { "409600", "819200" };
					uint[] collection2 = new uint[2] { 409600u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection3 = new List<string>(collection);
					List<uint> collection4 = new List<uint>(collection2);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection3);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection4);
				}
				else if (_exposureStep == 0)
				{
					string[] collection5 = new string[4] { "288000", "409600", "576000", "819200" };
					uint[] collection6 = new uint[4] { 288000u, 409600u, 576000u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection7 = new List<string>(collection5);
					List<uint> collection8 = new List<uint>(collection6);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection7);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection8);
				}
				else
				{
					string[] collection9 = new string[6] { "256000", "320000", "409600", "512000", "640000", "819200" };
					uint[] collection10 = new uint[6] { 256000u, 320000u, 409600u, 512000u, 640000u, 819200u };
					List<string> collection11 = new List<string>(collection9);
					List<uint> collection12 = new List<uint>(collection10);
					_SvCbxItems.AddRange(collection11);
					_SvListEx.AddRange(collection12);
				}
			}
			_SvCurrentIdx = _SvListEx.IndexOf(item2);
		}
		RaiseParameterListChanged("SvListChanged");
	}

	protected void RefreshExpCompansationList()
	{
		_XvList.Clear();
		_XvCbxItems.Clear();
		MtpGetDevicePropDesc(20496, out var devPropDesc, out var resCode);
		if (resCode != 8193)
		{
			return;
		}
		short item = BitConverter.ToInt16(devPropDesc, 7);
		int num = 10;
		ushort num2 = BitConverter.ToUInt16(devPropDesc, num);
		num += 2;
		for (int i = 0; i < num2; i++)
		{
			short num3 = BitConverter.ToInt16(devPropDesc, num);
			num += 2;
			_XvList.Add(num3);
			if (num3 > 0)
			{
				_XvCbxItems.Add("+" + ((double)(float)num3 / 1000.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
			else
			{
				_XvCbxItems.Add(((double)(float)num3 / 1000.0).ToString("0.0"));
			}
		}
		_XvCurrentIdx = _XvList.IndexOf(item);
		RaiseParameterListChanged("XvListChanged");
	}

	private void RaiseLVChanged(string LvState)

	private void LiveViewRefreshTimer(bool sw)
	{
		if (pollingLiveViewTimer != null)
		{
			if (sw)
			{
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(33, 33);
			}
			else
			{
				pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(-1, -1);
			}
		}
	}

	private void LiveViewRefreshTask(object o)
	{
		if (_isLVAcquiring)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (!_camPcLiveViewMode)
		{
			pollingLiveViewTimer.Change(-1, -1);
		}
		else if (!_DisconnectRequested)
		{
			_isLVAcquiring = true;
			ushort resCode;
			try
			{
				MtpGetLiveViewFrameData(out resCode);
			}
			catch
			{
				_isLVAcquiring = false;
				return;
			}
			if (resCode == 8193)
			{
				RaiseLVChanged("LiveViewRefreshed");
			}
			_isLVAcquiring = false;
		}
	}

		}
	}

		}

	private void RaiseConditionChanged()
